05f1fa17.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, Strategic programs, PRISM, Last Mile Delivery Tech
05f1fa17.description:
**Description**
 How does Amazon deliver millions of packages faster than customers expect, across the globe, every single day?
   

  

 If that question excites you, keep reading. We're looking for a Senior Technical Program Manager to lead the strategy and execution of programs across Last Mile Delivery. This is a high\-visibility, high\-impact role where your work will shape the delivery experience for hundreds of millions of customers worldwide.
   

  

 At Amazon, we're working to be the most Customer\-centric company on earth. One customer experience that we’re constantly looking to take to a new level is how we fulfill and deliver their orders. Our Last Mile organization is at the forefront of this mission: pioneering new products and services, partnering with Delivery Service Partners and Amazon Flex, and building a world\-class operation that spans North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific. Speed is one of the most customer\-visible and strategically important pillars of this work, and you'll be at the center of it.
   

  

 As part of Amazon Delivery's PRISM (Central TPM) organization, you will own the end\-to\-end program strategy for last mile initiatives, driving cross\-functional alignment across business, product, and engineering teams to launch and scale programs that move the needle on delivery. You will partner with senior leaders across multiple organizations to define priorities, remove blockers, and deliver results.
   

  

 The ideal candidate thrives in ambiguity, brings strong business and technical judgment, and has a track record of delivering complex programs. You are a crisp communicator who can influence at the VP level and translate business goals into actionable roadmaps. If you want to solve one of the most challenging problems in logistics, making delivery faster for every customer, everywhere, this is your role.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Serve as the single\-threaded leader owning complex programs across multiple VP organizations
* Identify business and technical requirements with science, operations, product, and engineering stakeholders, translating them into specifications, scoped deliverables, and program roadmap from design through launch
* Lead design and implementation efforts across cross\-functional teams, making trade\-offs to optimize time\-to\-market
* Own stakeholder communication through all stages of the product lifecycle, clearly articulating goals, roles, and desired outcomes
* Drive high\-level strategic initiatives while being willing to roll up your sleeves and get the job done


 The right candidate will have a strong program management background, demonstrated experience leading large to extra\-large projects, and a well\-rounded technical foundation. You must thrive in an entrepreneurial environment and not be hindered by ambiguity or competing priorities.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 Your day starts by connecting the dots across teams, aligning product, engineering, and operations leaders on what matters most for our customer and business. You will run strategic reviews, unblock cross\-functional dependencies, and make trade\-off decisions that keep programs on track. Some days you are deep in data, shaping the roadmap; other days you are in a room full of senior leaders driving alignment on the next big bet. No two days look the same, but every day you are directly influencing how fast customers get their packages.
   

  

**About The Team**
 PRISM is Amazon Delivery's central Technical Program Management organization. We drive programs that span Last Mile and partner organizations including Robotics, Pharmacy, Prime Air, and more. The problems we solve sit at the intersection of customer experience, technology, and operations at massive scale. If you want to work on programs that shape how Amazon delivers to customers globally, this is the team to be on.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 7\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 4\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* 3\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience building and evaluating system\-level technical design
* Bachelor's degree in engineering, computer science or equivalent


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience developing and executing/delivering product and technical roadmaps
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- Karnataka

1de6ca8c.title: Data Solutions Consultant
1de6ca8c.description:
**Who We Are**
 Addepar is a global data and AI platform empowering investment professionals to turn complex financial information into actionable intelligence. Addepar unifies portfolio, market and client data in a total portfolio view and delivers AI\-powered insights within investment and client workflows. More than 1,400 firms in nearly 60 countries use Addepar to manage and advise on nearly $9 trillion in assets. Its open platform integrates with nearly 650 software, data and consulting partners to power end\-to\-end investment operations across firms of all sizes and complexity. Addepar supports clients worldwide with offices in New York City, Salt Lake City, London, Edinburgh, Pune, Dubai, Geneva, Singapore and São Paulo.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a
 **Data Solutions Consultant,** 
 you will support some of Addepar’s complex and high\-touch client data implementation projects. You’ll design scalable solutions to transform and integrate clients’ portfolio data into Addepar, and build expertise across both technical and business domains.
   

  

 You’ll also be among the
 **first members of the Data Solutions team based in India** 
 , helping establish our presence in the region while working closely with colleagues across the U.S., U.K., and other global offices. This is a collaborative role offering the opportunity to shape our operating model locally and strengthen how our global teams deliver together.
   

  

 Beyond client delivery, you’ll also have the opportunity to participate in internal innovation; contributing to automation, tooling, and best practices that enable scale and elevate how we operate globally. This is an individual contributor position for someone who thrives at the intersection of finance, data, and technology, and is excited to make a global impact from India.
   

  

 Applicants must have legal authorization to work in the country where this role is based on the first day of employment. Visa sponsorship is not available for this position.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Support complex client implementations: execute data conversion projects to extract, transform, and load historical portfolio data from clients’ legacy systems into Addepar
* Build scalable data solutions: Translate client requirements into flexible, sustainable workflows that enable accurate reporting and analysis, with guidance from senior team members
* Contribute to a portfolio of high\-impact projects: Manage multiple concurrent client engagements, prioritizing effectively and driving each to successful completion
* Collaborate across teams: Building knowledge of investment\-related data and partner closely with Services, Sales, Product, and Engineering to deliver tailored client outcomes
* Champion operational excellence: Identify and lead opportunities to streamline, automate, and improve our delivery processes and workflows


**Who You Are**
* Experienced: 2\+ years of experience in technology, finance, or consulting, with a strong record of leading complex data or financial system integration projects
* Technical: Proficiency in Python and SQL. You should be comfortable navigating large datasets, streamlining data flows (ETL), and finding ways to automate repetitive manual tasks to improve efficiency. Experience/familiarity with Databricks and API workflows is a plus.
* Investment\-Savvy:
* A foundational grasp of the investment landscape. You understand how different assets work—like stocks, bonds, and derivatives—and you’re familiar with the basics of how portfolios are tracked and accounted for.
* Experience working directly with the building blocks of investment data. You’ve handled things like security identifiers, trade records, and market pricing updates, and you understand how this information flows through a financial firm.
* Technical Translation: Ability to articulate technical architectures to non\-technical internal teams, converting technical requirements into clear, actionable business value.
* Solutions\-Oriented: Curious problem\-solver who takes initiative and is developing ownership and accountability in ambiguous environments
* Collaborative: Eager to work across teams and functions to deliver measurable impact
* Process\-Minded: Highly organized, detail\-oriented, and continuously looking for ways to improve efficiency and scale
* Adaptable: Thrives in a fast\-paced environment with evolving priorities and global stakeholders


**A Note On Requirements**
 Don’t check every single box? Apply anyway. We are looking for curious, motivated individuals. If you are passionate about the intersection of finance and tech but don't meet every specific qualification listed above, we still want to hear from you and see if your unique skills could be a fit for our team.
   

  

**Important Note: This role will require you to work from Pune office 3 days a week in UK shift i.e. 2:30 PM to 11:30 PM IST. (hybrid role)**
**Our Values**
* Act Like an Owner \- Think and operate with intention, purpose and care. Own outcomes.
* Build Together \- Collaborate to unlock the best solutions. Deliver lasting value.
* Champion Our Clients \- Exceed client expectations. Our clients’ success is our success.
* Drive Innovation \- Be bold and unconstrained in problem solving. Transform the industry.
* Embrace Learning \- Engage our community to broaden our perspective. Bring a growth mindset.


 In addition to our core values, Addepar is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We seek to bring together diverse ideas, experiences, skill sets, perspectives, backgrounds and identities to drive innovative solutions. We commit to promoting a welcoming environment where inclusion and belonging are held as a shared responsibility.
   

  

 We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.
   

  

 PHISHING SCAM WARNING: Addepar is among several companies recently made aware of a phishing scam involving con artists posing as hiring managers recruiting via email, text and social media. The imposters are creating misleading email accounts, conducting remote “interviews,” and making fake job offers in order to collect personal and financial information from unsuspecting individuals. Please be aware that no job offers will be made from Addepar without a formal interview process. Additionally, Addepar will not ask you to purchase equipment or supplies as part of your onboarding process. If you have any questions, please reach out to ta\-operations@addepar.com.

 · Sell technical solutions to the customer with professionalism and enthusiasm
   

 · Provide accurate and timely management information, to include \- activity reports, bid reviews, project forecasts, KPI’s
   

 · Adhere to the Company’s Quality and Business Processes
   

 · To structure and produce compelling sales proposals/commercial and technical documentation outlining the cost savings and business benefits to clients
   

 · To assume responsibility for running a bid team, where relevant
   

 · Interface with the implementation / project team, articulating customer requirement, to ensure smooth transition from Sale to Delivery
   

  

 Candidate Profile
   

  

 · 5 years plus experience
   

 · In depth working knowledge of TCP/IP v4 and an understanding of TCP/IP v6\.
   

 · Strong interest in Internet technologies (routing, switching and general network infrastructure)
   

 · Comfortable working with hosting technologies including Windows and Linux based server systems, network storage systems and data centre services, vmware, hypervisor etc.
   

 · Working knowledge on Security Products and Solutions such as Emailing Solution, UTM, Firewalls, DLP, EmailSecurity, Antivirus \& Antispam Solution, MDM Solution
   

 · Knowledge of Active Directory \& Group Policies
   

 · Knowledge of MSSQL Basic Installation \& Management
   

 · Industry wise knowledge on products positioning

8c280d1a.title: Test Architect - VOIS
8c280d1a.description:
**Who we are**
--------------



VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
  

As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
  

We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
  

\#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture

**About this Role**
-------------------



We are seeking an experienced testing professional with 8–14 years of experience to act as a subject matter expert for application testing across projects and programmes. This role focuses on ensuring quality assurance excellence through strong test strategy, collaboration with cross\-functional teams, and proactive risk management, while supporting delivery readiness and continuous improvement initiatives.

**What you’ll do**
------------------


* Serve as the primary testing expert for assigned applications across projects or programmes
* Define, review, and assure the quality of test approaches, scenarios, test cases, regression scope, and testing concepts
* Collaborate with developers, technical architects, product owners, project managers, and business stakeholders to clarify requirements, business scenarios, and acceptance criteria
* Support test teams and release managers in effort estimation, capacity planning, environment readiness, deployment verification, and test data management
* Identify and communicate software quality risks, aligning testing approaches with business impact, complexity, and risk exposure
* Review test results, regression updates, and quality documentation, including audit\-related artefacts where applicable
* Support defect management by addressing escalations, incomplete defect details, missing root cause analysis, and solution gaps
* Contribute to quality approval processes by providing application and technical insights ahead of go\-live decisions
* Coach and support project and business testing teams on testing practices, application knowledge, and critical processes
* Ensure application knowledge is effectively documented, retained, and shared across teams
* Drive continuous improvement in QA processes by identifying efficiencies and promoting best practices
* Provide recommendations on automation and non\-functional testing opportunities, frameworks, and enhancements
**Who you are**
---------------


* An experienced testing professional with 8–14 years of relevant experience
* A subject matter expert in software testing practices and methodologies
* Proficient in defining and reviewing test strategies and ensuring quality outcomes
* Skilled in stakeholder collaboration across technical and business teams
* Experienced in risk\-based testing and quality assurance decision\-making
* Knowledgeable in defect management, audit readiness, and documentation standards
* Committed to mentoring teams and sharing knowledge effectively
* Focused on continuous improvement and innovation in testing processes
* Familiar with automation and non\-functional testing practices and frameworks
**Not a perfect fit?**
----------------------



Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.

**What's in it for you**
------------------------


* Opportunity to act as a testing expert within large\-scale, complex programmes
* Exposure to cross\-functional collaboration with global teams and stakeholders
* Involvement in strategic quality decisions and go\-live readiness
* Opportunities to influence QA transformation and process improvements
* A collaborative environment that values continuous learning and knowledge sharing
**What skills you will learn**
------------------------------


* Advanced risk\-based testing and quality assurance practices
* Test strategy design and optimisation for complex programmes
* Stakeholder management and cross\-functional collaboration
* Test automation and non\-functional testing frameworks
* Continuous improvement techniques within QA and testing environments
**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
----------------------------------------------



Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.

**Join Us**
-----------



At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
  

We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
  

With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

89ead837.title: Deputy Manager- Information Architect
89ead837.description:
**Who we are**
--------------



VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
  

As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
  

We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
  

\#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture

**About this Role**
-------------------


We are seeking an Information Architect to translate business requirements into robust data solutions that enable scalable and efficient data platforms. This role focuses on designing data warehouse architectures, developing data pipelines, and ensuring that data transformation processes align with business objectives. The individual will collaborate with stakeholders and support development teams by providing clear solution designs and technical guidance.**What you’ll do**
------------------


* Strong understanding of data warehousing concepts and dimensional modelling
* Proven experience in ETL design and development with hands\-on exposure to ETL tools
* Advanced SQL skills, including complex transformations and data analysis (e.g., Teradata)
* Ability to interpret data and apply a range of data manipulation and analytical techniques
* Experience working with both business and technical stakeholders in collaborative environments
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly
* Highly organised with the ability to plan work and deliver within agreed timelines
* Detail\-oriented with a problem\-solving mindset and an innovative approach
* Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
**Who you are**
---------------


* Strong understanding of data warehousing concepts and dimensional modelling
* Proven experience in ETL design and development with hands\-on exposure to ETL tools
* Advanced SQL skills, including complex transformations and data analysis (e.g., Teradata)
* Ability to interpret data and apply a range of data manipulation and analytical techniques
* Experience working with both business and technical stakeholders in collaborative environments
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly
* Highly organised with the ability to plan work and deliver within agreed timelines
* Detail\-oriented with a problem\-solving mindset and an innovative approach
* Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
**Not a perfect fit?**
----------------------



Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.

**What's in it for you**
------------------------


* Opportunity to work on large\-scale data architecture and transformation initiatives
* Exposure to cross\-functional teams and diverse stakeholder environments
* A collaborative environment that supports knowledge sharing and innovation
* Opportunities to strengthen expertise in enterprise data solutions and analytics
* Involvement in impactful projects that drive business decision\-making
**What skills you will learn**
------------------------------


* Advanced data warehouse design and optimisation techniques
* Stakeholder management across complex organisational structures
* Scalable data pipeline development and architecture practices
* Problem\-solving approaches for large datasets and transformation challenges
* Best practices in solution design review and collaborative development
**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
----------------------------------------------



Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.

**Join Us**
-----------



At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
  

We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
  

With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

8d8f7832.title: Network Architect - LAN
8d8f7832.description:
**We are seeking an experienced LAN Network Solution Architect with deep expertise in LAN technologies (focus on Cisco Meraki and Cisco Enterprise), switching/routing protocols, and IPAM/DHCP, to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of our network strategy** 
 . The ideal candidate will possess a strong technical background in LAN design, hands\-on experience with python scripts, and a proven track record of delivering secure, scalable, and robust solutions in complex environments. 
 



  





  





**Responsibilities** 




**Solution Architecture and Design:**



* Architect for design, integration and management of Cisco Meraki and Enterprise solution.
* Architect for design, integration and management of IPAM/DHCP solution.
* Analyze current business processes, IT infrastructure, and security requirements to develop security for our network solution.
* Develop high\-level and detailed architecture diagrams, technical documentation, and integration designs.
* Ensure solutions align with enterprise security architecture, regulatory requirements (GDPR, SOX, etc.), and industry best practices.



  





**Implementation \& Integration:**




 • Oversee the migration to Cloud managed platform of the global LAN architecture.
 


* Collaborate with IT, Métiers, and application teams to adapt design and solutions.
* Make sure standards and procedures match Operation Excellence ambitions
* Guide and support technical teams during implementation and optimization phases.
* Level 3 support (escalation) for India Tech Hub Run team for his perimeter.
* Define and enforce standards and procedures.
* Ensure solutions support audit, compliance and reporting requirements.
* Conduct risk assessments and recommend mitigation strategies
* Attends design committees with Global Network team and work in pair with his peers to define the Network architecture strategy.
* Develop detailed network architecture blueprints and integration diagrams tailored to business and technical requirements.
* Lead architecture discussion and translate the decisions in High Level Design documents and operational procedures
* Establish technical standards, patterns and best practices
* Validation of Document solutions designs, data flows and integration points.



  





  





**Qualifications** 




**Technical Competencies**




 •      Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Security, or related field.
 



 •      Strong expertise
 **in Network Routing protocols** 




 •      Strong
 **WIFI expertise** 




 •      Strong expertise on
 **Cisco Meraki, Cisco Enterprise (Catalyst Center is a nice to have skill)** 




 •      Strong expertise on
 **IPAM / DHCP (Infoblox and Netbox are nice to have skills)** 




 •      Expertise on
 **Infrastructure as code (Python, Ansible, AWX)** 




 •      10\+ years of experience in complex network environments
 



 •      
 **Certification: Cisco is mandatory** 




 •      General shift business hours: from 10:30 AM to 7:30 PM IST

c38f0f6f.title: Senior Solutions Architect - Remote
c38f0f6f.description:
* **Job Title:** 
 Senior Solutions Architect \- Remote
* **Work Mode:** 
 Fully Remote
* **Schedule:** 
 Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are looking for Senior DevOps Engineers to join a paid remote AI training program focused on Infrastructure as Code (IaC). In this role, you will write realistic engineering\-ticket\-style prompts, configure LocalStack sandboxes, and build golden solutions with passing end\-to\-end tests to help AI models master Terraform, AWS CDK, and CloudFormation. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well\-suited for senior\-level DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure engineers seeking project\-based, asynchronous work.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Task Creation:** 
 Write natural language prompts that read like real engineering tickets, including realistic ambiguity and professional context, so AI can handle real\-world scenarios.
* **Environment Configuration:** 
 Set up and configure LocalStack sandboxes (local AWS mocks) to validate infrastructure tasks
* **Golden Solution Development:** 
 Craft the initial infrastructure state and a "golden solution" that includes passing automated end\-to\-end tests
* **Quality Benchmarking:** 
 Ensure tasks meet a high quality bar; simple or poorly formatted tasks will be rejected.
* **Response Evaluation:** 
 Choose the correct response between two AI\-generated answers to a given infrastructure question
* **Prompt Writing:** 
 Draft simple prompts that act as a starting point for AI models to build upon



  





**Qualifications** 



* **Seniority** 
 : Must be a Senior\-level practitioner in DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure Engineering
* **IaC Platform Expertise** 
 : Professional, hands\-on experience with at least one of the following — High Priority: AWS CDK, Terraform (HCL), or CloudFormation; Medium/Low Priority: Pulumi, AzureRM, Ansible, Chef, or Puppet
* **Programming Languages:** 
 Strong proficiency in at least one of the following for infrastructure scripting and testing: TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, or Java
* **Communication** 
 : Ability to articulate complex technical concepts fluently in written English, following strict style guidelines



  





**Eligibility Requirements** 



* Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations: Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Colombia, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, India, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Luxembourg, Mexico, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Peru, Puerto Rico, Singapore, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States



  





**Compensation** 



* Earn up to $50 USD/hr — plus additional incentives; rates vary based on expertise and project requirements
* Paid via PayPal and AirTM



  





**Work Arrangement** 



* Fully remote; choose your own schedule
* Flexible workload depending on project availability, most experts spend 5–10 hrs/week, up to 40 hours
* Free access to leading AI tools (GPT, Claude, and more) worth over $200/month included at no extra cost



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.
 



  





*Ready to put your infrastructure expertise to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.*

b031f082.title: Solutions Architect – FSI Fintech, FSI SA
b031f082.description:
**Description**
 AWS Global Sales drives adoption of the AWS cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud. Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and committed support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer\-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud. Join us and help us grow.
   

  

 Are you excited to work with the team that enables India’s leading Fintech organisations to build innovative services with AWS, scaling to serve billion\+ Indians? The FSI team in AWS India is looking for a Solutions Architect who can work with our customers who have built new business models on the foundations of payment infrastructure like UPI, widespread 4G internet access, affordable smartphones, exploding digital content, identity infrastructure like Aadhar and world class cloud infrastructure.
   

  

 Your broad responsibilities will include: owning the technical engagement and ultimate success around specific implementation projects, and developing a deep expertise in the AWS technologies as well as broad know\-how around how applications and services are constructed using the AWS platform. An ideal candidate will have owned the architecture and designed IT systems deployed at scale, have worked as a part of Centre of Excellence, Innovation Centres etc. to investigate adoption of new technologies, have experience with multiple technologies, patterns and frameworks; and is able to figure out trade\-offs between them, be hands\-on, and can roll up their sleeves should need be to do Proof of Concepts and demonstrate technologies. Candidate should be good at identifying repeatable pattern and best practices, picking up new technologies \& constant learners.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will possess customer facing skills that will allow them to represent Amazon Web Services India Pvt Ltd. (AWS India) well within a customer environment and drive discussions with senior personnel within the company, as well as a technical background that enables them to easily interact and give guidance to software developers and architects in India. S/he should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, product, and technical challenges.
   

  

 \#aws\-ags\-India
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 The selected candidate will work with Fintech customers to map/model business requirements \& user access patterns to technology \& performance requirement: compare between various design patterns: discern between variety of data technologies (RDBMS, NoSQL) \& compute technology \- servers, container, and serverless, design for required scaling, high availability goals, while minimizing the cost \& meeting security requirements: design Disaster Recovery solutions for required RTO/RPO: Advise on building DevOps pipelines \& process : advise on monitoring Infrastructure \& Applications using AWS technologies such as CloudWatch, ELK Stack, Conduct Well Architected Reviews, partner with AWS Specialists in areas like AI, Analytics, Media etc. to implement innovative solutions, collaborate with the Service Teams to identify feature gaps suggest new features \& present to Technical communities and customer C\-Suite on Architecture Patterns, Best practices, Case Studies.
   

  

 Preferred Location: 1\) Mumbai 2\) Bangalore
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 10\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 5\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working within software development or Internet\-related industries
* Experience migrating or transforming legacy customer solutions to the cloud
* Experience working with AWS technologies from a dev/ops perspective
* Experience designing or architecting (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems
* Experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities, or experience managing full application stacks from the OS up through custom applications
* Experience in networking fundamentals, security, databases (Relational and/or NoSQL), operating systems (Unix, Linux, and/or Windows)
* Bachelor's degree or above in engineering or equivalent STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics) field
* Experience in the area of Analytics / GenAI / Containers / API / Cloud architecture \& deployment


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Maharashtra

1e814b37.title: Lead Architect
1e814b37.description:
**Overview**
 WELCOME TO SITA
   

  

 At SITA, we keep airports moving, airlines flying smoothly, and borders open. Our technology and communication innovations power the success of the global air travel industry.
   

  

 You’ll find us in 95% of international airports, working closely with over 2,500 transportation and government clients. Each partnership brings unique challenges, and we thrive on delivering fresh solutions and cutting\-edge tech to keep operations running like clockwork. We don’t just move the world forward—we’re proud to be recognized as a
 **Great Place to Work®** 
 by our employees and certified in most of our growing locations. Here, we feel empowered, supported, and inspired to grow.
   

  

 Are you ready to love your job?
   

  

 The adventure begins right here, with you, at SITA
   

  

**About The Role \& Team**
 We are seeking an experienced
 **Lead Architect** 
 with strong
 **Java development foundations** 
 and proven
 **solution design expertise** 
 to join our technology team. This role goes beyond high\-level design \- you will act as the
 **Technical Owner** 
 for one or more mission\-critical application built on
 **Java, AWS, and MongoDB** 
 , while also shaping new solutions for future customer and business needs.
   

  

 As a Lead Architect, you will combine
 **hands\-on technical depth** 
 with
 **architectural leadership** 
 , ensuring that systems are scalable, secure, and aligned with modern cloud\-native principles. You will work closely with engineering teams, product owners, and stakeholders, acting as the technical authority throughout the application lifecycle.
   

  

 The world is changing. Are you ready to define the future of travel with us?
   

  

  

  

**what You’ll Do**
* Own the end\-to\-end technical architecture of existing applications built on Java, AWS, and MongoDB
* Act as Technical Owner, responsible for architecture decisions, technical roadmap, and system health
* Design scalable, resilient, and cost\-effective cloud\-native solutions using AWS services
* Provide hands\-on technical leadership, including design reviews, code reviews, and technical guidance
* Define and enforce architecture standards, design patterns, and best practices
* Collaborate with product, delivery, and business teams to translate requirements into technical solutions
* Identify and manage technical risks, performance bottlenecks, and architectural debt
* Support incident resolution, root\-cause analysis, and continuous improvement initiatives
* Mentor engineers and promote strong engineering and DevOps practices


**Qualifications**
**ABOUT YOUR SKILLS**
* Strong background in Java development, with experience using Spring / Spring Boot
* Proven experience in solution architecture or application architecture roles
* Hands\-on expertise with AWS cloud services, including compute, storage, networking, and security
* Solid experience working with MongoDB, including data modeling and performance considerations
* Deep understanding of microservices architecture, REST APIs, and distributed systems
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure\-as\-code concepts
* Ability to balance hands\-on technical work with architectural leadership responsibilities
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills


  

  

**NICE\-TO\-HAVE**
* Experience working in the aviation, travel, or transportation domain
* Exposure to containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Knowledge of event\-driven architectures and messaging platforms
* Experience modernizing legacy systems to cloud\-native architectures
* Prior experience in customer\-facing or pre\-sales technical roles


  

  

**What We Offer**
 We’re all about diversity. We operate in 200 countries and speak 60 different languages and cultures. We’re really proud of our inclusive environment. Our offices are comfortable and fun places to work, and we make sure you get to work from home too. Find out what it's like to join our team and take a step closer to your best life ever.
   

  

  

  

 🏡
 **Flex Week:** 
 Work from home up to 2 days/week (depending on your team’s needs)
   

  

  

  

 ⏰
 **Flex Day:** 
 Make your workday suit your life and plans.
   

  

 🌎
 **Flex Location:** 
 Take up to 30 days a year to work from any location in the world.
   

  

 🌿
 **Employee Wellbeing:** 
 We’ve got you covered with our Employee Assistance Program (EAP), for you and your dependents 24/7, 365 days/year. We also offer Champion Health – a personalized platform that supports a range of wellbeing needs.
   

  

  

  

 🚀
 **Professional Development** 
 : Level up your skills with our training platforms, including LinkedIn Learning!
   

  

**🙌🏽** 
**Competitive Benefits** 
 : Competitive benefits that make sense with both your local market and employment status.
   

  

  

  

*SITA is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We value a diverse workforce. In support of our Employment Equity Program, we encourage women, aboriginal people, members of visible minorities, and/or persons with disabilities to apply and self\-identify in the application process.*

125fc327.title: Manager - Business Architecture
125fc327.description:
**About the Role** 




  





 As WrkTalk scales its enterprise deployments, we are building a Business Architecture function that sits at the intersection of technology and client delivery. This role owns the end\-to\-end deployment of WrkTalk instances for enterprise clients — from internal coordination through go\-live — freeing the sales team to focus on client relationships and revenue.
 



  





**What You'll Own** 



* Take complete ownership of every client deployment from sales handover to go\-live
* Liaise internally across Backend, Frontend, DevOps, Testing teams to deliver each instance on time and correctly
* Manage all pre\-deployment client queries on infrastructure requirements, coordinating with DevOps and Backend to resolve them
* Drive installation calls — including screen shares, environment access sessions, IP whitelisting, SMTP configuration, and networking handshakes
* Troubleshoot post\-deployment issues (traffic routing, call connectivity, infosec clearances) by pulling in the right internal resources
* Maintain rigorous deployment checklists and sign off on every instance before client handover
* Coordinate internal attendance for client\-facing calls — identifying who needs to be on a call and securing their availability
* Act as the first line of defence for product integrity — when sales brings client customisation requests, you evaluate them against product architecture and articulate clearly and logically why WrkTalk is a single\-product platform, not a bespoke solution, ensuring client expectations are set correctly from day one
* Serve as the single point of internal coordination so the sales team's only touchpoint is you



  





**Who You Are** 



* B.Tech / B.E. from a reputed institution (IIT preferred) with 2–3 years of experience in a technology\-intensive environment
* Not necessarily a programmer, but deeply fluent in how technology systems work — infra, networking, application layers
* Strong product mindset — you instinctively think in terms of scalable, standardised solutions and are comfortable holding the line on product boundaries without being dismissive of client needs
* Organised to a fault — you work from checklists, track every open item, and nothing falls through the cracks
* A natural coordinator who can hold multiple concurrent deployments without losing thread
* Comfortable on client calls — confident, articulate, and able to translate technical complexity into plain language
* Ambitious: this role is deliberately designed as a techno\-commercial springboard for someone eyeing a top MBA programme



  





**Why This Role** 




 This is not a support function. You will have direct client exposure, own high\-stakes deployments for marquee enterprises, and develop a rare combination of technical depth and business acumen. For an engineer looking to build a compelling MBA application — or simply to grow fast in a scaling B2B product company — this is an unusually rich two\-year stint.
 



  





**Location:** 
 Navi Mumbai
 



**Reporting to:** 
 Founders / Senior Leadership

ebaa18e2.title: Digital Delivery Lead – Architecture
ebaa18e2.description:
**Job Overview** 

 We are seeking an experienced
 **Digital Delivery Lead** 
 to lead and manage the successful delivery of BIM and Digital Delivery services for complex international building projects. The ideal candidate will provide technical leadership, oversee project execution, mentor high\-performing teams, and ensure the delivery of high\-quality digital solutions aligned with global standards. This role requires strong expertise in BIM workflows, stakeholder collaboration, and team leadership while driving innovation and operational excellence across multiple projects.
 



  




**Key Responsibilities** 
* Lead Digital Delivery execution across multiple building projects.
* Manage and mentor a team of Digital Delivery Engineers.
* Plan project priorities, allocate resources, and ensure timely delivery.
* Review BIM models, coordination deliverables, and QA/QC processes.
* Drive BIM standards, workflows, and best practices across projects.
* Collaborate with global project teams to ensure seamless project execution.
* Resolve technical challenges related to BIM, coordination, and constructability.
* Monitor project schedules, risks, and delivery performance.
* Support continuous improvement initiatives and process optimization.
* Ensure high\-quality digital deliverables aligned with project requirements.



  




**Requirements** 
* Bachelor's Degree in Architecture, Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a related discipline.
* **8–12 years** 
 of experience in BIM, VDC, Digital Delivery, or Construction Technology.
* Experience leading BIM or Digital Delivery teams on complex building projects.
* Hands\-on expertise in
 **Autodesk Revit** 
 and BIM coordination workflows.
* Strong understanding of QA/QC, BIM standards, model governance, and clash detection.
* Experience working on
 **International Building Projects** 
 (US project experience preferred).
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong leadership, planning, and problem\-solving abilities.
* Candidates
 **must be based in Bengaluru** 
 .
* Experience with
 **Navisworks, Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC)/BIM 360** 
 will be an added advantage.



  




**Preferred Keywords (Skills)** 

 Digital Delivery, BIM, Revit, VDC, BIM Coordination, Navisworks, Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC), BIM 360, QA/QC, Clash Detection, BIM Standards, Construction Technology, Architecture, Engineering, Project Coordination, Team Leadership.
