56141a6b.title: Service Delivery Manager
56141a6b.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Application Support Leadership – Manage multiple application support engagements and ensure smooth day\-to\-day operations across portfolios.
* Incident \& Service Management – Lead Incident, Problem, Change, and Major Incident Management activities while ensuring SLA compliance.
* Client \& Stakeholder Management – Work closely with end clients, provide governance reporting, drive issue resolution, and maintain service quality.
* Operations \& Capacity Management – Handle project finance, resource capacity planning, demand management, and operational efficiency.
* Cross\-functional Coordination – Coordinate with development, infrastructure, and support teams to resolve production issues and drive continuous improvement.


**Your Profile**
* Overall Experience in 12\-14 Years Needed.
* Application Operations Experience – 8–10\+ years of hands\-on experience in application support and production operations.
* ITIL \& ITSM Expertise – Strong knowledge of ITIL processes, ITSM terminology, Incident/Problem/Change Management; ITIL certification preferred.
* Tools \& Governance – Experience with ITSM tools (ServiceNow, Remedy, etc.) and JIRA for tracking, reporting, and service management.
* Technical \& Analytical Skills – Strong techno\-functional background with proven experience in production support, issue analysis, and root\-cause resolution.
* Project \& Communication Skills – Experience in project finance, capacity planning, stakeholder management, client communication, and reporting. Knowledge of Java technologies (Struts, Hibernate, Spring) is an added advantage.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

8cefa851.title: Senior Program Manager — CAIO Connect
8cefa851.description:
**JOB DESCRIPTION** 




**Senior Program Manager — CAIO Connect** 




*Building the world's leading peer community for Chief AI Officers and enterprise AI leaders* 





**INITIATIVE** 




**CAIO Connect** 




**LOCATION** 




**Remote (Global)** 




**TYPE** 




**Full\-Time** 




**SENIORITY** 




**Senior / Lead** 




**FUNCTION** 




**Community \& Programs** 




**REPORTS TO** 




**Founder \& Chairman** 




**About Knowledge Networks** 





 Knowledge Networks (KN) is a global AI governance, education, and recognition organization with operations in Pune, India and Reston, Virginia. Through six flagship initiatives — spanning awards, policy intelligence, certification, fellowships, and executive communities — KN convenes the leaders shaping how artificial intelligence is governed, adopted, and trusted worldwide.
 




**About CAIO Connect** 





 CAIO Connect is KN's invitation\-only peer community and podcast for Chief AI Officers and senior enterprise AI leaders. It exists to give the executives accountable for enterprise AI a trusted, off\-the\-record space to exchange playbooks, benchmark progress, and shape the practice of responsible AI at scale. Our ambition is to make CAIO Connect the definitive global network for this emerging C\-suite role — through curated peer circles, live and virtual convenings, a flagship podcast, and members\-only programming.
 




**The Role** 





 We are hiring a
 
**Senior Program Manager** 

 to own the growth and operating rhythm of CAIO Connect. You will be the person who turns an emerging community into an indispensable institution — designing the programs, running the engagement engine, and building relationships with the most senior AI executives in the enterprise world. This is a builder's role with real ownership: you will shape the member experience end to end, from who we invite to how they stay engaged.
 




**What You'll Do** 





 ▪   
 
**Grow the community.** 

 Build and execute the membership growth strategy — identifying, attracting, and onboarding Chief AI Officers and senior enterprise AI leaders across regions and industries.
 





 ▪   
 
**Design the program portfolio.** 

 Conceive and run the slate of peer programs — roundtables, peer circles, briefings, summits, and members\-only sessions — that make CAIO Connect worth belonging to.
 





 ▪   
 
**Own engagement and retention.** 

 Build the operating rhythm that keeps members active and renewing; track engagement signals and intervene to deepen participation.
 





 ▪   
 
**Cultivate executive relationships.** 

 Serve as a trusted point of contact for senior members, understanding their priorities and translating them into programming and value.
 





 ▪   
 
**Power the podcast and content engine.** 

 Partner on the CAIO Connect podcast and thought\-leadership content — sourcing guests, shaping themes, and converting conversations into community value.
 





 ▪   
 
**Build partnerships.** 

 Develop relationships with sponsors, institutional partners, and ecosystem players that extend the community's reach and resources.
 





 ▪   
 
**Run it like an operator.** 

 Own the calendar, budget, CRM hygiene, and metrics; report on growth, engagement, and impact, and continuously improve the playbook.
 




  





**What You'll Bring** 





 ▪   
 

 8\+ years in program management, community building, executive engagement, or membership/platform growth — ideally with a senior or lead\-level track record.
 





 ▪   
 

 Demonstrated experience working with and influencing enterprise leaders and the C\-suite; you are credible and comfortable in front of senior executives.
 





 ▪   
 

 A proven record of building a community, network, or platform from early stage to scale — you have done this, not just studied it.
 





 ▪   
 

 Strong understanding of the enterprise AI landscape and the mandate of the Chief AI Officer; you can hold an informed conversation with the people you serve.
 





 ▪   
 

 Exceptional relationship, communication, and program\-design skills, with the operational discipline to run multiple workstreams remotely and on time.
 





 ▪   
 

 Self\-directed and entrepreneurial — comfortable owning ambiguous, high\-visibility outcomes in a lean, fast\-moving organization.
 




  





**Nice to Have** 





 ▪   
 

 Experience launching or scaling an executive network, peer community, or membership organization.
 





 ▪   
 

 A relevant existing network among AI, data, or technology executives.
 





 ▪   
 

 Exposure to podcasts, events, or content programs as community\-building vehicles.
 




  





**Why Join KN** 





 You will help define a brand\-new C\-suite category at a global organization at the center of the responsible\-AI movement. The role is fully remote, high\-ownership, and visible to the most senior AI leaders in the world — with a direct line to KN's founder and a mandate to build something that does not yet exist.
 




**How to Apply** 



* Submit your CV and a short note on a community, network, or program you built and grew to
 
**careers@knowledgenetworks.org** 

 with the subject line
 
*“Senior Program Manager — CAIO Connect.”* 

 Knowledge Networks is an equal\-opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds.

d981055f.title: RUN Service Delivery Manager
d981055f.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Service Delivery Management – Own end\-to\-end service operations, ensuring stable delivery, SLA compliance, and high service availability.
* Incident \& Problem Management – Lead major incidents, drive root cause analysis, problem resolution, post\-incident reviews, and preventive actions.
* Stakeholder Management – Act as the primary escalation point for clients and stakeholders, providing governance, communication, and service reporting.
* perational Governance – Monitor KPIs, service health, operational risks, compliance, and drive continuous service improvement initiatives.
* Team \& Delivery Coordination – Coordinate application, infrastructure, and support teams to ensure seamless operations and effective workload management.


**Your Profile**
* Overall Experience in 12\-14 Years Needed.
* IT Service Management (ITIL) – Strong knowledge of Incident, Problem, Change, Service Continuity, and SLA management; ITIL certification preferred.
* Service Delivery \& Operations – 8–12 years of experience in IT Operations, Service Delivery, Production Support, or Application Support environments.
* Incident \& Escalation Management – Proven experience handling critical incidents, major incident management, root cause analysis, and service restoration.
* Stakeholder \& Communication Skills – Strong client\-facing experience, escalation management, reporting, governance presentations, and customer relationship management.
* Monitoring \& Reporting Tools – Hands\-on exposure to ITSM/ticketing tools, service monitoring platforms, KPI dashboards, operational reporting, and trend analysis.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

f5baad1f.title: Credit Analysis-FIG/NBFC/ FIS (Delivery Lead/ Manager)
f5baad1f.description:
**Credit Analysis\-FIG/NBFC/ FIS (Sr. Associate/ Delivery Lead/ Manager)**




 Job Location \- Gurgaon (Work from office)
 



  





**Job Purpose**




 We are looking for a passionate, energetic resource to join the core Lending Services team. You will be part of team working as an extension to our US based client ensuring we fulfill the applicable SLAs.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities**



* Analyzing financial statement, performance and trend analysis for assessing the credit worthiness of the Banks, Insurance, NBFCs and other Financial Institution counterparties.
* Managing a portfolio of clients and handling rating assignments.
* Preparing credit reports by including profile of the counterparty, key rating considerations, credit risk assessment, CAMEL based financial analysis (including profitability, capitalization, liquidity etc).
* Analyzing the business model, identifying strengths, weakness, risks, understanding the revenue models and the corporate structure of the counterparties.
* Adhering to standard operating procedure \& policies including compliance documentation.
* Maintaining strong relationship with the client.



  





**Key Competencies**



* Strong understanding of credit principles, policies and regulations for Banks and Financial Institutions counterparties.
* Qualified Chartered Accountant or MBA Finance or CFA or M. Com or equivalent degree.
* Excellent written \& verbal communication skills and ability to build effective relationships with various stake holders.
* Ability to multi\-task independently under tight timelines and eye for details.
* 4 \-10 years relevant experience in the field of credit analysis for Financial Institution.

4d29e7fb.title: Program Manager
4d29e7fb.description:
Role Description:

About Booking Holdings


Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) is the world's leading provider of online travel and related services, provided to consumers and local partners in more than 220 countries and territories through five primary consumer\-facing brands: Booking.com, Priceline, Agoda, KAYAK and OpenTable. The mission of Booking Holdings is to make it easier for everyone to experience the world.

  



The GBS Organization provides services to the Booking Holdings Brands, which consist of Enterprise Program and Change Management, Process Excellence, and Global Process Ownership, to name a few. The GBS Organization is seeking a Program Manager to join their Enterprise Project Management team.

  

This role is pivotal in driving strategic initiatives, acting as a trusted partner to executives and stakeholders. The individual will be responsible for translating high\-level vision into actionable implementation plans, proactively identifying and mitigating risks, and ensuring successful execution through expert coordination and communication. This includes presenting program progress and strategic insights to executive leadership to inform decision\-making and foster alignment.

  

This role will be responsible for project management, directly impacting the delivery and execution of various strategic programs and solution deployments underpinning this transformation, by ensuring that projects are clearly defined (scope, time, cost, and resources), tracked and controlled through their lifecycle, and appropriately reported and communicated per existing governance processes. Additional responsibilities may include facilitating Finance process design workshops to identify current state issues and future state objectives.


Experience with transitioning decentralized finance and accounting activities from various geographical locations into a shared service center is a plus.

 **Key Responsibilities**

* Project Manage and Articulate complex ideas clearly and concisely, both verbally and in writing, to a variety of audiences, from technical teams to C\-suite executives.
* Influence decisions and gain buy\-in from stakeholders without direct authority.
* Lead group discussions, workshops, and meetings to drive consensus and collaborative problem\-solving.
* Demonstrate capacity to see the big picture, connect disparate ideas, and translate high\-level business goals into actionable plans, including anticipating future challenges and opportunities.
* Possess superior strategic thinking and analytical capabilities, with a proven ability to translate complex business problems into actionable strategic solutions.
* Exhibit exceptional leadership, influence, and negotiation skills, with the ability to drive consensus across diverse stakeholder groups.

**Knowledge Skills \& Abilities**

* Bachelors degree and above; 15\+ years of experience, EMEA shift (Hybrid)
* Travel Experience a plus
* Asia Market Experience a plus
* PMP Certification a plus
* SmartSheet knowledge a plus
* Jira knowledge a plus
* Google Suite knowledge a plus

904aad35.title: Technical Program Manager (Telemetry & Data Centre Controls)
904aad35.description:
Job Title: Technical Program Manager (Telemetry \& Data Centre Controls)
   

 Location: India / Singapore (Remote)
   

 Duration: 12 Months (Contract, with possible extension)
   

 Job Summary
   

 We are looking for an experienced Technical Program Manager (TPM) to lead the end\-to\-end onboarding and integration of telemetry solutions and Building Automation Systems (BAS) across enterprise data center environments in the APAC region. The ideal candidate will drive large\-scale technical programs, coordinate with cross\-functional engineering teams, external vendors, and lease providers, ensuring successful deployment of telemetry and industrial control systems.
   

 Key Responsibilities
   

 Lead end\-to\-end delivery of telemetry onboarding and BAS integration across multiple data center projects.
   

 Manage project scope, schedules, risks, dependencies, and milestones across multiple countries.
   

 Coordinate with internal engineering teams, lease providers, BAS vendors, and external stakeholders.
   

 Oversee design, engineering, testing, commissioning, and deployment of telemetry and BAS solutions.
   

 Drive program governance, executive reporting, status tracking, and risk management.
   

 Track program KPIs including telemetry coverage, onboarding progress, timelines, and delivery metrics.
   

 Identify process gaps and establish scalable onboarding frameworks and best practices.
   

 Ensure successful execution of data center commissioning activities and system validation.
   

 Required Qualifications
   

 5\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management or Technical Project Management.
   

 Experience managing large\-scale Data Center, IoT, Industrial Controls, or Telemetry programs.
   

 Strong stakeholder management and vendor coordination skills.
   

 Experience delivering projects across the APAC region is preferred.
   

 Excellent communication, planning, and organizational skills.
   

 Technical Skills
   

 MQTT and Device\-to\-Cloud Telemetry.
   

 Azure Event Hub or similar Event Streaming platforms.
   

 Building Automation Systems (BAS).
   

 Data Center Commissioning (L1–L5\).
   

 Industrial Control Systems.
   

 Risk Management and Program Governance.
   

 Preferred Qualifications
   

 Experience in Data Center or Critical Environment projects.
   

 Exposure to Telemetry and IoT ecosystems.
   

 PMP or equivalent Project Management certification.
   

 Experience managing multi\-country programs.
   

 Desired Candidate Profile
   

 Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills.
   

 Ability to manage multiple concurrent projects.
   

 Excellent problem\-solving and decision\-making abilities.
   

 Comfortable working with globally distributed teams and external vendors.
   

 Self\-driven with a strong ownership mindset.
   

 Employment Type
   

 Contract – 12 Months (Extension Possible)
   

 Remote (India/Singapore)

50a6b8cc.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, RBS Tech - DIQ
50a6b8cc.description:
**Description**
 Drive transformative technical programs that solve complex retail challenges by bridging science, data engineering, and business operations at Amazon scale. You'll own end\-to\-end delivery of ML/AI\-powered solutions that impact billions in gross merchandise sales and hundreds of millions of customers worldwide, while collaborating with Applied Science, Data Engineering, Finance, and Retail leadership across the organization.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Lead end\-to\-end technical program delivery across ML/AI development, data pipeline architecture, and science\-driven solutions that address critical retail challenges including catalog enrichment, defect root\-cause analysis, cost allocation, and profitability modeling
   

  

 Partner across retail organizations to identify customer problems, define technical solutions, and deliver measurable improvements in collaboration with Selection, Supply Chain, Category, and Marketplace teams
   

  

 Serve as technical liaison between Applied Science, Data Engineering, and Business teams, translating business requirements into technical specifications and ensuring models are production\-ready for scale
   

  

 Drive architecture and system design discussions that evaluate trade\-offs and ensure solutions support scalability, reliability, and cost\-efficiency across large\-scale retail operations
   

  

 Manage cross\-functional dependencies and competing priorities across Science, Engineering, Finance, Operations, and Retail organizations, driving alignment at executive leadership levels and implementing risk mitigations
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 As a Senior Technical Program Manager in Retail Business Services, you'll navigate the intersection of machine learning innovation and retail operations. Your day might include facilitating a design discussion with our Applied Science team to evaluate trade\-offs in a new catalog enrichment model, then pivoting to align cross\-functional stakeholders on data pipeline architecture for supply chain defect elimination. You'll translate complex technical requirements into clear specifications, work with Data Engineering to ensure models are production\-ready, and build measurement frameworks that quantify business impact. You'll also prepare executive narratives for leadership forums, manage competing priorities across multiple retail organizations, and identify risks early to keep large\-scale programs on track. Throughout it all, you're solving problems that directly affect how millions of products are discovered and purchased by customers globally.
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are a team of technical leaders and builders focused on scaling Amazon's retail operations through intelligent automation. Our mission is to ensure that Amazon's catalog is complete, correct, and comprehensive—enabling customers to find exactly what they need every time. We work at the intersection of science, data, and retail business, tackling challenges that span catalog quality, inventory optimization, cost allocation, and supply chain efficiency.
   

  

 Our team collaborates closely with Applied Science, Data Engineering, Finance, Operations, and Retail organizations worldwide. We operate with visibility into senior leadership forums, giving us the opportunity to influence strategy at the highest levels. We're looking for someone who thrives in this complex, multi\-stakeholder environment and can translate ambiguous problems into clear technical solutions. If you're energized by working on problems that impact billions of dollars in business value and hundreds of millions of customers, this is the place for you.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership
* Experience managing cross\-functional programs and release schedules


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- BLR 14 SEZ \- F07
   

  

 Job ID: A10472117

155a94da.title: Principal Solution Consultant
155a94da.description:
**India \- Bangalore**

Go To Market/Full time/Hybrid

  

As a Principal Solution Consultant for India, you will be the senior functional and technical strategist guiding Guidewire’s go‑to‑market motion with Indian P\&C insurers. You’ll own critical pursuits end‑to‑end, shape localized solutions across our cloud platform, and act as a trusted advisor to regional leadership and customers. This hybrid role is based in Bengaluru.  

  

You will translate complex Indian regulatory, payments, and ecosystem needs into compelling, executable solutions on Guidewire’s platform. You will lead consultative discovery, craft differentiated win strategies against local competitors, and provide the “technical air cover” required to secure lighthouse customers. In doing so, you will help transform how India’s P\&C insurers operate, directly advancing Guidewire’s mission to combine digital, core, analytics, and AI to power the future of insurance in the region
Job Description
Role Overview
Guidewire’s Go to Market organization is focused on scaling AI‑powered innovation, expanding into new markets and product categories, and ensuring every customer is successful and referenceable through structured, data‑driven execution and tight cross‑functional alignment.
As a Principal Solution Consultant, you sit at the intersection of this vision and our India growth strategy, serving as the senior field‑facing authority on how Guidewire’s platform, cloud services, and ecosystem can unlock value for Indian insurers.
Operating as a key member of the regional GTM leadership team, you will design and execute market‑entry and expansion plays for India, partnering closely with Sales, Professional Services, Product, and our partner ecosystem. You will champion local market needs back into our global roadmap while coaching and scaling an India‑based Solution Consulting team. This is a high‑impact, highly visible role for someone who is equally comfortable in the boardroom, on customer sites, and in the details of complex insurance workflows.  

What You’ll Do
GTM Strategy \& Market Penetration
Partner with Regional Sales Leadership to refine and execute the India penetration plan, aligning with GTM’s broader priorities around AI‑powered innovation, product‑category expansion (such as Pricing/Rating and Underwriting), and international market growth.
Identify high‑propensity Indian targets and customer segments, define regional “Win Themes,” and tailor global sales and solution playbooks for the Indian regulatory, product, and distribution landscape.
Translate GTM packaging, pricing, and adoption strategies into field‑ready value propositions and deal tactics for India, ensuring alignment with global objectives for cloud and AI adoption and measurable customer value.

Strategic Market \& Product Discovery
Conduct “boots‑on‑the‑ground” discovery with Indian insurers to surface functional and regulatory gaps versus Guidewire’s out‑of‑the‑box capabilities, including IRDAI‑specific compliance workflows, India‑specific product constructs, UPI‑enabled real‑time claims payments, localized Health and Motor flows, and Health TPA models.
Analyze trends across discovery engagements to distinguish one‑off asks from recurring India‑market themes, and feed structured insights into Product, Professional Services, and GTM leadership to inform regional content and solution strategy.
  

Competitive Intelligence \& Positioning
Build and continuously update detailed competitive battlecards for India, focusing on local core‑system incumbents, cloud/InsurTech competitors, and in‑house legacy platforms.
Identify architectural and operational weaknesses in competitor stacks—such as monolithic cores, limited configurability, lack of AI/analytics, or brittle integrations—and convert these into clear differentiation narratives and objection‑handling strategies for the field.
Design and deliver enablement sessions that raise GTM and Professional Services fluency in competitive positioning, supporting the broader GTM objective of establishing Guidewire as the leader in pricing, underwriting, and AI‑infused workflows.

End‑to‑End Deal Ownership
Lead the functional sales cycle from early discovery through final selection, including RFI/RFP leadership, solution workshops, product demonstrations, and alignment of technical and commercial considerations.
Partner with Account Executives to shape opportunity strategy, orchestrate internal stakeholders (Product, Professional Services, Security, Legal), and ensure that customer success, time‑to‑value, and long‑term adoption are clearly articulated—reflecting Guidewire’s company‑wide focus on measurable customer outcomes.
Provide credible “technical air cover” during negotiations and executive reviews by addressing risk, scalability, integration patterns, and roadmap questions with transparency and depth.
  

Consultative Discovery \& Solution Design
Uncover the “pain behind the pain” in prospects’ current environments, including rigid legacy codebases, fragmented data, slow speed‑to‑market for new products, high cost of change, and limited AI enablement.
Design target‑state solutions on Guidewire’s cloud platform that span core, digital, analytics, AI, and ecosystem integrations, ensuring functional completeness, regulatory alignment, and clear migration paths.
Co‑create robust, quantified business cases that link Guidewire’s offerings to strategic outcomes such as reduced implementation effort and time, accelerated cloud adoption, improved operational efficiency, and enhanced customer experience—outcomes that are central to Professional Services and GTM priorities.

Product Localization \& India Advocacy
Aggregate recurring India‑specific requirements and propose a prioritized India roadmap to Global Product Management, aligned with broader Product and PDO strategies around regional content, AI infusion, and new product categories.
Influence packaging, content, and reference architectures for India to ensure that regulatory, language, data‑residency, and ecosystem needs—such as India Stack, UPI, and Aadhaar‑linked KYC—are thoughtfully addressed in our platform and solutions.
  

Ecosystem Integration \& Experience Design
Collaborate with the Guidewire Marketplace team and local partners to design and demonstrate a frictionless Indian insurance experience, including integrations with:
India Stack components (e‑KYC, e‑Sign, and related services)
UPI and local payment gateways for real‑time premium and claims flows
Third‑party data providers, TPAs, aggregators, risk‑scoring engines, and AI‑driven fraud‑detection services
Help systematize services‑led innovation into repeatable offerings by documenting solution patterns, reference architectures, and reusable assets for India, in line with Professional Services’ goal to industrialize repeatable, AI‑enabled offerings that cut implementation effort by 50% and time by 30%.

Field Leadership \& Team Development
Act as the primary technical and functional advisor to the Regional Sales Director and Managing Director for India, contributing to territory plans, lighthouse‑account strategies, and executive‑level engagements.
Mentor and coach India‑based Solution Consultants on advanced storytelling, competitive positioning, discovery techniques, and executive presence, supporting the GTM VPMOM focus on building a scalable enablement engine for new products and markets.
Foster a culture of inclusive collaboration and continuous improvement that reflects Guidewire’s emphasis on determination, collaboration, continuous learning, and bravery in how we show up for our customers and each other.

Cross‑Functional Collaboration \& Mission Impact
Work closely with Professional Services to ensure proposed solutions are implementable, cost‑effective, and aligned with the services organization’s ambitions to revolutionize services execution, leverage AI and automation, and scale to a profitable, high‑growth portfolio.
Contribute field insights to Product, PDO, and Security teams on India‑specific compliance, data‑governance expectations, and platform requirements, supporting the broader company mission to deliver secure, scalable, AI‑enabled cloud solutions globally.
Help bring Guidewire’s mission—transforming how the world’s P\&C insurers do business through cloud, digital, analytics, and AI—to life in the Indian market by turning strategy into practical, high‑impact customer outcomes and referenceable success stories.

What We’re Looking For
Extensive experience in solution consulting, sales engineering, transformation consulting, or product‑led presales within P\&C insurance or closely related financial services.
Deep understanding of Indian P\&C insurance processes (such as policy administration, claims, and billing), IRDAI regulatory context, and common ecosystem integrations across payments, TPAs, aggregators, and data providers.
Demonstrated success leading complex, multi‑stakeholder deal cycles end‑to‑end, including RFI/RFP ownership, executive‑level presentations, and alignment of business and technology decision‑makers.
Strong architectural literacy across modern cloud platforms, APIs, integrations, and data/analytics, with familiarity in AI‑enabled insurance use cases and data‑driven decision‑making.
Proven ability to craft compelling narratives that connect technology and AI‑powered innovation to measurable business value, simplifying complex concepts for diverse audiences.
Experience influencing product direction or localization strategies based on structured market feedback, including regulatory requirements and regional feature gaps.
Track record of mentoring or leading solution consulting or similar presales teams, with a collaborative, inclusive approach to leadership and talent development.
Comfort operating in a highly cross‑functional, global environment, with the curiosity, courage, and commitment to learn continuously, embrace change, and challenge the status quo.

Why Guidewire
Guidewire is a global leader in cloud platforms for P\&C insurers, combining digital, core, analytics, and AI to help customers modernize and thrive in a rapidly changing industry.
In India, we are investing for the long term, offering access to cutting‑edge projects, trusted leadership, and a culture where growth is d and shaped by the people we work with and the experiences we create together.
You will join a team that values inclusive culture, career‑path clarity, leadership you can trust, and meaningful, mission‑driven work—factors that our people see as core strengths of Guidewire India.
Here, you can build a career that blends deep industry impact with innovation, helping redefine what’s possible for insurance across India and beyond while contributing directly to Guidewire’s purpose of transforming how the world’s P\&C insurers do business.
Interested in this position?
  
About Guidewire
Guidewire is the platform P\&C insurers trust to engage, innovate, and grow efficiently. We combine digital, core, analytics, and AI to deliver our platform as a cloud service. More than 540\+ insurers in 40 countries, from new ventures to the largest and most complex in the world, run on Guidewire.
As a partner to our customers, we continually evolve to enable their success. We are proud of our unparalleled implementation track record with 1600\+ successful projects, supported by the largest R\&D team and partner ecosystem in the industry. Our Marketplace provides hundreds of applications that accelerate integration, localization, and innovation.
For more information, please visit www.guidewire.com and follow us on Twitter: @Guidewire\_PandC.
Guidewire Software, Inc. is proud to be an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer. We are committed to an inclusive workplace, and believe that a diversity of perspectives, abilities, and cultures is a key to our success. Qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, citizenship, marital status, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, veteran status, or disability. All offers are contingent upon passing a criminal history and other background checks where it's applicable to the position.

cb5798dd.title: Presales Engineer
cb5798dd.description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Aruba** 
 is an HPE Company, and a leading provider of next\-generation network access solutions for the mobile enterprise. Helping some of the largest companies in the world modernize their networks to meet the demands of a digital future, Aruba is redefining the “Intelligent Edge” – and creating new customer experiences across intelligent spaces and digital workspaces. Join us redefine what’s next for you.
   

  

**Job Family Definition**
 Responsible for providing technical support and/or leadership in the creation and delivery of technology solutions designed to meet a customer’s business needs. Creates and maintains effective customer relationships to secure customer satisfaction. Provides the deepest level of product\- and technology\-specific expertise available to customers from anyone in the sales organization in deal pursuit situations. Aligned to specific products or product\-lines.
   

  

 The Consulting Systems Engineer is also a subject matter expert in their area of specialization (i.e., Mobility, Security, Branch, etc), responsible for consulting customers on end to end technical designs to meet their business need.
   

  

 These jobs focus on selling to customers, typically through work that occurs outside HPE offices.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Contributions include applying intermediate level of subject matter expertise to solve common technical problems. Acts as an informed team member providing analysis of information and recommendations for appropriate action. Works independently within an established framework and with moderate supervision.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Provide technical guidance and leadership in designing networking solutions aligned to customer business needs.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor in deal pursuits, offering the deepest product and technology expertise within the sales organization.
* Design end\-to\-end network architectures across domains such as AIOps, Campus (Wired/Wireless), SASE, Data Center, or Routing.
* Deliver technical presentations, demos, and customer workshops to create value throughout the sales cycle.
* Partner with Account Managers and cross\-functional stakeholders to translate customer problem statements into impactful solutions.
* Influence long\-term customer network transformation aligned with business outcomes.
* Support RFP/RFI responses, solution positioning, competitive differentiation, and proof\-of\-concept engagements.
* Build and maintain strong customer relationships to drive technology thought leadership.
* Mentor junior team members and contribute to cross\-functional initiatives where required.


**What You Need To Bring**
* 4\-7 years of experience in Networking, Presales, or Solution Consulting roles.
* Experience working with Government, BFSI and Enterprise customers is mandatory.
* Must have hands\-on experience in handling and managing tenders.
* Strong expertise in at least one or more networking domains:
+ AIOps
+ Campus Networking (Wired/Wireless)
+ SASE
+ Data Center Networking
+ Routing \& Switching

* Proven experience designing end\-to\-end enterprise network architectures.
* Strong customer\-facing experience with executive\-level communication skills.
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts into business outcomes.
* Experience supporting large enterprise deal pursuits and working alongside sales teams.
* Demonstrated ability to operate independently and exercise sound technical judgment.
* Strong problem\-solving skills with the ability to handle complex business scenarios.
* Preferred: Relevant industry certifications (Aruba, Cisco, SASE, Cloud, etc.).


**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

**Job**
 Sales

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**
 We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat\-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.
   

  

 All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

a5dc3343.title: Solution Architect (ISG)
a5dc3343.description:
**Job Summary**
 This hybrid Solution Architect ISG role focuses on designing secure and scalable platforms using XCTest FIS OPF Java and micro services for complex financial solutions. The role requires 12 to 16 years of experience and close collaboration with cross functional teams to deliver resilient systems for cards and payments supporting reliable digital transactions.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design scalable solution architectures that leverage XCTest FIS OPF Java and micro services to deliver resilient and maintainable enterprise applications for financial services clients
* Translate complex business requirements into well structured technical designs that align with organizational standards and industry best practices for reliability and performance
* Define micro services boundaries integration patterns and data flows that optimize modularity reuse and operational efficiency in large scale distributed systems
* Collaborate with developers testers and infrastructure teams to ensure architectures are implemented accurately and remain aligned with non functional requirements such as security and scalability
* Create detailed solution design documents covering component interactions deployment topologies and integration touchpoints to provide clear guidance for implementation teams
* Review existing application landscapes built with FIS OPF Java and associated frameworks to identify modernization opportunities using micro services and automated testing practices
* Establish coding testing and integration standards that promote consistent quality including structured use of XCTest for automated test coverage across critical services
* Guide performance tuning and optimization of micro services based architectures by analyzing logs metrics and tracing data to proactively address bottlenecks and failure points
* Coordinate with security and compliance stakeholders to embed secure design principles data protection measures and regulatory requirements into all solution architectures
* Engage with product owners and business analysts to validate that proposed solutions address user needs while remaining feasible within technical and budgetary constraints
* Provide technical oversight during key project milestones ensuring that critical design decisions technology choices and integration approaches remain aligned with target architecture
* Develop reference implementations and proof of concept solutions that demonstrate the effective use of XCTest FIS OPF Java and micro services for complex transaction processing scenarios
* Document architectural decisions rationale and tradeoffs in a clear and accessible manner enabling long term maintainability and knowledge sharing across teams


**Qualifications**
* Possess 12 to 16 years of progressive experience in solution design and development with a strong track record of delivering enterprise grade applications in complex environments
* Demonstrate advanced proficiency in FIS OPF Java based platforms including configuration customization and integration for large financial or transactional systems
* Exhibit hands on experience with micro services design patterns containerization concepts and distributed system design focused on scalability fault tolerance and observability
* Show strong capability using XCTest or similar frameworks to design automated unit and integration tests that support continuous integration and continuous delivery practices
* Bring practical understanding of cards and payments domain concepts such as authorization clearing settlement and fraud controls to design solutions that meet industry needs
* Display solid analytical and problem solving skills with the capacity to diagnose complex issues across multiple layers including application integration and infrastructure
* Communicate effectively with technical and non technical stakeholders through clear written documentation structured presentations and collaborative working sessions
* Maintain familiarity with hybrid working models demonstrating discipline in remote collaboration tools documentation practices and coordination across geographically dispersed teams

cabea4a1.title: Solutions Architect – Enterprise AI  | (Multi-Agent Workflow Orchestration)
cabea4a1.description:
**AI/ML Solutions Architect (Agentic Systems)**

 Bengaluru (Hybrid)
 



**Experience** 
 : 12\+ Years
 



  





**About Neuron7\.ai :**

 **Agentic AI platforms** 
 that combine Large Language Models (LLMs), Multi\-Agent Systems, enterprise knowledge, and intelligent workflow automation.
 



 If you're excited about moving beyond AI prototypes and deploying autonomous AI systems that create measurable business impact, this is the opportunity for you.

Our platform combines Agentic AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), enterprise knowledge, and workflow automation to help organizations solve complex service and operational challenges faster and more accurately.
 



 As enterprises transition from traditional software to AI\-powered autonomous systems, Neuron7\.ai is leading the next wave of innovation through Multi\-Agent architectures, intelligent orchestration, and enterprise\-scale AI deployments.

* Architect scalable AI workflows that integrate with enterprise systems, APIs, and business processes.

 in enterprise environments.

 implementing AI/ML, Generative AI, or Agentic AI solutions in production.

 **Multi\-Agent Systems** 
 , AI workflows, and enterprise AI applications.

 , APIs, data architecture, and workflow orchestration.

**Company Perks \& Benefits**

**Our Commitment to Diversity \& Inclusion** 




 Neuron7\.ai is committed to fostering an inclusive workplace and providing equal opportunities regardless of race, religion, gender, disability, age, sexual orientation, or any legally protected characteristic.
 



 If you’re passionate about

f577320a.title: Staff Solutions Architect, Banking - India
f577320a.description:
**About Us**
 Temporal is an open source programming model that can simplify code, make applications more reliable, and help developers focus on the important things like delivering features faster. We are on a mission to be the reliable foundation of every developer’s toolbox, and are building the team that will make that happen.
   

  

 Our values guide us —they are present in how we show up, make decisions, and work together to make an impact. We’re curious, driven, collaborative, genuine and humble.
   

  

 Temporal is growing and we are looking for those who share our values, challenge 'standard' thinking, and want to influence our future. If you have a passion for improving the developer experience, building world\-class open\-source software and communities, and want to be a part of our amazing team, we'd love to hear from you!
   

  

 The Staff Solutions Architect is Temporal's primary customer\-facing technical leader within the
 **Banking team,** 
 with a focus on the
 **APJ (India)** 
 region. In this crucial role, you’ll work directly with prospects and customers, guiding them in understanding the suitability of their applications for Temporal’s platform and showcasing the technical advantages of our cloud service. Your contribution is vital in positioning Temporal against alternative technologies, helping customer engineering teams expand production applications using Temporal, and owning the technical relationship with key decision\-makers. Your role is integral to our success.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Collaborate with prospects to determine if their applications fit Temporal’s platform well.
* Educate customers and prospects on the technical benefits and limitations of Temporal’s platform and cloud service.
* Position Temporal as a leading solution against competing technologies and architectural patterns.
* Foster an environment within customer engineering organizations to increase the adoption and expansion of Temporal in production environments.
* Partner closely with Account Executives to develop and execute comprehensive account plans.
* Manage and nurture relationships with technical decision\-makers within customer organizations, ensuring they fully leverage Temporal’s capabilities.


**What You’ll Bring**
* Reside within Bangalore, India.
* Exceptional technical communication skills, including presenting, whiteboarding, and writing.
* Deep understanding of distributed system technologies, design principles, and best practices.
* Proficiency in building application prototypes and providing design, development, build, and deployment guidance using one or more of Temporal’s supported languages: Java, Golang, TypeScript, Python, C\# or PHP.
* Firm grasp of operational considerations in production environments, such as security, reliability, performance, cost management, and operations.
* Ability to provide insightful advice on architectural topics, including application patterns and platform architectures.
* Experience with at least one major cloud provider and familiarity with commonly used application development and production services.
* Serve as a strategic technical advisor to Sales Account Executives, assisting with scoping and sizing opportunities and offering guidance on technical fit and challenges.


**Nice to Haves**
* Prior experience with FinTech and/or FinServe.
* Likes to learn new technical topics, often directly from Engineering
* Can come up to speed without any sales\-specific training (i.e., from docs, videos \& conversations)
* Partners well with engineers working at customer organizations


**Compensation**
 The estimated pay range for this role is
 **₹8,000,000** 
 \-
 **₹10,000,000**
 This is a base salary and variable role with a 70/30 split.
   

  

*Compensation ranges reflect salary and commission compensation (when applicable) across several geographic markets. Employment offers carefully consider multiple factors, including prior experience, knowledge, expertise, skillset, market location, and job level assessed during the interview process.*
*Employee benefits and perks below are for full\-time employees, part\-time or temporary positions are excluded.*
**U.S. Benefits**
* Unlimited PTO, 12 Holidays \+ 2 Floating Holidays
* 100% Premiums Coverage for Medical, Dental, and Vision
* AD\&D, LT \& ST Disability, and Life Insurance (Standard \& Supplemental Available)
* Empower 401K Plan
* Additional Perks for Learning \& Development, Lifestyle Spending, In\-Home Office Setup, Professional Memberships, WFH Meals, Internet Stipend and more!


**International Benefits**
 Paid Time Off (PTO) and Benefits outside the United States vary by country, and are issued in partnership with Remote.com. Additionally, Temporal offers perks to all international employees for learning \& career development, a lifestyle spending account, in\-home office setup (in addition to company\-issued hardware), professional memberships, work\-from\-home meals, and access to the Calm app for mental wellness.
   

  

**Travel**
 Temporal is a globally distributed, collaborative team that values opportunities for in\-person connection. Occasional travel may be required for company events, team offsites, and other meaningful moments that bring us together.
   

  

**Additional Perks**
* $3,600 / Year Work from Home Meals
* $1,800 / Year Professional Enrichment (Career Development \& Professional Memberships)
* $1,200 / Year Lifestyle Spending Account
* $1,000 / Year In\-Home Office Setup (In addition to Temporal issued equipment \- laptop, monitor, keyboard, mouse, trackpad, and extension power cable at no cost to you)
* $74 / Month Reimbursement for Internet
* Calm App Subscription for Mental Health \& Wellness


*Temporal Technologies is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Temporal Technologies does not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, non\-disqualifying physical or mental disability, national origin, veteran status, or any other basis covered by appropriate law. All employment is decided on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. We embrace and celebrate differences and diversity.*
*Temporal is committed to providing access, equal opportunity, and reasonable accommodation for individuals with disabilities in employment, its services, programs, and activities. If you need to request a reasonable accommodation, please let your Recruiter know so we can assist.*
*We are not working with external recruitment agencies, thanks.*

6fe7a291.title: Lead Data Engineer / Data Architect
6fe7a291.description:
**Driven by the passion to improve quality of people’s lives, WSA continues to grow as market leader in the hearing aid industry. With our commitment to increase penetration in an underserved hearing care market, we want to accelerate our business transformation in order to reach more people, more effectively.**


We're looking for a **Lead Data Engineer** to define the technical direction of our Azure data platform while remaining hands\-on in engineering delivery. You'll drive platform architecture, establish engineering standards, mentor Data Engineers, and deliver scalable, governed, and AI\-ready data products that enable trusted business insights.

**What you will do**
--------------------

* **Platform architecture \& technical standards**


	+ Define and evolve the enterprise data platform architecture and roadmap.
	+ Establish Lakehouse standards, data contracts, engineering best practices, and architecture governance.
	+ Make key technology decisions, document architectural decisions (ADRs), and lead design reviews.
* **Hands\-on engineering delivery**


	+ Build reusable frameworks, reference implementations, and critical data pipelines.
	+ Lead code reviews and promote engineering quality, maintainability, and performance.
	+ Drive technical excellence through hands\-on implementation and mentoring.
* **Data modelling \& data product ownership**


	+ Design conceptual, logical, and physical data models.
	+ Own the lifecycle of enterprise data products from design through retirement.
	+ Define data product standards, certification levels, schema conventions, and Gold layer datasets.
* **Governance, compliance \& AI/ML readiness**


	+ Establish data governance, metadata, lineage, and data contract standards.
	+ Ensure compliance with security, privacy, and regulatory requirements.
	+ Design data platform capabilities that support AI/ML and advanced analytics.
* **Technical leadership \& collaboration**


	+ Provide technical leadership and mentoring to Data Engineers.
	+ Partner with Systems Analysts and business stakeholders to deliver scalable solutions.
	+ Foster engineering best practices and a culture of continuous improvement.

**What you bring**
------------------

### **Experience**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field (Master's preferred).
* 8\+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Data Architecture, or Analytics Engineering.
* Proven experience designing and delivering enterprise\-scale cloud data platforms.
* Strong background leading technical architecture, engineering delivery, and implementation teams.
* Experience working with data governance, compliance, and modern data product operating models.

### **Technical skills**

* Expert knowledge of Azure Databricks, Apache Spark, Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2, and Delta Lake.
* Strong expertise in Medallion Architecture, data modelling, and enterprise data platform design.
* Advanced Python and SQL skills.
* Experience with Databricks Workflows, Databricks Asset Bundles, Azure DevOps, CI/CD, and Infrastructure as Code (Bicep or equivalent).
* Knowledge of Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Entra ID, Azure Key Vault, Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, and data governance frameworks.

### **Personal competencies**

* Strategic thinker with a systems approach to platform architecture.
* Balances technical excellence with pragmatic delivery.
* Leads through hands\-on expertise and technical credibility.
* Communicates effectively with engineers and business stakeholders.
* Champions governance, quality, and engineering best practices.

#### **Who we are**

**At WSA, we provide innovative hearing aids and hearing health services.**

**Together with our 12,000 colleagues in 130 countries, we invite you to help unlock human potential by bringing back hearing for millions of people around the world.**

**With us, you will become part of a truly global company where we care for one another, welcome diversity and celebrate our successes.**

**Sounds wonderful? We can't wait to hear from you.**

 ***WSA is an equal\-opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive employee experience for all. Regardless of race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, ancestry, disability, military or veteran status we firmly believe that our work is at its best when everyone feels free to be their most authentic self.***

01a3b791.title: Solution Architect
01a3b791.description:
**Driven by the passion to improve quality of people’s lives, WSA continues to grow as market leader in the hearing aid industry. With our commitment to increase penetration in an underserved hearing care market, we want to accelerate our business transformation in order to reach more people, more effectively.**


We are looking for a **Solution Architect** to lead the design and implementation of scalable, secure, and maintainable enterprise solutions across our digital platforms. This role will provide architectural leadership across multiple products and engineering teams, ensuring that solutions align with enterprise standards, business objectives, and long\-term technology strategy.

**What you will do**
--------------------

* Design scalable, secure, resilient, and maintainable solution architectures across products and platforms.
* Produce architecture artifacts, technical specifications, solution design documents, and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).
* Translate business and functional requirements into well\-defined technical solutions and implementation approaches.
* Lead architecture reviews and governance activities, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture principles and technical standards.
* Identify, assess, and mitigate architectural risks across projects and workstreams.
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Engineering Managers, DevOps, Security teams, and business stakeholders to shape technology solutions.
* Provide technical guidance and mentorship to engineering teams, Technical Leads, and senior developers.
* Establish reusable architecture patterns, frameworks, reference implementations, and technical standards.
* Design cloud\-native solutions leveraging Microsoft Azure services and modern application architecture practices.
* Define application, data, integration, deployment, and API architectures.
* Support engineering teams in adopting best practices around scalability, security, observability, and maintainability.
* Drive technical modernization initiatives, architecture consistency, and reduction of technical debt.
* Contribute to engineering planning, roadmap development, and technical decision\-making processes.

**What you bring**
------------------

### **Experience**

* 12\+ years of software engineering experience.
* Minimum 5 years of experience in Solution Architecture or Technical Architecture roles.
* Proven experience designing enterprise\-scale applications using Microsoft technologies.
* Strong experience working in Agile software development environments.
* Experience providing architectural leadership across multiple engineering teams.

### **Technical Skills**

* Strong expertise in Microsoft Azure cloud architecture and modern application design.
* Experience designing solutions using:


	+ C\#
	+ .NET / ASP.NET Core
	+ ReactJS
	+ REST APIs
	+ Microservices
	+ Event\-driven architectures
	+ Distributed systems
* Strong understanding of:


	+ Domain\-Driven Design (DDD)
	+ SOLID Principles
	+ Clean Architecture
	+ API\-first Design
	+ High Availability and Disaster Recovery concepts
* Experience defining architecture standards, governance frameworks, and reusable design patterns.
* Knowledge of enterprise integration patterns and API governance.

### **Preferred Qualifications**

* Microsoft Azure certifications (AZ\-305, AZ\-204, AZ\-400\).
* Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration platforms.
* Experience with SaaS platforms and multi\-tenant architectures.
* Familiarity with AI\-assisted development tools and cloud\-native modernization initiatives.

### **Personal Competencies**

* Strong architectural and strategic thinking abilities.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management capabilities.
* Proven mentoring and technical coaching skills.
* Ability to influence technical direction across multiple teams and functions.
* Customer\-focused mindset with a strong emphasis on quality, scalability, and continuous improvement.

**Who we are**
--------------


At WSA, we provide innovative hearing aids and hearing health services.


Together with our 12,000 colleagues in 130 countries, we invite you to help unlock human potential by bringing back hearing for millions of people around the world.


With us, you will become part of a truly global company where we care for one another, welcome diversity and celebrate our successes.

**Sounds wonderful? We can't wait to hear from you.**


WSA is an equal\-opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive employee experience for all. Regardless of race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, ancestry, disability, military or veteran status we firmly believe that our work is at its best when everyone feels free to be their most authentic self.
