dfb4215f.title: Solutions Architect - SSE
dfb4215f.description:
**About Us** 




 Versa Networks, Inc., is a leading vendor of next\-generation Software\-Defined solutions and architectures, called SASE (Secure Access Service Edge). Versa is providing an end\-to\-end solution that simplifies and secures the WAN/branch office network.
 



  





 Versa Networks aims to provide unprecedented business advantages through a software\-based approach that allows for unmatched agility, cost savings and flexibility. We have created a feature\-rich, scalable, yet simple\-to\-use software platform to implement many different enterprise and service provider use cases, including:
 



  




* Entire software\-defined branch for enterprise customers.
* Secure SD\-WAN and SASE for enterprises with layered security.
* Next\-generation managed services for service providers.



  





 We are looking for a passionate, entrepreneurial, and tech\-savvy Solution Architect to help our customers and partners evaluate, adopt and expand the use of our technology.
 



  





**Educational Qualification** 




 Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer science, Electronics, and Computer Application.
 



 Note: qualification is not a selection condition.
 



  





**Experience** 




 We are looking for engineers with at least eight years of relevant industry experience (Multiple positions open for varying experience levels).
 



  





**Job Responsibilities** 




  




* Evangelize technical leadership to our customers and partners.
* Provide architectural design services for state\-of\-art SDWAN/SASE deployments, including HLD/LLD documentation.
* Perform hands\-on tests to validate customer proof\-of\-concept setups for Versa security product designs and deployments.
* Provide Professional Services on an assignment basis to strategic customers.
* Author whitepapers, knowledgebase articles, and other customer/partner\-facing content.



  





**Essential Skills** 




  




* Well\-versed in SDWAN design, deployment, and migrations.
* Proven work experience with solutions around Information Security, Remote Access Security, Web Security, and Endpoint Security (XDR, EDR, etc)
* Operational knowledge of next\-gen firewalls/UTMs, IDS/IPS and malware prevention systems
* Thorough understanding of the latest security principles, techniques, and protocols
* Proven work experience working with solutions around ZTNA, DLP, CASB, RBI, andUEBA.
* Prior experience in Routing and Switching.
* Knowledge of Linux administration.
* Shell scripting, python scripting knowledge.



  





**Desired Skills** 




  




* Experience in planning and designing or operating service providers or large enterprise security tools.
* In\-depth understanding of TCP/IP protocol stack and operation.
* Experience in configuration and troubleshooting network sand security appliances.
* Certifications like CEH, GIAC (Global Information Assurance Certification), and CompTIA Security\+ will be added advantages.
* SIEM (ArcSight, Radar or any industry\-leading tools) administration for standard and Custom Log.



  





**Competency** 




  




* Great analytical thinking.
* Ability to think full stack when it comes to problem\-solving.
* Ability to learn new technology quickly.
* Excellent hands\-on skills in Information Security products and technologies.
* Willingness to help customers, peers and other team member at any time.



  





**Our Benefits** 




 Versa Networks is a rapidly growing organization built by people with vast experience in the networking industry. We are a pragmatic team with a healthy work\-life balance. We offer a competitive compensation package and quality\-of\-life benefits to everyone in an inspiring environment with skilled and passionate co\-workers. Our exciting company culture makes us a great place to work.

54af84eb.title: Presales Engineer (Android)
54af84eb.description:
**About Wiseasy** 




 At Wiseasy, we're not just leading the charge in payment innovation; we're redefining it. Our mission is to empower and integrate global innovation in Intelligent Payments. We do this by specializing in cutting\-edge 'SMART' terminals and comprehensive payment technology services.
 



 Our full suite of enterprise solutions, encompassing "Cloud \+ Software \+ Terminals," is designed to transform the landscape of financial transactions. We are the catalysts for change in the payments space, enabling banks, acquirers, fintech companies, telecom operators, and Industry Solution Providers (ISVs) to offer a spectrum of financial services and create new revenue streams. These services are tailored to enhance cost\-efficiency, operational effectiveness, and raise the bar of customer satisfaction.
 



  





**About the Job** 




 As a Presales Engineer (Android) at Wiseasy, based in India, you will play a crucial role in driving the adoption of our innovative payment solutions across the region. This is a
 **client\-facing role**
 where you will support customers and business partners — including resellers, distributors, and system integrators — by developing demo applications and Proof of Concept (PoC) solutions using Android SDK resources, tools, and technical expertise to effectively promote, sell, and support our products and services. The primary goal is to strengthen our customer and partner ecosystem and drive mutual success. This role requires approximately
 **15–20% travel**
 within India and potentially across the APAC region.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Collaborate with the Sales team to identify new business opportunities and drive customer acquisition across the Indian market.
* Engage with customers and business partners to understand technical requirements and propose appropriate solutions.
* Develop demonstrative applications to validate customer\-specified proof of concepts.
* Ensure seamless integration of our SDKs and APIs into clients' applications by analyzing logs and technical documents.
* Conduct training sessions and workshops to educate customers on our products and solutions.
* Troubleshoot technical issues and provide timely, effective resolutions.
* Stay informed on India's digital payments landscape, including UPI, RuPay, and regulatory frameworks such as RBI guidelines, to better contextualize Wiseasy solutions for local clients.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* At least 2–3 years of experience in Android development or a Technical Support role, preferably in fintech or the card\-present transaction domain.
* Prior experience with Android POS terminals, payment gateways, and EMV specifications is a strong advantage.
* Proficiency in Java, Kotlin, or Flutter, with hands\-on experience in Android Studio or similar IDEs.
* Familiarity with India's payments ecosystem (UPI, NPCI, RuPay, Aadhaar\-based authentication) is a plus.
* Strong technical acumen with the ability to understand and troubleshoot software issues independently.
* Excellent communication skills in English; proficiency in Hindi or other regional Indian languages is an advantage. Mandarin communication skills will also be considered a plus.
* Ability to thrive in a fast\-paced, multicultural, and multilingual environment while managing multiple tasks simultaneously.
* Strong interpersonal skills with a focus on building long\-term customer relationships.

7a4756fc.title: Senior SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Consultant – Planning & Reporting
7a4756fc.description:
**About the Role**

We are seeking an experienced SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Consultant specializing in Planning \& Reporting to lead enterprise\-scale SAC implementation and AMS projects. The ideal candidate will have strong experience designing planning models, executive dashboards, reporting solutions, and SAP integrations while collaborating with international stakeholders.

**What You'll Work On**

· Lead end\-to\-end SAP Analytics Cloud Planning \& Reporting implementations.

* Global SAP SAC AMS and implementation projects.
* Enterprise Planning, Budgeting \& Forecasting.
* Executive Reporting \& Business Analytics.
* Performance optimization and continuous improvements.
* Collaboration with international customers across Europe and the Middle East.

**Required Key Skills**

* SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Planning \& Reporting
* Story and Dashboard Development
* Planning Models \& Data Models
* Data Actions \& Allocations
* SAC Calendar \& Predictive Planning
* Integration with SAP S/4HANA, BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere
* **Strong analytical and stakeholder management skills**

**What We're Looking For**

* 6–10\+ years of SAP consulting experience.
* Strong hands\-on experience with SAP Analytics Cloud Planning \& Reporting.
* Experience in enterprise Planning, Budgeting, Forecasting, and Executive Reporting.
* Excellent client\-facing and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience working on global SAP implementation and AMS projects.
* Strong analytical thinking and problem\-solving abilities.
* Comfortable working with international customers across Europe and the Middle East.

**Why Join erpOI AB?**

Join an international SAP consulting team delivering enterprise analytics solutions for global organizations. Work alongside experienced SAP consultants and architects while contributing to innovative Planning, Reporting, and Business Analytics initiatives using the latest SAP Analytics technologies.

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Mumbai, Maharashtra

bfd189a5.title: Business Architect
bfd189a5.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Business Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Identify opportunities to deliver tangible business value by assessing the current state, capturing high\-level requirements, and defining business solutions. Translate business needs into technology\-enabled solutions and operating models. Support transformation by developing business cases and guiding implementation of key initiatives.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Oracle Transportation Management
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 7\.5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As an OTM Consultant, you will lead and deliver Oracle Transportation Management (OTM) solutions for global clients. This role demands strong functional and technical expertise in OTM, experience in end\-to\-end implementations \& application support, and the ability to work independently or as part of a team. You will collaborate with stakeholders to design optimized solutions, configure OTM modules, and ensure successful project delivery. The role may be in a support or in implementation assignment.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Lead or participate in full lifecycle OTM implementation projects, including requirement gathering, solution design, configuration, testing, and deployment.
* Configure OTM modules such as Order Management, Shipment Management, Execution \& Visibility, Finance, and FTI.
* Develop and maintain automation agents, workflows, and custom events. Perform functional and technical analysis, troubleshoot issues, and optimize system performance.
* Support OTM Cloud implementations and on\-premise to cloud migration activities.
* Manage integrations with ERP/WMS systems and external partners.
* Prepare functional documentation, process flows, and configuration guides.
* Act as a solution lead, guiding junior consultants and ensuring adherence to best practices. Collaborate in Agile/DevOps environments, contributing to CI/CD pipelines and version control processes.
* Ensuring system stability, resolving complex functional/technical issues, and maintaining seamless integration with other systems


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* 6–12 years of experience in Oracle Transportation Management (OTM), with at least 2–3 full lifecycle implementations.
* Strong knowledge of OTM functional configurations and technical architecture.
* Hands\-on experience with SQL, PL/SQL, and OTM\-related data structures.
* Expertise in OTM Cloud, automation agents, and customizations. Familiarity with integration frameworks, external distance/rate engines, and BI Publisher reporting.
* Strong understanding of logistics and supply chain processes. Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Knowledge of DevOps pipelines and Agile methodologies.
* Open to working in dev or support projects and in shifts based on business needs


 Additional Information:
   

  

* Good to have: Certifications in Oracle OTM or related SCM modules, experience in performance tuning and optimization of OTM configurations, exposure to 3PL/4PL logistics environments and freight forwarding business, knowledge of DevOps pipelines and Agile methodologies.
* The candidate should have 6\-12 years of experience in Oracle SCM Transportation Management.
* This position is open across all Accenture locations.
* 15 years full time education is required.

03ecef33.title: Technical Architect
03ecef33.description:
**Role: Technical Architect – Industrial Automation** 




**Experience:** 
 8\+ years
 



**Job Nature:** 
 Permanent
 



**Location:** 
 Trivandrum
 



**Work Mode:** 
 WFO (Monday \- Friday)
 



  





 The Technical Architect will work closely with customers, business leaders, delivery managers, product owners, and engineering teams to design scalable, secure, and maintainable software solutions. The role also requires a strong understanding of factory operations, industrial connectivity, data acquisition, visualization, reporting, workflow automation, and integration with enterprise IT systems.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





 Analysis and Technical Design
 



 • Translate customer requirements into scalable solution architectures covering software, data, integration, infrastructure, security, and operational aspects.
 



 • Create architecture blueprints, high\-level designs, deployment models, integration approaches, interface specifications, and non\-functional
 



 requirements.
 



 • Evaluate and recommend suitable architecture patterns for on\-premises, cloud, edge, and hybrid industrial automation solutions.
 



 • Participate in customer workshops, technical discovery sessions, solution demonstrations, architecture reviews, and proposals.
 



  





**Architecture and Domain Expertise** 




 • Architect solutions integrating industrial equipment, sensors, PLCs, controllers, gateways, SCADA systems, historians, and enterprise applications such as ERP, PLM, and WMS.
 



 • Guide teams on industrial connectivity using protocols such as OPC UA,Modbus, MQTT, BACnet, SNMP, and related communication standards.
 



 • Provide architectural direction for SCADA/HMI, MES/MOM, OEE, production tracking, equipment monitoring, alarms, dashboards, traceability, reporting, and workflow automation solutions.
 



  





**Software Engineering and Technical Leadership** 




 • Provide technical leadership for development teams working on web, desktop,mobile, cloud, and edge applications in the industrial domain.
 



 • Guide database and data engineering activities involving SQL Server, relational and time\-series databases, schema design, query optimization,stored procedures, and integration data models.
 



 • Establish coding standards, architecture guardrails, reusable components,API design principles, logging, error handling, and testing practices.
 



 • Review solutions for data flow, latency, reliability, failover, availability, and maintainability required for mission\-critical factory environments.
 



  





**Cloud and Digital Solution Design** 




 • Design cloud, edge, and hybrid architectures for industrial digital transformation solutions.
 



 • Define solution approaches using cloud platforms, covering infrastructure, networking, security, storage, messaging, containers, serverless services, and monitoring.
 



 • Ensure industrial cybersecurity, authentication, authorization, data privacy, and regulatory requirements are addressed in solution design.
 



  





**Qualifications and Skills Required** 




  





 • 9–15 years of IT experience, including at least 3 years in a Technical Architect, Solution Architect, or similar leadership role.
 



 • Strong experience in Industrial/Factory Automation software development and system integration projects.
 



 • Hands\-on knowledge of SCADA, HMI, MES/MOM, DCS, PLCs, industrial gateways, and historians.
 



 • Good understanding of industrial protocols and integration technologies such as OPC UA/DA, Modbus, MQTT, BACnet, SNMP, REST, SOAP/Web
 



 Services, TCP/IP, and secure APIs.
 



 • Strong software architecture and development background across desktop, web, cloud, and edge applications.
 



 • Experience with SQL Server or similar databases, including schema design, queries, stored procedures, performance tuning, and data modeling.
 



 • Experience designing on\-premises, cloud, edge, and hybrid solutions using platforms such as Microsoft Azure or AWS.

c15e8fda.title: Manager | Cloud Security | Pune | Enterprise Security
c15e8fda.description:
Job requisition ID :: 106826
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Pune
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Manager \| Cloud Security \| Pune \| Enterprise Security**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 106826
* **Location**: Pune
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**Manager – Enterprise Security \& Directory Services**

  


**Experience :** 10\+ Years


**Location :** Pune/Bangalore/Hyderabad/Gurugram/Noida


**Designation :** Manager


**Your Work profile**



We are seeking an experienced **Manager – Enterprise Security \& Directory Services** to lead the design, implementation, and governance of enterprise identity, access management, and directory service infrastructure. This role will oversee enterprise authentication systems, directory services, privileged access management, and identity lifecycle processes to ensure secure and efficient access to corporate systems and applications.

  



The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in **Active Directory, identity governance, authentication technologies, access controls, and enterprise security architecture**, along with proven experience managing teams and enterprise\-scale identity platforms.

  


**Key Skill required:**

  


**Enterprise Identity \& Access Management**


* Lead enterprise **Identity and Access Management (IAM)** initiatives including identity lifecycle management, provisioning, and access governance.
* Define and implement **authentication and authorization strategies** across enterprise systems.
* Implement **Single Sign\-On (SSO), Multi\-Factor Authentication (MFA), and identity federation** solutions.
* Manage identity governance and role\-based access controls (RBAC).

  


**Directory Services Management**


* Oversee enterprise **directory services architecture and operations**, including:
* Microsoft Active Directory (AD)
* Azure Active Directory / Entra ID
* LDAP\-based directories
* Manage domain architecture, replication, group policies, and directory synchronization.
* Ensure high availability, performance optimization, and disaster recovery for directory services.

  


**Privileged Access \& Identity Security**


* Implement and manage **Privileged Access Management (PAM)** solutions.
* Monitor privileged accounts and enforce least privilege access.
* Implement identity threat detection and access anomaly monitoring.

  


**Security Architecture \& Integration**


* Integrate identity and directory services with enterprise systems including:
* Cloud platforms
* SaaS applications
* Network infrastructure
* Security tools
* Support **Zero Trust identity architecture** initiatives.

  


**Compliance \& Governance**


* Ensure compliance with security frameworks and regulatory standards such as:
* ISO 27001
* NIST
* CIS benchmarks
* SOX / regulatory compliance requirements
* Support internal and external audits related to identity and access management.

  


**Operations \& Incident Management**


* Manage identity\-related incidents, access issues, and service disruptions.
* Establish operational processes for **identity provisioning, deprovisioning, and access reviews**.
* Ensure continuous monitoring and improvement of identity security controls.

  


**Team Leadership \& Stakeholder Collaboration**


* Lead and mentor a team of **directory services engineers and IAM specialists**.
* Collaborate with infrastructure, security, cloud, and application teams.
* Provide **strategic guidance and executive reporting** on identity and access risks.

  


**Required Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in **Computer Science, Information Security, or related field**
* **10–15 years of IT experience**, including **5\+ years managing identity and directory services environments**
* **Proven experience in enterprise\-scale IAM and directory service management**

  


**Required Technical Skills**

  


**Directory Services**


* Microsoft Active Directory
* Azure AD / Entra ID
* LDAP directory services
* Group Policy management
* Domain architecture and replication

  


**Identity \& Access Management**


* Identity lifecycle management
* Access governance and certification
* Role\-based access control (RBAC)
* Identity federation (SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect)


**Authentication Technologies**


* Single Sign\-On (SSO)
* Multi\-Factor Authentication (MFA)
* Conditional access policies

  


**Security \& Integration**


* Privileged Access Management (PAM)
* Identity threat detection
* Integration with cloud platforms and SaaS applications

  


**Preferred Certifications**


* CISSP (Certified Information Systems Security Professional)
* CISM (Certified Information Security Manager)
* Microsoft Certified: Identity and Access Administrator
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Security Engineer
* Certified Identity and Access Manager (CIAM)

  


**Leadership \& Soft Skills**


* Strong **team leadership and mentoring skills**
* **Excellent stakeholder communication and collaboration**
* **Strategic thinking with operational execution capability**
* **Strong troubleshooting and incident management abilities**

  


**Key Success Metrics**


* Availability and performance of directory services infrastructure
* Reduction in identity\-related security incidents
* Compliance with access governance and audit requirements
* Improvement in identity lifecycle automation and efficiency

a989653a.title: AWS Solution Architect (10+ Yrs of Exp and Immediate Joiners)
a989653a.description:
3Pillar is an AI transformation partner on a mission to help enterprises build the AI\-native products and intelligent agents that will define the next era of business. With teams across North America, Europe, Latin America, and Asia, we work with the most ambitious companies in financial services, healthcare, media, and technology — helping them move faster, modernize boldly, and compete on their own terms. Our HelixAI platform and Helix Pods delivery model put our engineers at the center of real agentic transformation — doing work that is open, portable, and built to last. We are building the future of enterprise AI.

### **Job description**


* Design and implement scalable, secure **AWS cloud architectures**.
* Build and manage infrastructure using **Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CloudFormation)**.
* Architect secure authentication using **Cognito, SAML SSO, MFA, and RBAC**.
* Develop and maintain **CI/CD pipelines**, DevOps practices, and cloud security.
* Ensure governance, audit logging, and reusable platform components.
* Provide technical leadership, collaborate with stakeholders, and mentor engineering teams.
### **Mandatory Skills:**


* **10\+ Years of experience in IT**
* **5\+ years** of experience as an **AWS Solution/Cloud Architect**.
* **AWS:** CloudFront, Lambda, S3, API Gateway, Cognito, DynamoDB, Aurora Serverless.
* **IaC:** AWS CloudFormation or Terraform.
* **DevOps \& CI/CD**, cloud security, and API security.
* **SAML SSO**, MFA, and role\-based access control (RBAC).
* Strong knowledge of **AWS architecture, SDLC, Agile**, and design patterns.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
### **What It's Like to Work at 3Pillar:**


At 3Pillar, we create an environment where people can do their best work while maintaining a healthy work\-life balance.  

* **Flexibility \& Well\-being** – Our remote\-first approach gives you the flexibility to work where you perform best, while prioritizing your well\-being and personal commitments.
* **Global Community** – Collaborate with talented colleagues across the globe in a culture built on connection, support, and shared success.
* **Your Voice Matters** – We foster open communication and multiple feedback channels, ensuring every employee has the opportunity to be heard and make an impact.
* **Growth \& Development** – Gain exposure to diverse clients, industries, and challenges that accelerate learning and career growth.


  

Our culture is guided by four core values: **Collaboration, Outperform, Respect, and Evolve**—the principles that shape how we work, grow, and succeed together.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

6c5992f1.title: Senior Solutions Architect, Global SI (India)
6c5992f1.description:
GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps. GitLab enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100\* trust GitLab to ship better, more secure software faster.



The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high\-performance culture is driven by our values and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. Co\-create the future with us as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software.


* *Fortune 500® is a registered trademark of Fortune Media IP Limited, used under license. Claim based on GitLab data. Fortune 100 refers to the top 20% ranked companies in the 2025 Fortune 500 list, published in June 2025\. Fortune and Fortune Media IP Limited are not affiliated with, and do not endorse products or services of GitLab.*
**Overview of the Role**
------------------------



As an Ecosystem Solutions Architect, you'll be a trusted advisor to GitLab's partners, helping them understand how GitLab's DevSecOps platform can power differentiated, services\-led solutions and generate repeatable, partner\-sourced revenue. You'll support the Ecosystem Sales Managers, whose role is to work with field account teams to achieve their revenue goals by leveraging partners to scale the quantity, value, and strategic relevance of deals.



Like all GitLab Solutions Architects, you are a trusted technical advisor who drives and manages the technology evaluation and validation stages, speaks about technology in industry\-standard terms rather than GitLab\-specific language, and creates reusable technical assets that scale across the region. The differentiator in this seat is the GSI lens: you build with and through the integrator, not only for an end customer.


**What you'll do**
------------------


* Collaborate with Ecosystem Sales Managers and partner sales leaders to shape and execute Partner Activation Plans that drive partner\-sourced pipeline and GitLab adoption.
* Own the technical aspects of partner activation, including building and delivering demos, reference architectures, and workshops that support contribution, commitment, and capability activation.
* Serve as the Directly Responsible Individual on partner technical activation plans, ensuring technical risks and gaps are identified, addressed, and aligned to mutual GitLab, partner, and customer outcomes.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with technical and business stakeholders at partners so they progress from awareness to actively leading high\-value activities like deal registrations and solution development.
* Act as the partner advocate to internal teams by sharing field feedback and insights with Product, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Partner Enablement to influence roadmap and programs.

**Must Haves**
--------------


* India\-based and authorized to work in India (Bangalore, Mumbai, or Delhi).
* Senior\-level technical pre\-sales / Solutions Architect / sales engineering experience; able to guide stakeholders through solution design and evaluation.
* Proficiency across the end\-to\-end software development lifecycle, modern DevSecOps practices, and CI/CD workflows; hands\-on experience with GitLab or a comparable source\-control / CI\-CD / DevSecOps platform, with the ability to map platform capabilities to customer use cases.
* Demonstrated experience working with or leadership roles inside India\-based GSIs — partner\-facing or delivery/practice side. This is the line that makes it a GSI hire, not a generic SA.
* Channel / cloud / partner\-ecosystem fluency: understands partner\-sourced motion, deal registration, co\-sell, and services\-led GTM — not a direct\-sales\-only background.
* Communicates credibly from practitioner to executive; can own a technical activation plan as the DRI.
* Embraces AI as a core productivity multiplier and incorporates it into daily workflow.

**Nice To Haves**
-----------------


* An existing network inside one or more of the named GSIs. \- not merely as a line\-worker, though
* Experience standing up partner delivery practices, enablement tracks, or certification programs.
* Cloud\-marketplace / hyperscaler co\-sell familiarity (AWS or GCP) — a plus, not a requirement.
* Depth in GitLab, AI development, Kubernetes, infrastructure\-as\-code, or application security (SAST/DAST).
* Coverage value beyond India proper (APAC GSI delivery hubs).

  


**How GitLab will support you**
-------------------------------


* Benefits to support your health, finances, and well\-being
* Flexible Paid Time Off
* Team Member Resource Groups
* Equity Compensation \& Employee Stock Purchase Plan
* Growth and Development Fund
* Parental leave
* Home office support

**Hiring process**
------------------



Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from underrepresented groups are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.

#### **How GitLab Supports Full\-Time Employees**


* Benefits to support your health, finances, and well\-being
* Flexible Paid Time Off
* Team Member Resource Groups
* Equity Compensation \& Employee Stock Purchase Plan
* Growth and Development Fund
* Parental Leave


Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from underrepresented groups are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.



**Country Hiring Guidelines:** GitLab hires new team members in countries around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location\-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.


**Privacy Policy:** Please review our Recruitment Privacy Policy. Your privacy is important to us.



GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. See also GitLab’s EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know during the recruiting process.

f0689047.title: Solutions Architect
f0689047.description:
**Role: Solution/ Enterprise Architect** 




**Exp: 12\+ Years** 




**Loc: Bangalore/ Hyderabad** 




  





 Requirement is for the Architecture group supporting enterprise modernization initiatives.
 



 \- Role involves reviewing existing applications, identifying architectural gaps, and recommending improvements.
 



 \- Not limited to GCP; candidates from Java, .NET, Python, Cloud, Data, Mobile, or Web Architecture backgrounds can be considered.
 



 \- Preferred profiles: Application Architects, Solution Architects, and Enterprise Architects.
 



 \- 7\+ years of architecture experience with prior development background is expected.
 



 \- TOGAF and similar certifications are good to have, not mandatory.
 



 \- Focus is on practicing architects currently involved in design and modernization activities.
 



 \- BFSI domain experience is preferred but not mandatory. Candidates from other domains can also be considered.
 



 \- Candidates will be assessed through scenario\-based discussions.
 



 \- Work locations: Hyderabad and Bangalore.
 



  





**In this role, architect will:** 




 • Act as an advisor to senior leadership to develop the architectural framework \& delivery for highly complex business and technical needs across multiple groups
 



 • Lead the strategy and resolution of highly complex and unique challenges requiring in\-depth evaluation across multiple areas or the enterprise, delivering solutions that are long\-term, large\-scale and require vision, creativity, innovation, advanced analytical and inductive thinking
 



 • Provide vision, direction and expertise to senior leadership on implementing the transformation strategy describing the current state, target state and transition architecture
 



 • Strategically engage with all levels of professionals and managers across the enterprise and serve as an architectural domain expert advisor to leadership
 



 • Ensure applications adhere to established company standards, policies, methodologies and industry best practices as it transforms toward target state architecture
 



 • Drive the definition, establishment, selection of strategic tools, and application of architecture frameworks
 



 • Maintain knowledge of industry best practices and new technologies and recommends innovations that enhance operations or provide a competitive advantage to the organization and can influence internal and vendor roadmaps in a significant capacity
 



 • Strategically engage with all levels of professionals and managers across the enterprise and serve as an expert advisor to leadership
 



 • Lead the development of strategy for capabilities across the bank and influence target state architectures with forward\-looking architecture principles, data management, and modern technology
 



 • Credibly challenge line of business / domain architecture on alignment to enterprise goals
 



 • Contribute to forward\-looking policies, patterns, standards, non\-functional requirements, methodologies and industry best practices and work with domain architects to promote adherence
 



 • Provide leadership and guidance at architecture councils, review boards and internal and external architecture forums
 



 • Perform enterprise and portfolio\-level analysis to drive investment analysis, rationalization, and convergence strategies
 



 • Support data center migration efforts and understand full stack architecture to migrate dependencies accordingly
 



 • Produce enterprise architecture specifications and documents using industry standard modeling languages and tools
 



 • Drive efforts to ensure resiliency, fault tolerance, and performance of architecture solutions
 



 • Stay current with technology innovations and industry best practices and apply across the enterprise, where valuable
 



 • Transform the Architecture practice
 



  





 Required Qualifications:
 



 • 7\+ years of architecture experience, or equivalent demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education
 



 • 7\+ years of Engineering experience, or equivalent demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education
 



 • 7\+ years of architecture in one or a combination of the following areas: enterprise architecture, solution architecture, application architecture, infrastructure or security, or security architecture
 



 • 7\+ years of experience creating architecture strategy, designs, and patterns
 



 • 7\+ years of software development experience
 



 • 2\+ years of experience with architecting solutions using leading vendor solutions and in\-house developed systems
 



  





 Desired Qualifications:
 



 • Strong verbal, written, and interpersonal communication skills
 



 • Ability to influence across all organizational levels, particularly senior management
 



 • Ability to negotiate/challenge, influence, and collaborate to build successful relationships
 



 • Knowledge and understanding of applications technology management role, including managing applications development and support for multiple systems and business functions
 



 • Ability to identify key issues, involve affected parties, design solutions, obtain buy\-in, and communicate effectively through resolution
 



 • Ability to be proactive, innovative and creative in meeting customer and enterprise needs
 



 • 3\+ years of experience using industry standards such as BAG, BIAN, TOGAF and architecture modeling languages such as ArchiMate, UML, BPMN, etc. leveraging BizzDesign Horizzon
 



 • Bachelor’s and/or master’s in computer science or information systems
 



 • Prior related experience leading and/or managing architecture strategies with architecture roadmap that aligns with business strategy and objectives
 



 • Deep understanding of cloud technologies (GCP, Azure) and familiarity with data center exit strategies
 



 • Good analytical skills to set data driven insights with high attention to detail and accuracy
 



 • Lead application consolidation and rationalization efforts and the related emerging technology assessments
 



  





 Job Expectations:
 



 • Ability to influence across all organizational levels, particularly senior management
 



 • Ability to negotiate, influence, and collaborate to build successful relationships
 



 • Ability to effectively assess stakeholder, partner, or client needs while consulting, building solutions, and developing processes
 



 • Ability to be proactive, innovative and creative in meeting customer and enterprise needs
 



 • Ability to identify key issues, involve affected parties, design solutions, obtain buy\-in, and communicate effectively through resolution
 



 • Ability to work effectively, as well as independently, in a team environment

881d985e.title: Solutions Architect - ITSM [T500-27477]
881d985e.description:
**About McDonald’s:** 




 One of the world’s largest employers with locations in more than 100 countries, McDonald’s Corporation has corporate opportunities in Hyderabad. Our global offices serve as dynamic innovation and operations hubs, designed to expand McDonald's global talent base and in\-house expertise. Our new office in Hyderabad will bring together knowledge across business, technology, analytics, and AI, accelerating our ability to deliver impactful solutions for the business and our customers across the globe.
 



  





 The
 **Solutions Architect** 
 role is responsible for defining end\-to\-end solution architecture for assigned products, workflows, and initiatives delivered on McDonald’s global ServiceNow platform. This role partners closely with product engineering teams, business stakeholders, enterprise architecture, platform architecture, security, and operations to design scalable, secure, resilient, and supportable solutions that align with business objectives and enterprise technology strategy. The role is accountable for translating business needs into solution designs, guiding implementation decisions within assigned scope, enabling effective integration with enterprise systems, and promoting architectural consistency through established standards and patterns. This role is expected to bring deep experience across ServiceNow ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM, with preferred experience in additional ServiceNow products and modules as business needs evolve. This is an individual contributor role with no direct people leadership responsibilities. This role reports to the Sr. Mgr., Solutions Architect, who sets architecture direction, standards, and team priorities.
 



  





 This opportunity is part of the Global Technology Enterprise Products \& Platforms, focused on enabling enterprise\-wide services through McDonald’s global ServiceNow platform, where our vision is to “Always be a people led, product centric, future focused \& trusted technology partner of choice.”
 



  





**Responsibilities \& Accountabilities:** 




**Solution Design and Architecture:** 



* Work closely with stakeholders to understand business objectives, challenges, user needs, and functional requirements across products and workflows.
* Develop end\-to\-end solution designs for ServiceNow\-enabled products and workflow capabilities that meet business requirements and integrate effectively with existing McDonald’s systems and platforms.
* Define solution architecture across relevant ServiceNow capabilities, with deep expertise in ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM, and preferred experience across additional modules such as HRSD, CSM, SPM, App Engine, portal experiences, workflow automation, and enterprise integrations based on product and business priorities.
* Ensure solutions are scalable, secure, usable, maintainable, and aligned with enterprise and platform standards, balancing business value, speed, user experience, and operational supportability.
* Create and maintain architectural documentation for assigned products and initiatives, including solution designs, process flows, architecture diagrams, integration patterns, data flows, and technical specifications.
* Define reusable solution patterns and design approaches across products and workflows, and ensure consistent implementation in partnership with product and engineering teams.
* Communicate solution architecture direction effectively to stakeholders, ensuring shared understanding of design decisions, tradeoffs, dependencies, and impacts.
* Provide solution architecture expertise across design and delivery phases for assigned products and initiatives, partnering with implementation teams to ensure solutions are delivered in alignment with intended business outcomes and approved architecture.
* Define architecture for boundary systems and integrations related to assigned products and workflows, including APIs, identity flows, data exchange, and orchestration patterns; partner with adjacent teams to resolve issues, mitigate risks, and escalate broader cross\-platform design decisions as needed.
* Own solution architecture for assigned products and initiatives, ensuring alignment of workflow design, business process enablement, data requirements, security controls, user experience, reporting needs, and support models.



  





**Technology Strategy and Roadmap:** 



* Contribute to roadmap planning for ServiceNow\-enabled products and workflows by identifying architecture needs, dependencies, technical options, and sequencing considerations in alignment with business priorities and platform direction.
* Identify opportunities to improve product capabilities, workflow effectiveness, automation, and end\-user experience by leveraging ServiceNow features and adjacent enterprise technologies.



  





**Collaborate with Cross\-Functional Teams:** 



* Foster collaboration with product managers, engineering teams, operations, cybersecurity, enterprise architecture, data teams, and business units to ensure alignment between architectural vision, delivery plans, and measurable business outcomes.
* Partner effectively with other architects, product managers, engineering teams, operations, and business stakeholders to promote consistent patterns, architectural rigor, and scalable solution outcomes across assigned products and initiatives.
* Participate in architecture reviews, alignment sessions, and decision forums to support consistency, resolve tradeoffs within assigned scope, and raise broader portfolio issues to the appropriate architecture and product leaders.



  





**Implementation and Support:** 



* Partner with engineering and delivery teams to implement approved solution designs and provide architecture guidance on complex product, workflow, and integration challenges within assigned scope.
* Provide architectural support across assigned initiatives, ensuring timely engagement on complex design topics, effective issue escalation, and practical resolution of architecture\-related delivery risks.
* Support solution delivery through design reviews, issue resolution, dependency management, and transition planning to ensure solutions are supportable and aligned with business intent.



  





**Governance and Compliance:** 



* Ensure solution designs comply with enterprise architecture principles, security requirements, regulatory expectations, and McDonald’s policies.
* Identify solution\-level risks, design gaps, and technical dependencies, and define mitigation strategies that improve delivery quality, maintainability, and business continuity.
* Partner with platform architecture, cybersecurity, and risk teams to ensure product and workflow solutions align with approved standards, controls, and architectural guardrails.
* Support adherence to approved architecture standards, governance processes, and design guardrails across assigned initiatives, and raise exceptions or risks requiring broader review.



  





**Qualifications:** 




**Basic Qualifications:** 



* 8\+ years of experience in solution architecture, enterprise applications, platform engineering, or related technology roles within large\-scale, global environments
* 5\+ years of experience architecting and delivering ServiceNow\-based solutions, including deep hands\-on expertise in ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM
* Experience providing technical leadership, architectural guidance, and design review support across cross\-functional teams and implementation partners
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field
* Strong understanding of ServiceNow solution architecture, workflow design, CMDB and asset data concepts, security considerations, integration patterns, and enterprise application architecture principles, especially across ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM.
* Demonstrated knowledge of business solution design and workflow orchestration in a QSR, retail, enterprise applications, or back\-office systems environment
* Knowledge of software engineering and delivery practices across the full software development life cycle, including requirements, design, testing, release management, and operational support
* Strong knowledge of APIs, integration frameworks, identity and access patterns, data architecture principles, and enterprise application interoperability
* Experience applying product and agile ways of working, including best practices and lessons learned to standardize and refine delivery approaches
* Highly experienced in working collaboratively with business partners, product teams, architects, and engineering teams to drive outcomes and solve complex business and technical challenges across a global matrixed organization
* Demonstrated ability to influence solution design decisions and provide technical leadership across internal teams, suppliers, and implementation partners
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts, solution tradeoffs, and business impacts to non\-technical and executive stakeholders
* Strong problem\-solving and innovation skills to identify, develop, and improve techniques, procedures, services, or products
* Demonstrated ability to contribute to a collaborative environment that encourages learning, constructive challenge, thoughtful risk\-taking, and continuous improvement
* Relevant ServiceNow and industry certifications are a plus.
* Experience partnering with platform architects, cybersecurity experts, and delivery teams to ensure solutions align with broader technical strategy and standards is desirable



  





**Preferred Qualifications:** 



* ServiceNow Expertise: Strong experience architecting enterprise solutions across ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM, with exposure to HRSD, CSM, SPM, IRM/SecOps, and App Engine.
* Enterprise Integrations: Hands\-on experience integrating ServiceNow with HR, ERP, Finance, Identity, and collaboration platforms using REST, SOAP, Integration Hub, and middleware.
* Architecture \& Governance: Expertise in solution architecture, platform standards, security, compliance, governance, and SaaS architecture best practices.

206e53f7.description:
We are hiring for
 **Solution Architect – AI \& Digital Twin** 




**Pet Food Manufacturing** 




  





 Experience \- 10\-15yrs
 



 Location\- Chennai / Hyderabad / Pune
 



  





 JD\-
 



**Roles \& Responsibilities** 




**AI \& Digital Twin Architecture Design** 



* Design end\-to\-end architecture covering data ingestion, AI pipelines, and twin computation
* Define scalable models for predictive, prescriptive, and generative AI use cases
* Establish architecture layers across edge, data, model, and visualization
* Ensure scalability and enterprise alignment across global manufacturing sites



**Manufacturing Use Case Development** 



* Translate plant challenges into AI and Digital Twin solutions
* Design use cases such as Filler twin, vision inspection, predictive maintenance
* Develop reusable solution blueprints for multi\-site deployment
* Align solutions with KPIs like OEE, yield, and cost optimization



**Data \& Integration Architecture** 



* Define integration across MES, ERP, LIMS, SCADA, and historian systems
* Architect secure OT\-IT connectivity and real\-time data pipelines
* Ensure standardized data models for scaling twins across lines/sites
* Enable real\-time analytics and performance monitoring



**Platform Selection \& Standardization** 



* Select AI/ML platforms, Digital Twin frameworks, and IoT technologies
* Define reference architectures and standard toolkits
* Drive platform\-based scalable solutions
* Enable reuse across recipes, lines, and sites



**Governance, Delivery \& TMO Enablement** 



* Lead architecture governance and design reviews
* Guide AI model lifecycle and twin validation
* Support implementation, commissioning, and Sim\-to\-Real deployment
* Enable multi\-site rollout and value tracking through TMO



  





**Skillset Required** 




**AI \& Digital Twin Technical Expertise** 



* Expertise in AI/ML applications like predictive maintenance and optimization
* Strong understanding of Digital Twin concepts (process, asset, plant)
* Experience with data pipelines, feature engineering, and model deployment
* Familiarity with simulation and physics\-based modeling



**Manufacturing \& Domain Knowledge** 



* Experience in pet food, food \& beverage, or process manufacturing
* Understanding of extrusion, batching, and packaging processes
* Knowledge of quality variability and recipe management
* Familiarity with KPIs like OEE, throughput, yield, and waste



**Data, Cloud \& Integration Capabilities** 



* Experience with MES/MOM and plant data ecosystems
* Understanding of PLC, SCADA, and industrial connectivity
* Hands\-on with cloud platforms and real\-time streaming
* Awareness of OT cybersecurity principles



**Architecture \& Consulting Mindset** 



* Strong system thinking and scalable architecture design skills
* Ability to connect business challenges with technical solutions
* Experience in global rollout programs
* Ability to define KPIs and track value realization



**Stakeholder \& Cross\-Functional Engagement** 



* Collaboration with operations, engineering, IT/OT, and data teams
* Experience in global and cross\-functional environments
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to translate AI/Twin concepts into business value

f9b4abf3.title: Solution Architect, SAE
f9b4abf3.description:
Job Requisition ID
   

  

 JR2021122
   

  

 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Time Type
   

  

 Full time
   

  

 NVIDIA’s Platform has already made a major impact to the field and is broadly used across leading Industry’s, including the world’s largest Internet companies. Our success has been based on laser\-focused industry vertical business development, building a strong developer ecosystem and scaling out the business using a partner channel and creative marketing. We need passionate, hard\-working and creative people to help us pursue more of these rare opportunities.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Solution Architect to focus on End to End Infrastructure, Starting from Data Centre’s, Solution Designs, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, and Accelerated Analytics, solutions to work with our teams in India, Bangalore. If this role sounds exciting, we should talk. Today, NVIDIA is acknowledged as the world leader in AI Accelerated computing. As a Solution Architect working at NVIDIA, you will work closely with multiple Customers across the country \- establishing relationships, solving problems and helping them build successful NVIDIA solutions.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Assist field business development in guiding the customer through the sales process for NVIDIA Products, owning the technical relationship and assisting customers in building innovative solutions based on NVIDIA Platforms
* Be an industry thought leader on integrating NVIDIA technology into multiple architectures to support AI at scale.
* An SME for large scale Software and Hardware Solution Design across AI \& Cloud Solutions.


**What We Need To See**
* B. Tech. or MS in Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, or Computer Science or equivalent experience.
* 8\+ years of work\-related experience in Solution Designing for Deep Learning, high\-performance computing and Cloud.
* Extensive Experience working with DevOps including but not limited to Docker/Containers, Kubernetes, and datacentre deployments.
* Excellent Pre\-sales experience on Network, Cloud, Big\-data/Analytics sizing, Large Scale Enterprise Solutions and RFP experience with the regional customers
* Software experience with modern, AI \& Cloud Stack, Deep Learning software architecture and frameworks is recommended.
* Deep understanding of dense datacentre design components including MEP, compute, storage and networking.
* Ability to multitask effectively in a dynamic environment.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Strong written and oral communications skills in English with the ability to effectively collaborate with management and engineering.


**Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd**
* Experienced in Networking, Cloud, HPC, ML \& DL.
* Solution Designs \- Large scale Supercomputing build experience \-Datacentre to Compute to Network to Software.
* Experience in working with Partners, OEMs and Distribution teams.
* Outstanding customer facing skill\-set with excellent presentation skills

161ccca6.title: Sr Advisory Solution Consultant
161ccca6.description:
**Company Description**  

It all started when engineer Fred Luddy wrote code that automated a tedious task for his coworker, Phyllis. She cried tears of joy. That moment inspired Fred to build a company that could do that for everyone—freeing people from busywork so they could focus on meaningful work. Today, ServiceNow is the AI control tower for business reinvention. Our ServiceNow AI platform brings together any AI, any data, and any workflow— helping 85% of the Fortune 500® work smarter, faster, and better. We're building an AI\-native culture where technology and talent are unstoppable together. And we're just getting started.


Join us to put AI to work for people.

 **Job Description**  

As a member of our Solution Consulting team, you will have a major impact on our future success by supporting \[Employee Experience, Customer Workflow, ITX] Solution Sales. You will guide revenue for one of our products with the support and partnership of Sales, Product Management, and the executive team. This is a hands\-on technical consultant who can go wide and deep on solution delivery and solution positioning during sales cycles.

**What you get to do in this role:**


The Solution Consultant is a technical consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide product\-specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.

* Support product sales as a technical and domain expert of a client\-facing sales team that pursues customers and prospects across multiple industry markets
* Lead discovery workshops to determine customers' challenges and give product demonstrations to align our solution with customer needs
* Develop client partner relationships
* Guide strategic programs in top accounts such as customer journey sessions for roadmap and outcome agreement
* Provide feedback to product management about product enhancements that can address customer needs and provide additional value
* Share and learn best practices and re\-usable assets with other Solution Consultants to enhance the quality and efficiency of the team
* Stay current on competitive analysis and market differentiation
* Support marketing events including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and trade shows

  

**Qualifications** **To be successful in this role you have:**

* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision\-making, or problem\-solving. This may include using AI\-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI\-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* 10\+ years of pre\-sales solution consulting or sales engineering experience
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or technical expertise with cloud software solutions
* Experience working collaboratively with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services
* Territory management skills, including pipeline building and working with Sales counterpart to promote execution excellence
* Travel, as necessary

  

**Additional Information** **Work Personas**


We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.

**Equal Opportunity Employer**


ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.

**Accommodations**


We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.

**Export Control Regulations**


For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.


From Fortune. ©2026 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

29e207de.title: Technical Architect
29e207de.description:
At Viamagus, every engineer works with AI every day \- not as a side experiment, but as the core of how we build. We're looking for a
 **Technical Architect** 
 who has shipped real systems, led real teams, and already treats AI tools as first\-class instruments of engineering. You'll own architecture across all client engagements, mentor a team of 15–20 engineers, and shape how an AI\-native consultancy delivers at scale.
 



  




* Direct access to client CTOs \- architecture decisions that actually ship, not slide decks
* Work inside an org where Claude Code, Cursor, and LLM\-native workflows are the default, not the exception
* Lead technical direction on diverse engagements: cloud modernisation, AI product builds, enterprise integrations
* Shape Viamagus's engineering standards, internal tooling, and AI practices from the ground up



  





**What you'll do** 



* Design scalable, secure architectures for client engagements and lead technical due diligence on proposals
* Drive production readiness: incident management, observability, release processes
* Mentor backend, mobile, and cloud engineers \- through architecture reviews, code reviews, and retrospectives
* Be the technical face to client CTOs: translate business objectives into architecture decisions and escalate risks with proposed mitigations
* Enforce security\-first design including threat modelling, data classification, and AI\-specific risks (prompt injection, PII leakage)
* Ensure compliance readiness for ISO 27001, SOC 2, and HIPAA where applicable



  





**What you bring** 




**Engineering foundation** 



* 8\+ years of software development, 3\+ years in an architect or lead role; degree in CS/Engineering (Master's preferred)
* Built and owned systems from scratch to production \- full lifecycle, not slices
* Multiple integration experiences: third\-party APIs, enterprise systems (SAP, Salesforce, ERP), messaging buses, legacy modernisation
* Built reusable platforms, SDKs, and internal tooling adopted across teams
* Technology\-agnostic: strong in at least one modern backend stack, one frontend framework, and one cloud platform
* AWS or Azure architecture: VPC design, IAM, container orchestration, cost optimisation
* DevOps fluency: Docker, Jenkins/GitHub Actions, Terraform or CDK
* Performance tuning, distributed tracing, APM tools (Datadog, New Relic, or equivalent)
* AppSec fundamentals: OWASP Top 10, VAPT remediation, secrets management; ISO/SOC 2/HIPAA exposure a plus



  





**AI\-era fluency (working knowledge of most of these required)** 



* Daily use of AI coding tools \- Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, or equivalent \- and the ability to articulate where they help and where they fall short
* LLM integration patterns: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or open\-source models; streaming, function calling, structured outputs
* RAG fundamentals: vector DBs (pgvector, Pinecone, Qdrant), embeddings, chunking, retrieval tradeoffs
* Agentic systems: tool use, multi\-step agents, LangGraph or CrewAI
* Prompt engineering: versioning, structured outputs, guardrails, handling hallucinations
* AI evaluation and cost awareness: measuring quality, latency, and cost of LLM\-powered features
* MCP (Model Context Protocol): awareness of what it is and where it fits



  





**Nice to have** 



* Open\-source contributions or published AI tooling
* Real\-time sync experience: CRDTs, Realm, Ditto, or offline\-first architectures
* Technical writing \- blogs, conference talks, or public GitHub work
* Google, AWS, or Azure certifications (a bonus, not a substitute for depth)

59b6de81.title: DevOps Engineer – Jenkins | Ci/Cd | AWS | Terraform | CloudFormation | 2y to 5y
59b6de81.description:
**Job Title**
 DevOps Engineer \- Jenkins \| Ci/Cd \| AWS \| Terraform \| CloudFormation \| 2y to 5y
   

  

**About Skyhigh Security**
 Skyhigh Security is a dynamic, fast\-paced, cloud company that is a leader in the security industry. Our mission is to protect the world’s data, and because of this, we live and breathe security. We value learning at our core, underpinned by openness and transparency.
   

  

 Since 2011, organizations have trusted us to provide them with a complete, market\-leading security platform built on a modern cloud stack. Our industry\-leading suite of products radically simplifies data security through easy\-to\-use, cloud\-based, Zero Trust solutions that are managed in a single dashboard, powered by hundreds of employees across the world. With offices in Santa Clara, Aylesbury, Paderborn, Bengaluru, Sydney, Tokyo and more, our employees are the heart and soul of our company.
   

  

 Skyhigh Security Is more than a company; here, when you invest your career with us, we commit to investing in you. We embrace a hybrid work model, creating the flexibility and freedom you need from your work environment to reach your potential. From our employee recognition program, to our ‘Blast Talks' learning series, and team celebrations (we love to have fun!), we strive to be an interactive and engaging place where you can be your authentic self.
   

  

 We are on these too! Follow us on LinkedIn and Twitter@SkyhighSecurity.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 As a member of the Cloud Operations (DevOps) team, you will support and coordinate the ongoing operational activities (Deployments, compliance, and infrastructure setup) for our Public cloud hosted solutions (AWS), collaborating closely with developers to automate and accelerate our software delivery lifecycle and build tools to improve overall system efficiency Automation (using Jenkins, Harness \& Github)
   

  

* Day to day responsibilities will include ensuring that our solutions are resilient, available, healthy, and performing well.
* This role will be focused on operational excellence and will work to continuously improve the overall customer solution experience.
* 2 to 5 years of experience as DevOps Engineer
* Experience in IaC (Cloud formation, Terraform)
* Proficiency with Jenkins Pipeline, and Github,
* Understanding of the principles of CI and CD
* Proficiency in Linux \& good scripting experience with Python / Shell.
* Sound knowledge of any public cloud AWS \& OCI
* Create, maintain, and scale CI/CD pipelines for automated builds, tests, and deployments.
* Maintaining automated pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab) for efficient software delivery, collaborating with Dev/Ops teams, automating infrastructure (Terraform, Ansible), scripting (Python, Shell), and ensuring security, with strong Git, Docker, and cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP) knowledge being key.
* Support development teams on various Dev tools like Github, Jenkins, Harness, Cloud formation etc.
* Follow DevOps practices, automate infrastructure activities, documents standards and procedures.
* Drive existing automation frameworks forward to benefit automation across multiple products and if needed create new frameworks.
* Scripting using Python / shell and AWS cloud formation.
* Ability to learn to use new tools, and quickly become a subject matter expert.


**Company Benefits And Perks**
 We believe that the best solutions are developed by teams who embrace each other's unique experiences, skills, and abilities. We work hard to create a dynamic workforce where we encourage everyone to bring their authentic selves to work every day. We offer a variety of social programs, flexible work hours and family\-friendly benefits to all of our employees.
   

  

* Retirement Plans
* Medical, Dental and Vision Coverage
* Paid Time Off
* Paid Parental Leave
* Support for Community Involvement


 We're serious about our commitment to a workplace where everyone can thrive and contribute to our industry\-leading products and customer support, which is why we prohibit discrimination and harassment based on race, color, religion, gender, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation or any other legally protected status.
   

  

**Our Commitment To You**
 At Skyhigh Security, we are committed to creating a safe and trustworthy experience for our customers, employees, and candidates. Please be aware that fraudulent recruiting activity can occur through fake job postings or impersonated communications.
   

  

 Skyhigh Security conducts interviews through professional channels only and does not use text messages, instant messaging, or group chats for interviews. We will never request sensitive personal information—such as your date of birth, Social Security number, or national ID number—during the interview process.
   

  

 Skyhigh Security also does not require candidates to pay fees, purchase products or services, or process payments of any kind as part of the recruiting or hiring process. And Skyhigh Security will never keep any original work authorization documents that we may be required to review during the hiring process.

806ed742.title: Technical Delivery Manager
806ed742.description:
**WHO WE WANT?** 




 Someone who has personally felt the pain of a delivery that went sideways — missed milestones nobody saw coming, a team shipping features the client never asked for, a war room at 11pm because the go\-live was tomorrow. Someone who has carried accountability when things went wrong, and knows exactly what it costs when delivery breaks down.
 



  





**WHERE DO YOU COME FROM?** 




 IIT / NIT / BITS grad, class of 2010 or later. 8–14 years across delivery, engineering, and client engagement — with genuine hands\-on software delivery depth. You have owned a programme end\-to\-end: staffed it, scoped it, de\-risked it, and stood in front of the client when it shipped. Not a coordinator. Not a status reporter. Someone who has made hard calls under pressure and lived with the outcome.
 



  





**WHERE DO WE LOOK?** 




 Companies that build and ship — not just bill:
 



 ThoughtWorks, EPAM, GlobalLogic, Publicis Sapient, Freshworks, Postman, Chargebee, Razorpay, BrowserStack, LambdaTest — or high\-growth startups where delivery discipline was survival, not process.
 



  





**WHERE SHOULD WE NOT GO?** 




 TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL delivery towers, Cigniti — anywhere that mistakes a PMO dashboard for delivery, or confuses activity with outcomes.
 



  





**WHAT KIND OF PERSON?** 




 Obsessively accountable. Knows that delivery is not a function — it is a culture. Has held a team together when scope exploded and timelines collapsed. Understands that AI is reshaping how software gets built — companies like Anthropic, Cursor, Windsurf, Sarvam AI, and Krutrim are compressing what used to take quarters into weeks. Wants to be the person who makes that velocity real for clients. Do not wait for clarity. Creates it.
 



  





**HOW TO PITCH THIS ROLE** 




**What is this role, really?** 




 Nomiso builds AI\-powered products and delivers complex digital transformation programmes for enterprise clients. The Delivery Manager is the person who holds the entire execution together — the bridge between the promise made in the sales room and the value realized in production. This is not a co\-ordination role. It is an ownership role. You will staff, plan, de\-risk, and drive — and you will be the person the client calls when something matters.
 



  





**Reporting line** 




 This person reports directly to the VP Customer Success. No layers. No bureaucracy. Just accountability, outcomes, and the authority to act.
 



  





**On compensation** 




 Do not lead with the number. This role is not for someone optimising their CTC. It is for someone who wants to build a reputation on the back of real delivery. The right candidate will ask “what are we solving and what does winning look like?” before they ask what it pays — and when they do ask, tell them: the company rewards people who make things happen, not people who manage reports.
 



  





**The signal to watch for** 




*If the first thing they negotiate is the title, remote days or the package — they’re not the one*
