f62c1291.title: Terraform Architect
f62c1291.description:
**Job Description**

**About Persistent**

  

We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what’s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry\-leading organizations across the world, including 20 Fortune 50 companies and 4 of the 5 top banks in both the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.

  

Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We reported $1,654\.4M FY26 revenue with 17\.4% Y\-o\-Y growth. We have delivered 24 sequential quarters of growth with $436\.0M in Q4 FY26 revenue, up 3\.2% Q\-o\-Q and 16\.2% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 27,500\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been recognized as the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally in the 2026 Brand Finance IT Services 25 Report. We named a Leader in the Everest Group Private Equity (PE) Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026 and Software Product Engineering PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026\.

 **About Position:**

  

We are looking for an experienced Principal Terraform Architect to lead enterprise Infrastructure as Code (IaC) initiatives on AWS. The ideal candidate will be responsible for defining Terraform architecture standards, governing reusable module libraries, enabling cloud migration programs, and driving cloud automation at scale. This role requires strong expertise in Terraform, AWS architecture, platform.

* **Role: Terraform Architect**
* **Location: All Persistent Locations**
* **Experience: 12\+ Years**
* **Job Type: Full Time Employment**

 **What You'll Do:**

  

* Define and govern enterprise Terraform module library strategy.
* Design reusable, scalable, secure, and production\-ready AWS infrastructure patterns.
* Establish Terraform standards, naming conventions, tagging frameworks, and module development guidelines.
* Maintain compatibility with Terraform v1\.5\+ and AWS Provider v5\.x\+.
* Create and review reusable infrastructure patterns across compute, networking, storage, databases, security, monitoring, governance, and CI/CD services.
* Lead GitOps\-based Terraform delivery pipelines and automation initiatives.
* Define CI/CD standards incorporating Terraform validation, security scanning, policy enforcement, and cost optimization.
* Architect Terraform state management strategies using AWS S3 and DynamoDB.
* Conduct architecture reviews, code reviews, and technical assessments.
* Mentor Terraform engineers, cloud architects, and platform teams.
* Drive architectural decisions, governance standards, and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).
* Support cloud migration programs through reusable Terraform patterns and technical guidance.
* Collaborate with platform, security, and cloud engineering teams.
* Continuously optimize cloud infrastructure for performance, security, cost efficiency, and operational scalability.

 **Expertise You'll Bring:**

  

* 12\+ years of IT and cloud engineering experience.
* 6\+ years of enterprise\-scale Terraform architecture experience.
* Proven experience building and governing Terraform module libraries supporting 500\+ modules and 1000\+ cloud resources.
* Extensive experience with AWS architecture and multi\-account cloud governance.
* Strong expertise in Terraform (HCL) and Terraform Cloud/Enterprise.
* Deep understanding of AWS services including EC2, EKS, ECS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, RDS, DynamoDB, and CloudWatch.
* Experience with GitOps and CI/CD platforms such as GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CodePipeline, and ArgoCD.
* Hands\-on expertise with Sentinel and OPA Policy\-as\-Code frameworks.
* Experience with AWS Control Tower and Account Factory for Terraform (AFT).
* Strong knowledge of Terratest, TFLint, Tfsec, Checkov, and Infrastructure Security best practices.
* Experience managing Terraform state across multi\-account AWS environments.
* Knowledge of AWS Secrets Manager and Parameter Store

 **Benefits:**

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents

 **Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:**

  

Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.

7fe46194.title: Data Solution Architect
7fe46194.description:
We are seeking a skilled and experienced
 **Data Solution Architect** 
 to architect and design scalable data solutions, drive technical innovation and provide strategic direction in big data and analytics. The role involves collaborating with multiple teams to deliver robust, cloud\-based, cost\-effective data solutions.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Architect and design scalable solutions for big data analytics on cloud platforms
* Provide strategic vision for data ingestion, processing, security, governance and analytics scalability
* Serve as a technical leader, offering guidance across engineering and development teams
* Define and implement architectures for data warehouses and lakes based on business needs
* Evaluate and introduce architecture patterns such as Lambda, Kappa or Data Mesh into projects
* Optimize and monitor architecture for centralized, distributed, federated or decentralized data management
* Implement solutions leveraging AI/ML and Generative AI technologies for data\-driven automation
* Collaborate with multi\-disciplinary teams to ensure seamless integration of new technologies
* Develop prototypes using programming languages such as Python, Scala or Java for concept validation
* Implement and ensure DevOps and CI/CD best practices are followed throughout development
* Lead efforts around data security, protection and governance compliance







**Requirements** 



* 12\-16 years of experience in IT, including 2 or more production architecture designs or solution review activities over the past 2 to 3 years
* Knowledge of multiple architecture patterns such as DWH, Data Lake, Virtualization, Lambda, Kappa or Data Mesh
* Expertise in centralized, distributed, decentralized or federated data management approaches
* Background in AI/ML and Gen AI\-related technologies
* Proficiency in at least one cloud platform such as Azure, AWS, GCP or Snowflake
* Understanding of Big Data technologies including Spark, Spark Streaming, Hadoop, Kafka, Hive, NoSQL databases like HBase or Cassandra and orchestration tools (Airflow, Oozie)
* Competency in at least 2 Data Management domains such as BI \& Visualization, Data Integration, Data Engineering, Generative AI, Data Governance, Data Quality, Security and Storage
* Familiarity with DevOps and CI/CD tools like GitLab, Jenkins, Azure DevOps and containerization technologies
* Hands\-on skills in Python, R, Scala, Java or .NET for prototype and PoC development

c01ee69c.title: Solutions Architect
c01ee69c.description:
**About Agora**
 Agora is the global leader in real\-time engagement, providing developers with simple, flexible, and powerful APIs to embed real\-time conversational AI, voice, video, interactive live streaming, and chat into their applications and IoT devices. Headquartered in Santa Clara, CA, Agora is trusted by over 1,700 leading organizations across the globe to power best\-in\-class real\-time experiences from social media and live shopping to education and telehealth.
   

  

****Job Title:****
 Solutions Architect
   

  

****Location:****
 Hybrid (Delhi/ Bangalore)
   

  

**Job Summary**
 As a
 ****Solution Architect****
 at Agora, you’ll act as the technical expert bridging customer vision with Agora’s platform. You will design scalable architectures, lead complex integrations, and serve as a trusted advisor to strategic partners and enterprise customers building real\-time engagement applications. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on architecting robust technical solutions, enjoys teamwork, and loves collaborating with customers to bring ambitious ideas to life.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Partner with Sales teams to support revenue growth by aligning Agora’s real\-time engagement, conversational AI, and Agent Studio solutions with customer business drivers, operational challenges, and strategic use cases.
* Collaborate with mid\-market to enterprise customers and partners to understand technical requirements, architecture constraints, scalability goals, security considerations, and user experience expectations.
* Design, document, and propose scalable, secure, low\-latency, and high\-performance architectures leveraging Agora’s SDKs, APIs, Conversational AI stack, RTC infrastructure, and cloud\-native services.
* Lead technical discovery sessions, architecture workshops, deep dives, proof\-of\-concepts (POCs), and live demonstrations to validate solution fit and accelerate customer adoption.
* Provide expert\-level technical guidance to solution engineers, developers, customers, and partners during solution design, implementation, deployment, optimization, troubleshooting, and production scaling phases.
* Utilize modern AI\-assisted development and productivity tools such as Cursor, Codex, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and related AI engineering workflows to accelerate prototyping, integrations, troubleshooting, and solution delivery.
* Work cross\-functionally with Sales, Customer Success, Product Management, Engineering, Marketing, and Support teams to drive revenue goals, improve customer experience, and influence product direction based on market feedback.
* Design and present highly customized solution demonstrations and architecture narratives tailored to customer\-specific workflows, operational challenges, and industry use cases.
* Contribute to internal enablement assets including reference architectures, solution playbooks, integration guides, demo frameworks, technical documentation, support manuals, and reusable use case templates.
* Stay current with emerging trends and innovations across Conversational AI, Voice AI, Generative AI, WebRTC, real\-time engagement, cloud communications, and developer tooling to proactively advise customers and internal teams.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor for customers by balancing business objectives, product capabilities, compliance considerations, scalability requirements, and long\-term platform strategy.


**Qualifications And Necessary Skills**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.
* 7 to 9 years of experience in Solutions Engineering, Pre\-Sales, Technical Consulting, Developer Support, or Software Development.
* Strong programming skills in at least one modern language such as JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, Swift, or Kotlin.
* Experience with modern development frameworks such as React Native or Flutter.
* Familiarity with enterprise tools including Salesforce, JIRA, Zendesk, and Confluence.
* Hands\-on expertise in Conversational AI, Voice AI, WebRTC, SIP/PSTN integrations, real\-time streaming, LLM orchestration, ASR/TTS, MCP/function calling frameworks, and AI\-driven engagement systems.
* Solid understanding of SDK integrations, REST APIs, and mobile/web application architectures.
* Strong communication and presentation skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and business audiences.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving mindset with the ability to design innovative and scalable solutions.


**Nice To Have Skills**
* Familiarity with telecom ecosystems including SIP, PSTN, and CPaaS platforms.
* Understanding of security, compliance, and encryption standards for real\-time communications and AI systems.
* Experience with multi\-region deployments, scalability, and low\-latency optimization.
* Contributions to developer communities, open\-source project

f4e2927a.title: Senior Lead Digital Innovation Engineer - Solution Architect
f4e2927a.description:
**Description**
**Solution Architect**
 Location : Chennai, India
   

  

 Required Language : English
   

  

 Employment Type : Full Time
   

  

 Seniority Level : Mid \- Senior Level
   

  

 Travel : \<10%
   

  

 Buckman is a privately held, global specialty chemical company with headquarters in Memphis, TN, USA, committed to safeguarding the environment, maintaining safety in the workplace, and promoting sustainable development. Buckman delivers exceptional service and innovative solutions to our customers globally in the pulp and paper, leather, and water treatment sectors to help boost productivity, reduce risk, improve product quality, and provide a measurable return on investment. Buckman is in the middle of a digital transformation of its businesses and focused on building the capabilities and tools in support of this.
   

  

**Purpose of the Job**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Solutions Architect to join our team. This role is critical for integrating various solution components and developing comprehensive deployment strategies. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in solution architecture, cloud systems, and deployment strategies, with a keen ability to see the big picture and drive innovative solutions.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Solution Integration: Design and integrate various solution components developed using Microsoft stack into a cohesive and scalable architecture.
* Strategic Planning: Develop and implement strategies for deploying solutions across various environments, ensuring scalability, reliability, and security.
* Development : Participate in all phases of the software development life cycle utilizing Agile Scrum methodology in the creation of new software products. Work hands\-on with development team to prepare/review detailed Technical Design, do code reviews, ensure delivery as per committed estimates with high quality.
* Re\-architecture : Conduct Design and code reviews for the developed modules and provide detailed analysis and propose improvements based on code maintainability, scalability, performance, and reliability.
* Technical Leadership: Provide technical guidance and mentorship to development teams, ensuring best practices in architecture, design, and deployment.
* Full Stack Coverage: Oversee the full technology stack, including frontend, backend, databases, and cloud infrastructure.
* Collaboration: Work closely with product owners, developers, and other stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver robust solutions.
* Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive architectural documentation and deployment guides.
* Innovation: Stay updated with the latest trends and technologies in solution architecture, advocating for their adoption where appropriate.
* Quality Assurance: Ensure all solutions meet high standards of quality, performance, and security.
* Architecture: Strong understanding of architectural principles, including microservices, serverless, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience: Minimum of 10 years in solution architecture with a strong focus on integrating complex systems and deploying scalable solutions.
* Design : Solution Architecture and Design using Microsoft Stack with minimum of 5 years’ experience
* Delivery : Technical Management and Delivery of products with minimum of 5 years’ experience
* Cloud : Azure Services \- Min 5 Years of experience in Integration with Azure IoT Hub, Functions, Cosmos DB, Service Bus Queue, Key Vault Stream Analytics, Web API, Azure Data Factory, SQL Azure, Azure AD
* Development : Dot Net Core, C\# MVC, React JS, React native \- Min 10 Years
* Experience working on IOT Platforms (Design and Development) \- Min 3 Years
* Azure DevOps and Infrastructure \- Min 3 Years
* Relational/ Non \-Relational Database (SQL/Cosmos DB) \- Min 5 Years
* Microsoft Certified Technical Architect (AZ 305 \- Mandatory)
* Experience with full stack SaaS development.
* Deployment: Experience with CI/CD pipelines, automation tools, and deployment strategies.


**Preferred Personality Traits**
* Problem\-Solving: Excellent problem\-solving skills and the ability to think critically and strategically.
* Communication: Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders

92e7a420.title: Senior Developer - Salesforce Marketing Cloud
92e7a420.description:
At Accendra Health, we understand that healthcare is complex, and we’re here to make it easier. We help deliver care beyond traditional settings, making essential products and services more accessible through every stage of life. As part of the care team, our teammates play a critical role in delivering personalized, long\-term care for the patients we serve.

  

With deep expertise promoting health outside the hospital and a presence in communities nationwide through our Apria and Byram Healthcare brands, Accendra Health does more than just deliver the essentials.

  

If you’re interested in meaningful work with impact, explore our career opportunities and join us in our purpose of Bringing Care To Life™.

**Title: Senior Developer, Salesforce Marketing Cloud**
=======================================================


Reporting to – Director, IT Applications

**Scope**
=========


Accendra Health is seeking an experienced and highly skilled Senior Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have hands\-on expertise in Salesforce development you will participate in and drive Marketing Cloud implementations. While mostly focused on delivery, you may be involved across the entire project lifecycle. An integral part of your role will be working with internal business teams to further our digital marketing through Marketing Cloud usage. You will act as a trusted source of knowledge to advise business in line with Marketing Cloud best practice and its growing number of capabilities to ultimately build a vision for a multi\-channel roadmap.

**Responsibilities**
====================


Aspects of what we need

**Solution Implementation:**

* Utilize knowledge of **Marketing Cloud** to enhance customer\-facing and internal processes, mobile connect experience, SMS campaigns, and experience with APIs
* Develop, configure, implement and data migration working with Marketing Cloud and other integrations
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to design, implement, and optimize Marketing Cloud solutions
* Communicate project concepts and outcomes to client project stakeholders
* Design and delivery of solutions in Email Studio including A / B testing
* Design and implement, for automated email/mobile journeys using Email Studio, Mobile Studio, Automation Studio and Journey Builder, and advise clients on how to optimize further
* Strong understanding of digital marketing KPIs, such as email marketing, PPC and other marketing conversion metrics
* Experience in reporting and analyzing email activity using Email Studio reports and Journey Builder. (Nice to have) proficiency with Data Views and Discover Reports within Analytics Builder, Einstein Engagement
* Design and/or build integrations between Marketing Cloud and 3rd party applications or data sources like Snowflake
* Conduct user training and actively promote user adoption of Marketing Cloud
* Track record for delivering marketing automation projects in a fast\-paced environment, and able to successfully keep to deadlines
* Take ownership of projects and deliver quality solutions within timelines
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather and analyze requirements, and provide innovative solutions aligned with Accendra Health’s core values.

**Integration \& Technical acumen:**

* Build and maintain integration between Salesforce and other enterprise systems
* Ensure the quality and performance of the implemented solutions through code reviews, testing, and optimization.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to integrate Salesforce with other systems and external data sources
* Ensure adherence to best practices, coding standards, and security protocols
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues, ensuring platform stability and performance

**Qualifications**
==================

* 5\+ years of hands\-on Salesforce development experience
* Ability to work with clients to design customer journeys, and associate data models.
* **Extensive experience with Marketing Cloud Studios \& Builders**, most importantly Email Studio, Content Builder, Journey Builder and Automation Studio, and ideally also Cloud Pages and Mobile Studio
* Understanding how to build a custom preference center
* Conceptual understanding, to be able to establish data models, work with API’s and configurations
* Knowledge of some of the programming languages in SFMC: AMPScript, HTML and CSS, SSJS and/or JavaScript, SQL (andQuery Studio experience) or Guide Template Language
* Experience with Salesforce CRM (Sales \& Service Cloud, Communities)
* Strong understanding of data modeling, database design, and data security principles
* Excellent problem\-solving, analytical, and troubleshooting skills
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to coordinate with cross\-functional teams. Experience in mentoring team members

**Work Hours:**
===============

* This role requires working in India Standard Time (IST) hours during a portion of US hours to ensure seamless collaboration with US teams
* Working hours 2 pm – 11 pm IST/ 3 pm IST – 12 Midnight / 5 pm IST – 2 am IST (will be decided)

**Additional Qualifications**
=============================


The following areas would be a plus

* Snowflake integration
* Certified Marketing Cloud Consultant
* Certified Marketing Cloud Email Specialist


If you feel this opportunity could be the next step in your career, we encourage you to apply.


Accendra is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, genetic information, religion, disability, age, status as a veteran, or any other status prohibited by applicable national, federal, state or local law.

*Note: Accendra is not accepting unsolicited assistance from search firms for this employment opportunity. Please, no phone calls or emails. All resumes submitted by search firms to any employee at our Company via email, the Internet, or in any form and/or method without a valid written search agreement in place for this position will be deemed the sole property of our Company. No fee will be paid in the event the candidate is hired by our Company as a result of the referral or through other means.*


\#AccendraHealth

c8685288.title: Cloud Engineer
c8685288.description:
**Why Join IDX?** 




**Not Just Any Brands:** 
 See your work come to life for iconic brands like Vodafone, Rolls Royce and Diageo.
 



**Collaborative Spirit:** 
 Work alongside passionate innovators who share your thirst for progress.
 



**Continuous Learning:** 
 Grow your skills with ongoing training, mentorship, and the freedom to experiment.
 



**Fast Paced \& Fun:** 
 Thrive in a dynamic environment where big ideas and bold action collide.
 



**Cutting\-Edge Technology:** 
 Play with the latest analytics tools, use AR to build immersive digital events, and explore the future of brand storytelling!
 



**Global Presence:** 
 We Get It Done morning, day and night with offices across multiple time\-zones!
 



**Our Perks:** 



* 29 paid annual leave days.
* 10 Festival holidays (including 1 optional Holiday for your special day through the year).
* Family Insurance Plan.
* Accident Insurance Plan.
* Regular Wellness Sessions.
* Regular Rewards \& Recognition.
* Opportunity to participate in charity initiatives and volunteering.
* Opportunity to participate in Cultural and Sporting Events.



**The Gig:** 




 We are looking for a skilled Cloud Engineer to join our cloud infrastructure and DevOps team. The role involves managing cloud environments, application servers, and automation workflows. The ideal candidate will have prior experience in cloud technologies and system administration with the ability to troubleshoot, optimize, and deliver solutions in a 24x7 production environment.
 



**What you'll be doing:** 



* Install, configure, and maintain IIS/Apache/Nginx web servers.
* Deploy and configure .NET applications on IIS/Apache/Nginx with SSL integration.
* Analyze logs and troubleshoot application/server issues.
* Manage and secure Windows and Linux OS environments, including upgrades and patches.
* Develop automation scripts using PowerShell and Shell scripting.
* Ensure SLA\-based resolution of incidents and execution of changes.
* Configure and manage AWS services such as EC2, Route53, ALB, S3, CloudFront, ECS, VPC, RDS, AWS backup certificate manager, and Docker.
* Work with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Docker).
* Handle networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, SSL/TLS).
* Provide production support in a 24x7 environment, including rotational shifts.



**About you:** 



* 6\-7 years of experience in Cloud/System Administration.
* Strong knowledge of AWS tools and services.
* Proficiency in PowerShell and Shell scripting.
* Hands\-on with Jenkins, Docker, SSL, DNS.
* Good understanding of web technologies and application servers.
* Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent teamwork, communication, and customer service orientation.
* Willingness to work in rotational shifts.



**About Us** 




 IDX isn't your average communications company. With over 20 years industry experience and a portfolio of prominent global clients, our award\-winning communication solutions are seen by billions every month across a global audience.
 



 We seek The Bold. Shatter expectations, push boundaries \- that's the fuel that ignites our powerhouse team. Collaboration is our superpower, where we bring expertise and individuality to elevate and deliver. Rising Stars with boundless hunger, this is your launchpad. Seasoned pros who want to define their Legacy in the industry, this is your home.
 **Be BOLD \- Own Your Story at IDX.** 




**An Inclusive Workplace** 




 IDX is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We aim to foster an environment that desires and recruits diverse talent, cultivates a culture that celebrates all identities, life experiences, perspectives, and ensures equal opportunity for all.

aa439fec.title: Managed Services Director
aa439fec.description:
ACA is seeking a
 **Managed Services Director \- Pune** 
 \- to lead and scale Managed Services delivery in Pune in alignment with ACA’s global Managed Services strategy, operating model, and governance. This is a critical leadership role that combines regional delivery leadership with end\-to\-end execution accountability, partnering closely with global Managed Services leadership to operationalize priorities, integrate seamlessly with US and UK delivery teams, and continuously improve delivery performance, quality, and scalability. This role operates within globally established strategy and decision\-making frameworks, with accountability focused on execution excellence, delivery outcomes, and regional operational maturity.
   

  

**Job Duties**
 Will serve as the regional execution lead for Managed Services delivery in Pune, accountable for delivery outcomes, operational performance, and integration with global Managed Services, to include:
   

  

  

* Scaling billable Managed Services delivery from India
* Embedding global ‑ standard processes, quality, and governance
* Integrating India seamlessly with US/UK delivery teams
* Building durable, institutional capabilities (not person ‑ dependent delivery)


**Regional Leadership \& Global Alignment**
* Serve as the regional execution lead for Managed Services delivery in adherence with global standards.
* Translate ACA’s global Managed Services Strategy and roadmap into executable regional delivery plans.
* Act as the primary interface between Pune delivery leadership and US/UK leadership, ensuring alignment, transparency, and effective feedback loops.
* Support the migration and scaling of globally aligned workstreams into Pune in coordination with global leadership.


**Regional Delivery Execution**
* Own the execution of the delivery lifecycle for Managed Services, including intake, prioritization, capacity planning, execution, and follow the sun handoffs.
* Drive a material increase in billable utilization, throughput, and billable delivery responsibility from Pune while maintaining quality and SLA performance.
* Ensure delivery workflows are location\-agnostic and aligned with global queue\-based, pulled\-work, or follow\-the\-sun models.
* Partner with global leaders on prioritization, sequencing, and workload balancing decision impacting global delivery.


**Quality, Risk \& Governance**
* Implement, enforce, and continuously improve globally defined quality frameworks, including acceptance criteria, rework standards, turnaround times, and stakeholder satisfaction measures.
* Ensure all India delivery is audit ready, with documented SOPs, controls, and escalation paths aligned to global governance requirements.
* Lead root cause analysis and remediation for quality issues or delivery failures.
* Serve as the primary Pune\-based escalation point for delivery risks, partnering with global Managed Services leadership on material issues and decisions.


**Process, Technology \& AI Enablement**
* Institutionalize knowledge by converting SME visits and rotations into documented global SOPs, playbooks, and certification paths.
* Champion adoption of AI\-enabled workflows (e.g., Alpha Hub) within Pune delivery
* Drive measurable improvements in productivity, quality, and scalability gains through disciplined process execution and technology adoption.


**People Leadership \& Talent Strategy**
* Own the regional workforce strategy for Pune Managed Services delivery, including capacity planning, role design, leadership bench strength, and succession planning.
* Build durable, process\-led delivery capabilities that reduce dependency on individual contributors.
* Champion ACA’s culture, values, and employee value proposition


**Metrics, Reporting \& Executive Confidence**
* Leverage delivery dashboards covering utilization, quality, SLAs, capacity, and operational health.
* Provide transparent reporting, execution\-level insights, and action plans to global Managed Services leadership.
* Reinforce executive confidence in Pune’s ability to reliably scale complex, high quality Managed Services delivery within the global model


**Required Education And Experience**
* 18\+ years in Managed Services, professional services, GCC/offshore delivery, or scaled operations
* Proven track record leading complex, multi ‑ service delivery teams in India
* Strong exposure to global operating models, quality governance, and utilization management
* Experience leveraging technology and AI to scale service delivery preferred
* Operate comfortably with global senior leadership Strong knowledge of project management methodologies, tools, and software; familiarity with Certinia (PSA) will be added advantage.
* Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor project teams effectively.
* Excellent problem\-solving, organizational, and decision\-making skills.
* Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
* Attention to detail and ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
* Familiar with Salesforce, Conga CLM, Salesforce CPQ.


**Preferred Education And Experience**
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for effective coordination across teams and external partners.


**Required Skills And Attributes**
* Have scaled large, billable delivery organizations in India serving global clients
* Be equally credible in strategy discussions and operational execution
* Build process ‑ led, audit ‑ ready operations
* Demonstrate strong US/UK stakeholder management and follow ‑ the ‑ sun delivery experience


**What working at ACA offers:**
 We offer a competitive compensation package where you’ll be rewarded based on your performance and recognized for the value you bring to our business. Our Total Rewards package includes medical coverage fully funded by ACA for employees and their family as well as access to Maternity \& Fertility and Wellness programs. ACA also provides Personal Accident Insurance, Group Term Life Insurance, Employee Discount programs and Employee Resource Groups. You’ll be granted time off for designated ACA Paid Holidays, Privilege Leave, Casual/Sick Leave, and other leaves of absence to support your physical, financial and emotional well\-being.
   

  

**What we commit to:**
 ACA is firmly committed to a policy of nondiscrimination, which applies to recruiting, hiring, placement, promotions, training, discipline, terminations, layoffs, transfers, leaves of absence, compensation and all other terms and conditions of employment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability or protected veteran status, or any other legally protected status.

015a29f0.title: Managed Services - Private Wealth - Manager
015a29f0.description:
The Opportunity
   

  

 Join our Acceleration Center India and help shape the future of business for our diverse client portfolio across geographies and jurisdictions. You’ll work at the heart of global teams across Advisory, Assurance, Tax and Business Services—solving real client challenges through connected collaboration. We’ll help you grow your skills so you can go further. With hands\-on learning, cutting\-edge tools and an inclusive culture, this is your opportunity to do inspiring work that makes a difference—every day.
   

  

 As a Managed Services \- Private Wealth \- Manager, you will play a pivotal role in delivering outsourced solutions that streamline operations, reduce costs, and enhance efficiency for our clients. Within our Assurance practice, you will leverage your skills in project management, technology, and process optimization to execute key processes such as client interaction, data review, and quality control implementation. As a Manager, you will inspire and develop your team, fostering a culture of integrity and authenticity while articulating our purpose and values in a meaningful way. You are expected to lead with strategic planning and mentor junior staff, identifying opportunities that contribute to the success of our firm.
   

  

 As part of the Managed Services team you will lead the delivery of exceptional fund finance and accounting solutions across diverse client engagements. As a Manager, you will oversee operations, mentor onshore and offshore team members, and uphold compliance with accounting standards while driving excellence in service delivery. This role offers a unique opportunity to enhance your leadership skills, work with cross\-functional teams, and contribute to the success of our clients through innovative solutions and process enhancements.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Drive process improvements and implement innovative solutions
* Foster a culture of excellence and accountability within the team
* Analyze client needs to identify opportunities for service enhancement
* Mentor and develop team members to enhance their skills


 What You Must Have
   

  

* At least a Bachelor's degree
* At least 7 years of experience
* Oral and written proficiency in English required


 What Sets You Apart
   

  

* Strong command of end\-to\-end accounting processes, including general ledger, reconciliations, financial reporting, AP/AR, and close cycles.
* Experience in managed services, SLA\-based client environments, or outsourced finance preferred
* Exposure to AP/AR automation, expense management tools, or business intelligence/reporting solutions
* Proficiency in modern accounting or ERP systems
* Demonstrating leadership in supervising and coaching teams
* Excelling in analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Managing multiple clients and priorities effectively
* Driving process improvements through automation and efficiency
* Supporting client communications and managing expectations

d41d3f58.title: DevOps SRE Delivery Manager
d41d3f58.description:
**Role Description**
**Job Description:**
 UST’s DevOps Practice is looking for a highly skilled AI for SDLC along with DevOps and SRE Delivery Manager to oversee DevOps and SRE transformation programs for our enterprise clients. The ideal candidate will possess a comprehensive understanding of DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) principles, coupled with strong program management capabilities.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Spearhead the planning, execution, and delivery of AI for SDLC along with DevOps and SRE transformation programs for enterprise clients, while effectively managing project budgets and financials.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define program objectives, milestones, and success criteria, ensuring alignment with organizational goals and budgetary guidelines.
* Develop and implement action plans to optimize software development, deployment, and operations workflows.
* Provide strategic guidance and technical oversight to project teams, ensuring alignment with industry best practices and standards.
* Identify program risks and dependencies and proactively devise mitigation strategies to ensure program success.
* Monitor program finances closely, and margin improvement actions as needed.
* Foster effective communication and collaboration across cross\-functional teams, facilitating transparency and accountability.
* Monitor program performance and KPIs, and provide regular updates to stakeholders on progress, challenges, and opportunities.
* Drive a culture of continuous improvement and innovation, promoting the adoption of emerging technologies and methodologies in AI for SDLC, DevOps and SRE.
* Collaborate with sales and solutioning teams to understand client requirements and develop tailored AI for SDLC, DevOps and SRE solutions.
* Participate in client presentations, proposal development, and technical demonstrations to articulate the value proposition of UST’s AI for SDLC, DevOps and SRE offerings.
* Support the creation of RFP/RFI responses, including solution architecture, effort estimation, and project planning.
* Engage with prospective clients to assess needs, identify opportunities, and provide consultative guidance on AI for SDLC, DevOps and SRE transformation journeys.
* Work closely with business development teams to ensure alignment between client expectations and delivery capabilities.


**Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, Business Administration, or a related technical field.
* 15\+ years of experience in IT with at least 7 years in managerial capacity.
* Proven track record of successfully managing high\-impact programs in the AI for SDLC, DevOps and SRE domain.
* Demonstrated expertise in program management – planning, execution, risk mitigation, and financial management of transformational initiatives.
* Proficiency in software development methodologies such as Agile, Scrum, and Kanban.
* Deep understanding of DevOps principles, practices, and tools, including CI/CD pipelines, automation, and infrastructure as code.
* Familiarity with SRE concepts and practices, including monitoring, incident management, and reliability engineering.
* Strong communication, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence and inspire cross\-functional teams.
* Good analytical and problem\-solving abilities, with a keen eye for detail and a results\-driven mindset.
* Relevant certifications in program management (e.g., PMP, PgMP), ITIL, Agile/Scrum or technical certifications are highly desirable.
* Prior experience in a Pre\-Sales or Solution Architect role within the IT services industry, preferably focused on DevOps and SRE solutions.
* Strong ability to communicate technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders and influence decision\-making during the sales cycle.
* Demonstrated experience in preparing proposals, presentations, and technical documentation for enterprise clients.


**Skills**
 DevOps, SRE, Delivery management, Agile, Change management, Client management, PMP

55f82b89.title: Delivery Manager I
55f82b89.description:
**Role Description**
 We are seeking an experienced and results\-driven
 **Transformation Delivery Manager** 
 to lead strategic technology transformation initiatives and manage the successful delivery of large\-scale fixed bid programs for a specific customer, account, or industry vertical.
   

  

 This role serves as the single point of accountability for delivery excellence, commercial performance, customer satisfaction, and business outcomes across a portfolio of transformation initiatives. The Transformation Delivery Manager will be responsible for driving complex digital transformation programs from strategy through execution while ensuring predictable delivery, contractual compliance, margin achievement, and customer success.
   

  

 The ideal candidate combines deep expertise in program delivery, fixed bid project management, transformation leadership, customer engagement, financial governance, and operational excellence. This role requires extensive experience managing multi\-million\-dollar fixed bid engagements, distributed global teams, and large\-scale product/platform implementations.
   

  

 The Transformation Delivery Manager will work closely with customer executives, business stakeholders, architects, engineering leaders, product teams, project managers, and delivery organizations to ensure transformation objectives are achieved within agreed scope, schedule, quality, and financial commitments.
   

  

**Preferred Domain Expertise**
* Telecom Operations / AIOps / Network Operations
* Healthcare \& HealthTech Platforms
* Banking, Financial Services \& Insurance (BFSI)


**Key Responsibilities**
**Transformation \& Delivery Leadership**
* Own end\-to\-end delivery accountability for transformation programs, product implementations, platform modernization initiatives, and large\-scale fixed bid engagements.
* Lead strategic transformation roadmaps focused on digital modernization, cloud adoption, AI\-enabled operations, automation, process transformation, and platform engineering.
* Translate customer business objectives into executable delivery plans, measurable outcomes, and transformation milestones.
* Ensure successful realization of transformation goals while maintaining delivery predictability and customer confidence.
* Act as the primary delivery executive responsible for program success, customer satisfaction, and business outcomes.


**Large\-Scale Fixed Bid Program Delivery**
* Lead delivery of complex fixed bid projects and programs with full accountability for scope, schedule, quality, cost, and contractual commitments.
* Establish robust delivery governance frameworks to ensure projects are delivered within approved budgets and timelines.
* Manage multi\-workstream programs involving cross\-functional teams, third\-party vendors, and geographically distributed delivery organizations.
* Drive proactive scope management and prevent scope creep through disciplined change control processes.
* Ensure contractual obligations, service commitments, milestones, and acceptance criteria are achieved.
* Identify delivery risks early and implement mitigation plans to protect schedule, quality, and financial targets.
* Manage customer expectations while balancing delivery commitments and commercial objectives.
* Drive successful execution of product implementation, migration, modernization, and transformation programs.


**Financial \& Commercial Management**
* Own P\&L responsibility for assigned programs and portfolios.
* Ensure achievement of revenue, margin, utilization, profitability, and cost management targets.
* Monitor project financial health through forecasting, budget tracking, earned value analysis, and variance management.
* Lead estimation reviews, solution validation, effort planning, and pricing governance for fixed bid engagements.
* Drive financial discipline through effective resource utilization, productivity improvements, and operational efficiencies.
* Manage contractual changes, commercial negotiations, and scope governance to protect project profitability.
* Provide accurate forecasting and financial reporting to leadership and customer stakeholders.


**Customer Engagement \& Executive Stakeholder Management**
* Serve as the trusted delivery advisor and strategic partner to customer leadership teams.
* Build strong executive relationships across business, technology, operations, and transformation functions.
* Lead executive governance meetings, steering committees, operational reviews, and transformation status reviews.
* Communicate program health, risks, dependencies, financial performance, and business outcomes effectively.
* Proactively manage escalations and drive timely resolution of critical customer issues.
* Identify opportunities for account expansion, additional transformation initiatives, and value creation.
* Ensure customer expectations are aligned with contractual commitments and delivery realities.


**Delivery Governance \& Operational Excellence**
* Establish and enforce delivery governance standards across all programs and projects.
* Drive rigorous program management through dashboards, KPI tracking, RAID management, milestone reviews, and executive reporting.
* Monitor delivery performance across scope, schedule, quality, cost, resource utilization, and customer satisfaction metrics.
* Ensure compliance with organizational delivery frameworks, quality processes, security requirements, and governance standards.
* Promote a culture of accountability, transparency, continuous improvement, and execution excellence.
* Implement standardized delivery practices that improve predictability and reduce execution risks.


**Program \& Portfolio Management**
* Manage multiple concurrent transformation initiatives within the assigned account or industry vertical.
* Ensure alignment between strategic objectives, business priorities, and delivery execution.
* Balance competing priorities, resource constraints, and customer expectations across programs.
* Drive dependency management and cross\-functional coordination to achieve portfolio objectives.
* Establish portfolio\-level reporting, governance, and performance measurement mechanisms.


**Cross\-Functional Leadership**
* Lead and influence diverse teams including architects, engineering managers, project managers, QA leaders, DevOps teams, product owners, business analysts, and customer stakeholders.
* Drive collaboration across onsite, offshore, and nearshore delivery teams.
* Remove execution bottlenecks and facilitate timely decision\-making.
* Champion engineering best practices, automation, AI\-enabled delivery models, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Mentor delivery managers and project leaders to build a high\-performance delivery organization.


**Domain Leadership**
**Telecom Operations / AIOps**
* OSS/BSS transformation and modernization
* Network operations transformation
* Service assurance and observability platforms
* AI\-driven operations and automation
* Event management and operational analytics


**Healthcare**
* Digital health and healthcare platform modernization
* Claims, payer, provider, and member solutions
* Regulatory compliance and healthcare operations
* Patient engagement and experience transformation


**BFSI**
* Digital banking and financial services platforms
* Lending, payments, insurance, and wealth management solutions
* Regulatory and compliance\-driven transformation initiatives
* Customer experience modernization programs


**Experience**
**Required Skills \& Experience**
* 12\+ years of overall IT industry experience.
* 7\+ years of progressive experience in Delivery Management, Program Management, Transformation Leadership, or Portfolio Management roles.
* Proven track record of successfully delivering large\-scale fixed bid programs and enterprise transformation initiatives.
* Experience managing programs with multi\-million\-dollar budgets and distributed global delivery teams.
* Strong experience delivering enterprise software implementations, platform modernization, cloud transformation, and digital initiatives.
* Demonstrated success in managing customer relationships at executive and senior leadership levels.
* Experience managing contractual commitments, commercial governance, and delivery profitability.
* Strong understanding of Agile, Hybrid, and traditional program delivery methodologies.


**Core Competencies**
**Delivery \& Transformation Leadership**
* Large\-Scale Program Delivery
* Fixed Bid Project Management
* Digital Transformation Leadership
* Product \& Platform Implementation Delivery
* Portfolio Management


**Commercial \& Financial Management**
* P\&L Ownership
* Financial Forecasting \& Budget Management
* Margin Optimization
* Commercial Governance
* Contract \& Scope Management


**Customer Leadership**
* Executive Stakeholder Management
* Customer Relationship Management
* Executive Communication \& Presentation
* Escalation Management
* Strategic Account Growth


**Operational Excellence**
* Delivery Governance
* Risk \& Dependency Management
* Quality \& Compliance Management
* Resource \& Capacity Planning
* Continuous Improvement


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
* PMP, PgMP, SAFe Program Consultant (SPC), Agile, Scrum, or equivalent certifications preferred.
* Experience delivering fixed bid programs exceeding 5M\-10M in value.
* Domain expertise in Telecom Operations/AIOps, Healthcare, or BFSI strongly preferred.


**Skills**
 delivery management,operation transformation,project management,artificial intelligence,

0f19de05.title: Delivery Lead
0f19de05.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Works in the area of Software Engineering, which encompasses the development, maintenance and optimization of software solutions/applications.1\. Applies scientific methods to analyse and solve software engineering problems.2\. He/she is responsible for the development and application of software engineering practice and knowledge, in research, design, development and maintenance.3\. His/her work requires the exercise of original thought and judgement and the ability to supervise the technical and administrative work of other software engineers.4\. The software engineer builds skills and expertise of his/her software engineering discipline to reach standard software engineer skills expectations for the applicable role, as defined in Professional Communities.5\. The software engineer collaborates and acts as team player with other software engineers and stakeholders.
   

  

**Job Description \- Grade Specific**
 Has expert level of understanding of software development principles and technical proficiency. Thought Leader for the software development lifecycle, innovation and industrialization. Guides technology and methods for software engineering at group level. Delivers most complex solutions and programs. Is well respected at exec level. Represents the group as an ambassador. Focuses on developing strategic partnerships. Influences and develops the future direction of our customer base. Develops and implements innovative solutions to complex business opportunities. Leads and motivates multi\-functional teams in diverse or complex environments.
   

  

 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \| www.capgemini.com

**Job Description**
**About the Role**
 We're looking for a Program Manager who brings structure, clarity, and momentum to cross\-functional technical programs. You'll partner with engineering, product, and business teams to keep programs organized and moving, while driving execution, coordination, and on\-time delivery.This is a hands\-on role for someone who is comfortable in the details, keeps multiple workstreams OnTrack, and builds trust and alignment across teams.

* Manage cross\-functional programs from planning and initiation through execution and closure.

* Familiarity with release management and CI/CD delivery models in technical environments.
* Comfortable building and maintaining reporting dashboards.
* PMP or SAFe certification is a plus. Equivalent real\-world experience is equally valued

b0ec98ac.description:
**Experience** 
 : 8\.00 \+ years
   

  

**Salary** 
 : INR 3600000\-3800000 / year (based on experience)
   

  

**Expected Notice Period** 
 : 30 Days
   

  

**Shift** 
 : (GMT\+05:30\) Asia/Kolkata (IST)
   

  

**Opportunity Type** 
 : Hybrid ()
   

  

**Placement Type** 
 : Full Time Permanent position(Payroll and Compliance to be managed by: Aokah)
   

  

**(\*Note: This is a requirement for one of Uplers' client \- Aokah)
   

  

**What do you need for this opportunity?
   

  

**Must have skills required:**
 and platform\-driven intelligence, Blend consulting, delivery leadership, GCC Strategy \& Client Advisory
   

  

**Aokah is Looking for:******
**Client Delivery Manager**
**Location:** 
 Bengaluru, India
 **Type:** 
 Full\-Time
 **Reporting To:** 
 Director \- Client Delivery
 **Business Unit:** 
 Client Delivery
   

  

**About Aokah**
 Aokah is the world''s first Expert \+ Intelligence platform designed to help enterprises design, build, scale, and govern Global Capability Centers (GCCs) with speed, confidence, and resilience.
   

  

 We combine expert\-led delivery, intelligence frameworks, and platform orchestration to enable enterprise leaders to make structured, high\-confidence decisions across the global sourcing and GCC lifecycle.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The Client Delivery Manager is responsible for leading customer engagements across Global Capability Center (GCC) strategy and build, sourcing, vendor management, and transformation programs.
   

  

 This is a highly client\-facing leadership role responsible for ensuring successful customer outcomes through a combination of platform intelligence, consulting expertise, and disciplined program execution.
   

  

 The Client Delivery Manager serves as the primary engagement lead for assigned clients, managing executive stakeholders, delivery teams, governance forums, and strategic workstreams. The role combines consulting, program management, financial analysis, sourcing advisory, and customer success responsibilities.
   

  

 The individual will work closely with enterprise leaders, ecosystem partners, and internal teams to translate client''s globalization and transformation requirements into structured program delivery and actionable outcomes while driving adoption of Aokah''s intelligence platform.
   

  

**What You''ll Do**
* Client Engagement Leadership
* Serve as the primary point of contact for enterprise clients across assigned engagements with a primary focus on GCC industry
* Work closely with client teams to formulate and execute clients'' GCC strategy
* Lead customer workshops, product demos and support executive presentations
* Be a trusted advisors to clients in the GCC and sourcing advisory
* Drive adoption of Aokah''s platform and solution frameworks
* Ensure delivery quality, customer satisfaction, and achievement of program objectives.
* Manage engagement risks, escalations, and stakeholder expectations.
* 2\. Program \& Delivery Management
* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of sourcing, GCC, and transformation programs.
* Define project plans, milestones, governance structures, and delivery frameworks.
* Manage multiple workstreams and ensure timely delivery of client commitments.
* Monitor program performance, dependencies, risks, and issue resolution.
* Drive operational rigor and execution excellence across engagements.
* Ensure delivery consistency using Aokah methodologies and best practices.
* 3\. Strategic Advisory \& Decision Support
* Support enterprise leaders in evaluating global delivery models and expansion strategies\- sourcing transformation, GCC strategy and build, location assessment, operating model design
* Provide strategic recommendations supported by platform intelligence and market insights.
* Facilitate executive decision\-making through structured analysis and recommendations.
* 4\. Financial \& Commercial Leadership
* Lead development and review of business cases, financial models, and investment analysis.
* Evaluate sourcing economics, vendor proposals, pricing structures, and commercial models.
* Conduct scenario analysis, cost benchmarking, and value realization assessments.
* Advise clients on commercial negotiations and financial implications of sourcing decisions.
* 5\. Ecosystem \& Vendor Management
* Lead RFI, RFQ, and RFP initiatives.
* Evaluate service providers using structured scoring methodologies.
* Facilitate partner selection and ecosystem assessments.
* Provide comparative analysis across vendors, locations, and delivery models.
* Contribute to development of reusable platform\-based evaluation frameworks.
* 6\. Team Leadership \& Capability Development
* Lead and mentor Client Delivery Analysts and Consultants.
* Review and ensure quality of all client\-facing deliverables.
* Develop team capabilities in consulting, financial analysis, sourcing advisory, and client management.
* Drive a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
* Support hiring and onboarding of delivery team members.
* 7\. Governance, Risk \& Quality Management
* Establish governance frameworks for customer programs.
* Monitor delivery health, risk exposure, and mitigation plans.
* Ensure adherence to quality standards and delivery methodologies.
* Provide executive reporting and leadership updates.
* Who You Are
* Trusted Advisor Able to engage confidently with C\-level executives and senior business leaders.
* Strategic Thinker Can connect sourcing, GCC, talent, ecosystem, and financial decisions into actionable business outcomes.
* Delivery Leader Experienced in managing complex, multi\-stakeholder programs.
* Financially Strong Comfortable leading business cases, commercial evaluations, and financial modeling discussions.
* Exceptional Communicator Strong executive presence, storytelling, and presentation skills.
* Team Builder Able to coach, mentor, and develop high\-performing delivery teams.
* High Ownership Takes accountability for customer outcomes and delivery excellence.
* Experience
* Bachelor''s degree in Business, Engineering, Finance, Economics, Technology, or related field.
* 8\-12 years of experience in:
* GCC Advisory
* Consulting
* Client Delivery
* Global Sourcing
* Vendor Management
* Shared Services
* Experience managing enterprise client engagements and executive stakeholders.
* Strong expertise in:
* GCC Strategy \& Setup
* Global Sourcing
* Program Management
* Financial Modeling
* Vendor Evaluation
* Advanced proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint.
* Experience leading client\-facing teams and delivery programs.
* PMP, MBA, CFA, Six Sigma, or equivalent certifications are desirable but not mandatory.
* What Makes This Role Different
* Lead strategic GCC and sourcing initiatives for global enterprises.
* Blend consulting, delivery leadership, and platform\-driven intelligence.
* Influence executive decisions across global operating models.
* Build repeatable delivery frameworks powered by Aokah''s intelligence platform.
* Fast\-track growth into Director and Practice Leadership roles.

* Step 2: Complete the Screening Form \& Upload updated Resume

**About Uplers:**
 Our goal is to make hiring reliable, simple, and fast. Our role will be to help all our talents find and apply for relevant contractual onsite opportunities and progress in their career. We will support any grievances or challenges you may face during the engagement.
   

  

 (Note: There are many more opportunities apart from this on the portal. Depending on the assessments you clear, you can apply for them as well).
   

  

 So, if you are ready for a new challenge, a great work environment, and an opportunity to take your career to the next level, don't hesitate to apply today. We are waiting for you!

**This role is for one of our clients**
 Company Name: Brillio
   

  

 Industry: IT Services and IT Consulting
   

  

 Seniority level: Mid\-Senior level
   

  

 Min Experience: 9\+ years
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru
   

  

 JobType: full\-time
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
   

  

**Analytics, AI \& Data Engineering Consulting Lead**
**Experience**
 10\-15 years of experience in Analytics, AI, Data Engineering and Technology Consulting, with demonstrated success leading enterprise\-scale transformations across multiple industries.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are looking for a highly accomplished Analytics, AI \& Data Engineering Consultant who combines deep technical expertise with strong consulting and business leadership capabilities. The ideal candidate should have started their career as a hands\-on software/data engineer, evolved into leading enterprise analytics and AI programs, and now be capable of engaging CXOs to shape data and AI strategies.
   

  

 This role requires someone equally comfortable discussing cloud architecture with engineers, statistical models with data scientists, and business transformation with executive stakeholders.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Client Leadership \& Consulting**
* Serve as the trusted advisor for senior client stakeholders including CIO, CDO, CTO, VP Engineering, and Business Leaders
* Lead consulting engagements from discovery through implementation and value realization
* Conduct business assessments, identify AI opportunities, and develop enterprise AI and Data roadmaps
* Drive executive workshops, hypothesis\-driven problem solving, and strategic advisory engagements
* Translate business problems into scalable technology and analytics solutions


**AI \& Advanced Analytics**
* Design and oversee enterprise AI solutions across Predictive Analytics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic AI
* Lead development of forecasting, optimization, recommendation, computer vision, NLP, and anomaly detection solutions
* Build production\-grade ML pipelines with MLOps best practices
* Guide experimentation, A/B testing, causal inference, statistical validation, and model governance
* Drive responsible AI, explainability, bias monitoring, and model observability


**Data Engineering \& Modern Data Platforms** 
  

  

  

* Managed and designed scalable data architectures across cloud platforms
* Lead implementation of modern data platforms using:
+ Snowflake
+ Databricks
+ BigQuery
+ Microsoft Fabric
+ Redshift

* Build enterprise\-grade ELT/ETL pipelines using Spark, PySpark, SQL, dbt, Airflow, Dataflow, Kafka, and cloud\-native services
* Drive Data Quality, Data Governance, Master Data Management, Metadata Management, and Data Catalog initiatives
* Optimize performance, scalability, and cost of cloud data platforms


**Generative AI \& Agentic AI**
* Design enterprise GenAI applications using LLMs
* Architect Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems
* Build AI Agents capable of reasoning, planning, orchestration, and tool usage
* Develop multi\-agent workflows for enterprise automation
* Implement prompt engineering, evaluation frameworks, guardrails, and AI governance
* Integrate vector databases, knowledge graphs, semantic search, and enterprise knowledge management


**Architecture \& Engineering Leadership**
* Define enterprise architecture standards for AI and Analytics platforms
* Review solution architecture and engineering quality
* Guide engineering teams on scalable design patterns
* Drive API\-first architecture and microservices\-based AI deployment
* Lead CI/CD implementation for analytics and ML platforms
* Establish engineering best practices for reliability, security, observability, and maintainability


**Delivery Leadership**
* Lead cross\-functional teams comprising Data Engineers, Data Scientists, ML Engineers, Architects, and BI Developers
* Own solution delivery, governance, risk management, and stakeholder communication
* Mentor technical teams and establish engineering excellence
* Drive innovation initiatives, accelerators, reusable assets, and AI platforms


**Business Development**
* Support pre\-sales activities, solution design, and proposal development
* Lead client presentations, solution workshops, and executive demonstrations
* Develop reusable AI accelerators and industry\-specific offerings
* Contribute to thought leadership through whitepapers, blogs, and conference presentations


**Required Technical Skills**
**Programming**
* Python
* SQL
* PySpark
* Any BI tool


**Leadership Expectations**
 The ideal candidate should demonstrate:
   

  

  

* Strong engineering mindset with the ability to dive deep into technical discussions
* Ability to transition seamlessly between architecture, coding, consulting, and executive discussions
* Proven success managing teams of 20\-100\+ members across global delivery models
* Experience leading multi\-million\-dollar analytics and AI transformation programs
* Passion for mentoring and building high\-performing engineering and consulting teams


**Desired Educational Background**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related engineering discipline from a premier engineering institution
* MBA, PGDM, or equivalent management degree from a premier business school


**Ideal Candidate Profile**
 The successful candidate will have begun their career as a hands\-on software or data engineer, with strong experience in coding, system design, and data platform implementation. Over time, they should have progressed into leading analytics, AI, and engineering teams while developing strong consulting, client engagement, and business leadership capabilities. They should be equally adept at writing production\-grade code when required, architecting enterprise\-scale solutions, and influencing executive stakeholders to drive measurable business outcomes. This blend of technical depth, consulting acumen, and strategic leadership is essential for the role.
   

  

**About The Company**
 About Brillio \- Turning Disruptions into Competitive Advantages Brillio is the partner of choice for many Fortune 1000 companies seeking to turn disruption into a competitive advantage through innovative digital adoption. Backed by Bain Capital, Brillio is one of the fastest growing digital technolo
   

  

 Must\-have skills
   

  

 Client Engagement, Project Delivery, Technical Solution Design
   

  

 Good\-to\-have skills
   

  

 SQL, Python, PySpark
