b7c49cdd.title: Client Solutions Manager, Amazon Advertising
b7c49cdd.description:
**Description**
 mazon Advertising operates at the intersection of eCommerce and advertising, offering a rich array of digital display and video advertising solutions with the goal of helping our customers find and discover anything they want to buy. We help advertisers reach customers on Amazon.in, users of Amazon FireTv and MiniTV and other high quality sites across the web (via Amazon DSP). We put the customer at the heart of everything we do and work backwards, including in advertising.
   

  

 If you’re obsessed with being a part of digital advertising that informs instead of interrupts; that helps customers deliver great products and brands, not just delivers impressions; and that empowers customers to be decisive, rather than distracts them then we want you to come join us and make advertising even better.
   

  

**About Role**
 We are looking for a hands\-on, creative, detail\-oriented, analytical, and highly\-motivated client solutions manager to help scale our growing advertising business. You will work with advertisers and other Amazon business partners to manage media campaigns, ensure strong campaign performance and deliver positive return on investment for our emerging and growing advertisers. You will also lead dedicated programs to scale display advertising.
   

  

 You should be passionate about understanding business drivers for advertising performance, the range of Amazon products available to our advertisers and engaging with internal and external partners to deliver on these. This is an advertiser facing role that is also responsible for identifying opportunities to drive incremental revenue and long\-term growth. You will deliver consultative solutions for your advertisers earning their trust by educating them on how to be successful via Amazon Ad Products.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 The responsibilities of the Client Solutions Manager would comprise of:
   

  

 Engage with CXOs/Ecommerce \& Marketing heads of large brands within the category and act as an Amazon Advertising consultant and product expert. Consult and educate advertisers with insights and solutions to achieve greater results on Amazon
   

  

 Leverage our suite of rich data, targeting and product channels to collaborate with the other teams in the development of tailored solutions that meet clients’ goals
   

  

 Own end\-to\-end key business metrics like ad revenue and active advertisers for a complete category for Amazon advertising (Display and Video Ads)
   

  

 Create and drive processes and initiatives to differentiate Amazon as an advertising destination and improve advertiser impact
   

  

 Lead initiatives which require significant cross team collaboration
   

  

 Serve as a source of market intelligence for other areas of the Advertising team (e.g., product development, product marketing, pricing) and assist in the development of best practices and operational efficiencies
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience in advertising
* MBA


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working in e\-commerce
* Experience in operations, account management, or analytics


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ASSPL \- Maharashtra \- C32
   

  

 Job ID: A10435366

43d2ca3f.title: Engagement Manager
43d2ca3f.description:
**About the Role** 




 You will be embedded in the product and delivery team, working closely with engineering leads, product managers, and client\-facing teams. You will interface regularly with senior stakeholders — both internal and at client organizations — to ensure programs are defined, tracked, and delivered with precision.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Own the full program lifecycle: requirements gathering, sprint planning, milestone tracking, risk management, and release coordination
* Work with engineering teams to translate business requirements into detailed technical specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria
* Drive system integrations with enterprise clients — APIs, SSO, MDM, DLP, and enterprise infrastructure components
* Manage technical onboarding for enterprise deployments, ensuring smooth configuration, data migration, and go\-live execution
* Identify technical bottlenecks, escalate risks proactively, and drive resolution across cross\-functional teams
* Maintain program dashboards, technical documentation, integration runbooks, and delivery trackers
* Collaborate with QA to define test plans, oversee UAT cycles, and ensure quality gates are met before release
* Act as the single point of contact for assigned enterprise accounts post\-deployment, managing stakeholder communications and escalations
* Coordinate with client CIOs, CISOs, and IT teams to align on timelines, scope changes, and delivery expectations
* Support the business team in scoping new client requirements, estimating delivery effort, and contributing to proposals
* Contribute to client health reviews, ensuring measurable outcomes and long\-term retention



**Requirements** 



* 2 – 4 years of experience as a Business Analyst, Program Manager, or Technical Project Manager — preferably in a SaaS, enterprise tech, or consulting environment
* Prior experience in a BA or PM role is essential — you must have owned requirements, written specs, and managed delivery timelines
* Strong understanding of enterprise technology environments: APIs, integrations, cloud infrastructure, security protocols, and enterprise IT workflows
* Proficiency with program management tools (Jira, Confluence, Asana, or equivalents) and documentation practices
* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills — you must be equally comfortable writing a technical specification and presenting a program update to a CXO
* Ability to distil complex technical topics into clear, structured language for both technical and non\-technical audiences
* High ownership mindset — you notice what needs doing and you do it without being told



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* MBA or engineering degree from a reputed institution preferred; equivalent demonstrated capability will be considered

90ea28b8.title: Staff Technical Program Manager
90ea28b8.description:
We are seeking a **Staff Technical Program Manager** to lead and manage complex product\-driven programs that deliver impactful solutions to customers. This role requires a strong focus on driving product innovation, managing the product lifecycle, and aligning cross\-functional teams to deliver scalable, high\-quality solutions. The ideal candidate will partner closely with Product Management, Engineering, and Design teams to define roadmaps, execute on deliverables, and ensure alignment with strategic business goals.

**RESPONSIBILITIES:**

* Provide strategic leadership and oversight for the end\-to\-end delivery of highly complex, cross\-functional technical programs that drive transformative business impact.
* Act as a key decision\-maker, bridging engineering / product teams and business stakeholders to ensure alignment on system architecture, development priorities, and implementation strategies.
* Drive seamless execution across multiple interrelated projects, proactively managing dependencies, risks, and competing priorities to achieve program objectives.
* Cultivate a high\-performance culture by mentoring and empowering program managers and project teams, fostering technical excellence and innovation.
* Define, articulate, and execute visionary program strategies that align with the organization’s long\-term goals, ensuring scalability, customer satisfaction, and measurable business outcomes.

**MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS:**

* At least 8 years of experience as a Technical Program Manager, preferably in a FinTech environment, demonstrating a deep understanding of technical project management.
* Demonstrated ability to develop and scale effective processes while maintaining flexibility to adapt to changes, expertly balancing structure with agility.
* Exceptional attention to detail without losing sight of the broader objectives, enabling you to decompose ambitious projects into manageable parts and execute them effectively.
* Strong capability to communicate complex technical concepts effectively across diverse audiences, ensuring clarity and understanding.
* Thrives in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional environment; skilled in collaboration and open, candid communication with team members.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Solid technical knowledge with the ability to understand and interpret technical designs, challenges, and risks.
* Proactively identify and address issues and dependencies, collaborating with leadership and the team to devise preventative strategies and resolve challenges.
* Proficiency with tools such as Jira, Confluence, and advanced reporting tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI).

**PREFERRED REQUIREMENTS:**

* Experience in the financial services industry or another highly regulated environment
* Familiarity with customer feedback loops, Voice of the Customer (VoC) processes, and user experience research.
* Hands\-on technical background in software development or systems architecture, enabling effective collaboration with engineering teams.

Pay: ₹4,000,000\.00 \- ₹4,500,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Food provided
* Health insurance
* Internet reimbursement
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Work Location: In person

7e5582d4.title: Technical Program Manager
7e5582d4.description:
Manages the development and implementation process of a company’s products and services. Coordinates departmental or cross\-functional teams, focused on delivering new or upgrading existing products. Monitors the project from initiation through delivery including planning and directing schedules and monitoring budget/spending. Organizes cross\-functional activities, ensuring completion of the project i.e. product on schedule and within budget constraints. This role is most common in a matrix type organization; it does not have responsibility over product development, but often requires a technical background in order to complete its overall project management responsibility. This job manages specific projects that have a distinct beginning and end. Scrum Masters managing software development projects using the Agile development framework may be matched here. Those who use project management/Scrum Master techniques, but act primarily as developers and secondarily lead a project, should be matched to the appropriate engineering discipline. This job is intended for full\- time project leaders.
   

  

 More information about NXP in India...

67d1e692.title: Lead Technical Program Manager
67d1e692.description:
Sprinklr is the definitive, AI\-native platform for Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM), empowering brands to deliver extraordinary experiences at scale — across every customer touchpoint.
   

  

 By combining human instinct with the speed and efficiency of AI, Sprinklr helps brands earn trust and loyalty through personalized, seamless, and efficient customer interactions. Sprinklr’s unified platform provides powerful solutions for every customer\-facing team — spanning social media management, marketing, advertising, customer feedback, and omnichannel contact center management — enabling enterprises to unify data, break down silos, and act on real\-time insights.
   

  

 Today, 1,900\+ enterprises and 60% of the Fortune 100 rely on Sprinklr to help them deliver consistent, trusted customer experiences worldwide.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What You’ll Do**
* Drive multiple large\-scale technical projects, working cross\-functionally with product manager, designers, software development team, business operations and external partners across organizations to guarantee a smooth and efficient product delivery.
* Defines and implements cross\-team processes to improve efficiency and delivery (SDLC), defines metrics to measure and monitor efficiency and effectiveness of the processes and drives adoption across organizations.
* Monitors and tracks complex programs effectively by providing periodic updates to technical, non\- technical teams and Senior Management
* Has the right balance of technical, project management and business/product acumen and manages delivery across SDLC serving as a single point of contact.
* Handle multiple competing and changing priorities in a fast\-paced environment
* Manages stakeholders from different cross functional teams by setting expectations and Providing frequent program/project updates.
* Develop and implement project management methodologies, standards, and tools.
* Ensure PMO processes and practices are aligned with industry best practices.
* Lead and manage AI/ML initiatives across the full lifecycle, including problem definition, model development, deployment, and monitoring
* Collaborate with Data Science, Engineering, and Product teams to deliver scalable AI\-powered solutions.
* Ensure alignment on data readiness, model performance metrics, and deployment timelines.
* Drive adoption of AI/ML Ops best practices and ensure governance around model risk, bias, and compliance.


**What makes you qualified?**
* Experience \- 6\+ years
* Maintain a comprehensive project portfolio dashboard for tracking project performance.
* Conduct regular portfolio reviews and status updates to stakeholders.
* Ensure project documentation is complete, current, and stored appropriately.
* Implement governance practices to ensure projects adhere to scope, schedule, and budget Constraints.
* Develop metrics and KPIs to measure project performance and PMO effectiveness.
* Generate regular reports on project status, risks, issues, and resource utilization.
* Analyze project data to identify trends and areas for improvement.
* Facilitate communication between project teams, stakeholders, and senior leadership
* Ensure stakeholder expectations are managed and met through effective communication and Reporting.
* Provide training and development opportunities for project managers and team members


**We focus on our mission** 
 : Sprinklr was founded in 2009 to solve a big problem: growing enterprise complexity that separated brands from their customers. Our vision was clear: to unify fragmented teams, tools and data — helping large organizations build deeper, more meaningful connections with the people they serve. Today, Sprinklr has a unified, AI\-native platform for four product suites: Sprinklr Service, Sprinklr Social, Sprinklr Marketing, and Sprinklr Insights. Sprinklr is here to do three things:
   

  

* Lead a new category of enterprise software that we call Unified\-CXM.
* Empower companies to deliver next generation, unified engagement journeys that reimagine the customer experience.
* Create a culture of customer obsession, with trust, teamwork, and accountability.


**We believe in our product** 
 : Customers who value exceptional customer experiences have what they need on our single unified platform, built with an operating system approach on a single codebase. That means that everything — and everyone — can work together to service, respond, sell, and market to customers on the channels they prefer. While Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM) as a category is just getting started, we are well on our way to creating a no\-compromise, unified approach to better customer experiences for the world’s leading enterprise brands.
   

  

**We invest in our people** 
 : We offer a comprehensive suite of benefits designed to help each member of our team thrive. Sprinklr believes that you should be able to get the type of care you need for your personal well\-being when you need it. We offer you and your family voluntary healthcare coverage in countries where applicable. We believe it is important to take time off – it is essential for your mental and physical wellbeing. We provide Sprinklrites with paid time off to recharge and spend time with loved ones. We want to grow our talent with purpose. Our open Mentoring Program is designed to create meaningful connections that support growth and amplify our focus.
   

  

 To learn more about employee benefits by region, click here.
   

  

 To learn more about all\-things\-Sprinklr, visit our candidate resource hub here.
   

  

**EEO \- Our philosophy** 
 : Our goal is to ensure every employee feels like they belong and are operating in a collaborative environment. We fervently believe every employee matters and should be respected and heard. We believe we are stronger when we belong because collectively, we’re more innovative, creative, and successful.
   

  

 Sprinklr is proud to be an equal\-opportunity workplace and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, ethnicity, sex (including gender, pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity), age, physical or mental disability, citizenship, past, current, or prospective service in the uniformed services, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations are available upon request during the interview process. To request an accommodation, please work directly with your recruitment coordinator or recruiter.
   

  

**Warning about Recruiting Scams:** 
 Please be vigilant for recruiting scams impersonating Sprinklr. Sprinklr will never ask you for money, to pay for equipment, or for unnecessary personal information during the interview process. Sprinklr will also never pay in Bitcoin or send email communications from our executives. Please review the Federal Trade Commission's advice to avoid these types of scams.
   

  

 If you are contacted by someone whom you suspect may not be appropriately representing Sprinklr, please do not engage and block their email or phone number immediately.

9d840699.title: Technical Program Manager, Silicon, Chip Design
9d840699.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.
* Experience with chips and embedded systems used in mobile devices.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience working in the consumer electronics industry specifically involves executing technical programs with external partnerships.
* High\-tech industry experience with a track record of direct product development, program management, project management, professional services or engineering management.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 As Senior Silicon Implementation Technical Program Manager team, you will lead a team responsible for SoC development over the full product cycle from pre\-silicon to commercialization. A strong understanding of IP and SoC delivery in a silicon team is a must. You bring a breadth of expertise across silicon Architecture, RTL, DV, PD, etc. to enable silicon productization. You will drive execution of multiple concurrent SoC projects, this includes coordination of deliverables across multiple geographies, managing overall program schedules at target Power Performance Area (PPA) and quality, negotiations with stakeholders and escalation when needed to get decisions made and dissemination of program status across the team. Excellent written and verbal communication skills and relationship building across stakeholders is essential.
   

  

 The Platforms and Devices team encompasses Google's various computing software platforms across environments (desktop, mobile, applications), as well as our first party devices and services that combine the best of Google AI, software, and hardware. Teams across this area research, design, and develop new technologies to make our user's interaction with computing faster and more seamless, building innovative experiences for our users around the world.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work closely with engineering teams to develop and manage custom silicon projects.
* Work closely with partners on product development schedules, dependencies and budgets.
* Identify risks, develop mitigation strategies and facilitate conflict resolution.
* Interface between partners and product engineering teams, setting and managing schedules and milestones. Travel and Google Video Conferencing (GVCs) required to coordinate with teams in Mountain View/APAC.
* Drive program reviews, build schedules cross\-functionally, keep program milestones on track.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

 : Our goal is to ensure every employee feels like they belong and are operating in a collaborative environment. We fervently believe every employee matters and should be respected and heard. We believe we are stronger when we belong because collectively, we’re more innovative, creative, and successful.
   

  

 Sprinklr is proud to be an equal\-opportunity workplace and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, ethnicity, sex (including gender, pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity), age, physical or mental disability, citizenship, past, current, or prospective service in the uniformed services, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations are available upon request during the interview process. To request an accommodation, please work directly with your recruitment coordinator or recruiter.
   

  

**Warning about Recruiting Scams:** 
 Please be vigilant for recruiting scams impersonating Sprinklr. Sprinklr will never ask you for money, to pay for equipment, or for unnecessary personal information during the interview process. Sprinklr will also never pay in Bitcoin or send email communications from our executives. Please review the Federal Trade Commission's advice to avoid these types of scams.
   

  

 If you are contacted by someone whom you suspect may not be appropriately representing Sprinklr, please do not engage and block their email or phone number immediately.

824c62b0.title: Sr. Program Manager, Inventory Placement
824c62b0.description:
**Description**
 We are hiring a Senior Program Manager to run complex and cross functional supply chain projects for improvement of Speed in the network. This role is a part of the centralized supply chain planning function at Amazon India. The incumbent will be responsible for management of important goals for the India business. These projects will typically involve designing and building complex new processes, driving technology solutions, or launching exciting new supply chain models.
   

  

 The incumbent will be own the following \-
   

  

* They will be responsible for working with finance, supply chain execution, transportation and other Amazon teams to identify pain points and scope out large high impact projects
* They will be responsible for interaction across Amazon teams to reduce cost and improve speed for our customers.
* They will be responsible for driving cost and speed benefit analysis and go/no\-go decisions on various initiatives
* Once a go decision is made, the program manager will work to evolve a plan and timeline for execution.
* The program manager will develop a roadmap and metrics to measure progress of the initiative they own. They will also own writing reports/documents that detail the progress to leadership on a frequent basis
* They will liaise across functions to drive their project and help clear issues and bottlenecks.
* They will work with technology teams to scope out and drive any tech changes that are needed


 Above all, we expect program managers to be single threaded owners for their initiatives. This is a high ownership position where you directly control your destiny.
   

  

 They will be measured on the impact of their project. Depending on the project, clear speed impact goals will be set forth. It is the program manager's responsibility to ensure they drive the program towards achieving those goals.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Inventory Placement team anchors placing required inventory closer to customers and fulfilling at fastest speed and cheapest cost.
   

  

* Team strategizes on how do we inbound and then distribute across the network
* Define what would be the long\-term strategic focus of the organization
* Enable both quick\-wins and long\-term improvement opportunities
* Continuous process improvement to cater changing business needs


**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 5\+ years of team management experience
* 5\+ years of cross functional project delivery experience
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience managing, analyzing and communicating results to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ASSPL \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10469786

7ff863cd.title: Senior Program Manager PMU Mumbai
7ff863cd.description:
Role: Senior Program Manager \- Program Management Unit – Maharashtra
   





 Experience: A minimum of 4\-5 years of experience in project management, public policy, or program implementation, preferably in the education or child development sectors.
   





 Location: Mumbai
   





**Role Overview:**




 The Senior Program Manager (SPM) will be a key figure in aligning Rocket Learning’s initiatives with the objectives of the Department of Women and Child Development and the Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) Department in Mumbai. With 70% of their time spent within these departments, the SPM will focus on policy implementation, research, and fostering seamless communication between the government and our organization. The remaining 30% of their time will be dedicated to fieldwork, where they will visit districts to monitor program launches, events, and engage with district\-level stakeholders to strengthen on\-ground efforts.
   





 In this role, the SPM will build and maintain robust relationships with government officials and other key stakeholders. By understanding departmental workflows and management structures, they will strategically enhance the effectiveness of Rocket Learning’s programs and ensure that all initiatives are aligned with government priorities and executed with precision.
   





 This role requires a proactive individual with strong analytical abilities, strategic thinking, and the capacity to work collaboratively across both governmental and NGO sectors. The SPM will be instrumental in navigating policy complexities and maximizing the impact of our work on the ground.
   

  





**Qualifications**




 Education: Bachelor’s degree in Public Administration, Social Sciences, Education, Management, or a related field. A Master’s degree in any of these areas is preferred.
   





**Experience:**




 A minimum of 4\-5 years of experience in project management, public policy, or program implementation, preferably in the education or child development sectors.
   





 ● Proven experience working with government departments or in a liaison role, particularly within the education or social sectors. Minimum of 2 years.
   





 ● Experience in fieldwork, with a strong understanding of on\-ground program implementation and stakeholder engagement.
   





 Skills: Strong understanding of government operations, particularly in the education and child development sectors.
   





 ● Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with government officials and other stakeholders.
   





 ● Strategic thinking and analytical skills, with the ability to navigate complex policy environments and enhance program effectiveness.
   





 ● Project and program management expertise, with the ability to manage multiple tasks, meet deadlines, and adapt to changing priorities.
   





 ● Proficiency in data analysis and reporting, with the ability to use data to inform strategic decisions.
   





 ● Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and project management tools.
   





 ● Fluency in English, Marathi and Hindi (both written and spoken).
   





**Other Requirements:**




 ● Willingness to travel regularly for field visits and stakeholder meetings.
   





 ● Ability to work independently and as part of a team, with strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
   





**Key Responsibilities:**




 1\. Stakeholder Management: Manage relationships with multiple stakeholders within the Department of Women and Child Development and the Sarva Shiksha Abhiyaan.
   





 ● Liaise effectively with key departmental stakeholders, ensuring strong communication and collaboration.
   





 ● Establish and maintain clear communication channels to keep stakeholders informed about project progress, changes, and ground\-level challenges.
   





 2\. Policy Implementation, Research, and Project Management: Conduct systematic research and strategic planning related to Early Childhood Care and Education (ECCE) related policies in Maharashtra.
   





 ● Assist in budget planning and management for ECCE initiatives within the Department.
   





 ● Oversee and manage all aspects of project implementation, ensuring tasks are completed on time and within budget.
   





 ● Continuously monitor project progress, identify bottlenecks, and make necessary adjustments to ensure successful outcomes.
   





 3\. Data\-Driven Decision Making and Documentation: Collect, analyze, and interpret relevant data to support informed decision\-making and program adjustments.
   





 ● Assist the Department with data entry and maintain accurate records.
   





 ● Draft formal communications, including letters and reports, in Hindi, Marathi and English, as required.
   





 ● Prepare and submit regular reports on project progress, challenges, and outcomes to government stakeholders.
   





 ● Use data\-driven insights to inform strategic decisions and recommend adjustments to enhance program effectiveness.
   

  





 4\. Program Support and Field Visits: Ensure the smooth implementation of Rocket Learning’s programs across districts in Maharashtra, with a focus on ECCE.
   





 ● Coordinate ECCE\-related work at both the district and state levels to ensure alignment and effective execution.
   





 ● Conduct quarterly field visits to 2\-3 districts to oversee new program launches, events, and engage with local stakeholders to address on\-ground challenges.
   

  

  

  




 Requirements
   

  


**Critical Factors for Success**



* Strong aptitude for analytical thinking and data\-driven decision making
* Strong communication skills – written and oral \- along with ability to liaise with cross\-functional teams
* Ability to handle multiple projects and tasks in an entrepreneurial environment
* Taking ownership in ambiguous situations
* User empathy and appreciation for challenges and opportunities of building a product for low\-income smartphone users

ae9db454.title: Presales Consultant- HCL Software
ae9db454.description:
**Job Purpose**
 Working with the Company's Sales Team, the Presales Consultant is responsible for providing presales technical support to the Sales team and presenting tailored demonstrations or qualification discussions to customers and/or prospects. The Presales Consultant also assists the Sales Team with qualifying opportunities \- in or out and helping expand existing opportunities through solid questioning. The Presales Consultant will be responsible on conducting Technical Proof of Concept, Demonstration \& Presentation on the supported products \& solution.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Assist Account/Product Managers with qualification of opportunities by providing presales technical support.
* Provides pre\-sales technical support and deliver deep dive product demonstrations to customers and business partners.
* Delivers training to partners on products solution.
* Contribute to and refine technical RFP/RFI responses
* Customer demonstrations and presentations
* Coordinating and managing technical validation events (POC)
* Coordinating and managing POC assets
* Participating in conferences, shows, exhibitions when appropriate and requested
* Recommend and influence market content.
* Performs other related duties as assigned.


**Knowledge, Skills And Experience**
* Requires an in\-depth knowledge of vendor products.
* Good SAAS and cloud knowledge.
* Strong interpersonal and presentation skills, with ability to articulate complex technology simply.
* Ability to troubleshoot and solve technical problems.
* Self\-motivated and flexible.
* Ability to effectively multi\-task and be able to handle a high volume of requests, specifically unplanned/unscheduled requests.
* Able to execute instructions and to request clarification when needed.
* Able to exhibit ability to be sensitive to the needs, concerns, and feeling of others.
* Able to interact effectively with all levels of management.


 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on\-demand courses.
* Elevate Your Personal Well\-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well\-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* Diversity, Equity \& Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer\-to\-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co\-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer\-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!
   

  

 We are an equal opportunity employer and committed to building a diverse team that represents and empowers a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment based on merit, without regard to race, colour, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, genetics, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. To support our diversity and inclusion efforts, we may ask for voluntary gender disclosure information. This data will be used solely to improve our hiring practices and ensure fair treatment for all candidates.

3c055946.title: Solution Lead
3c055946.description:
It is time for you to make \#thebigmove to Tata Consultancy Services.
 



  





 Role : Solution Lead
 



 Exp : 8\-20 Years
 



 Location : PAN India
 



  





**JOB DESCRIPTION:** 




  





 The Presales Solution Lead plays a pivotal role in driving business growth by crafting winning solutions strategy that align with client requirements. This role bridges the gap between sales and delivery, ensuring that proposed solutions are technically sound, commercially viable, and strategically aligned with the client’s goals.
 



 Solution lead will be responsible for driving the end\-to\-end solutioning and presales cycle for infrastructure and cloud services, including managed services, transformation programs, and cloud migration initiatives. This role bridges business requirements with technology architectures, partners with clients on their transformation journeys, and ensures scalable, secure, and cost\-effective solutions
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 




**Presales Solutioning** 



* Lead RFP/RFI/RFQ responses: requirement analysis, win theme identification, solution design, pricing, and proposal submission.
* Create high\-impact proposals, presentations, and cost models aligned to customer requirements.
* Engage with clients to understand business goals and translate them into technology outcomes



**Client Engagement \& Requirement Analysis** 



* Interpret RFPs/RFIs/RFQs and lead the response process with tailored solutions.
* Engage with clients and sales teams to understand business needs, pain points, and technical requirements.



**Solution Design \& Proposal Development** 



* Comprehensive expertise in Infrastructure services solutioning, including Service Desk, Workplace, Hybrid Infrastructure, Network, and Service Management, enables the architecting of robust end\-to\-end solutions that leverage both cloud platforms and on\-premises infrastructure.
* Drawing upon deep knowledge of digital workplace environments and network optimisation, the solution lead collaborates with technology tower SMEs to define precise operating models, delivery frameworks, and ITIL\-aligned service models. This holistic approach supports transformation roadmaps encompassing hybrid cloud adoption, automation enablement, and IT sustainability, ensuring that solutions not only meet but anticipate evolving client requirements.
* Architect end\-to\-end solutions leveraging cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), On premise Infrastructure, Networks, Digital Workplace, Service Management leveraging emerging technologies and AI solutions.
* Define solution strategy and guide with Technology tower SME to prepare solution accordingly.
* Define operating models, delivery frameworks (Remote, Hybrid, Onsite), SLA governance, and ITIL\-aligned service models.
* Drive transformation roadmaps, including hybrid cloud adoption, automation enablement, and IT sustainability solutions
* Collaborate with internal teams (Sales , Account team, , delivery, marketing) to build compelling proposals and presentations.
* Ensure compliance with proposal guidelines including formatting, branding, and legal sections.
* Co\-ordinate with pricing team prepare pricing as per customer template.
* Conduct various management review and ensure feedback is incorporated.



**Bid Management \& Sales Support** 



* Own and manage the bid lifecycle for small to medium deals; contribute to large, complex bids.
* Provide technical leadership during client meetings and workshops.
* Support sales enablement through collateral creation, demos, and proof\-of\-concept development.



**Internal Coordination \& Stakeholder Management** 



* Liaise with product, delivery, and partner teams to gather inputs and validate solution feasibility.
* Mentor junior solution consultants and contribute to knowledge sharing within the team.



**Thought Leadership \& Innovation** 



* Stay updated with industry trends, cloud innovations, and competitive landscape.
* Develop reusable assets, frameworks, and reference architectures to accelerate solutioning.



**Commercial \& Costing** 



* Develop and validate commercial models, TCO/ROI analysis, effort estimation, and pricing templates.
* Understand industry benchmarks and market trends for managed services pricing



**Preferred Certifications:** 



* AWS/Azure/GCP Solution Architect/Network (CCNA, etc.), Microsoft Collaboration
* TOGAF, ITIL, PMP (as applicable)

f119e5a3.title: Sr Solutions Consultant
f119e5a3.description:
**Our Mission**
 At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real\-world problems with cutting\-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.
   

  

****Who We Are****
 In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real\-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!
   

  

 We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real\-time problem\-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.
   

  

****Job Summary****
 Our Solutions Consultant team members work hand\-in\-hand with large organizations around the world to keep their digital environments protected. We educate, inspire,and empower our potential clients in their journey to transform their security architectures.
   

  

 You are empowered with unmatched systems and tools and a team built on joint success. You won’t find someone at Palo Alto Networks that isn’t committed to your success with everyone pitching in to assist when it comes to solutions selling, learning, and development. Our Solutions Consulting community is driven by the mission to be our customers’ cybersecurity partner of choice, protecting their digital way of life.
   

  

****Job Summary****
 The Solutions Consultant is the evolution of the traditional Sales Engineering role, aligning how we best serve our customers in understanding their environment, providing solution guidance and ensuring value realization in their investment with Palo Alto Networks. As a Solutions Consultant you provide technical leadership and expertise and guidance in your customer’s security transformation journey. As a Solutions Consultant for Service Provider and internal IT of Service Providers, you will be part of the core technical team, architecting solutions for large Service Provider customers in the region. You will play a key role in defining technical solutions that secure a customer’s key business imperatives and ensuring value realization of their investment with Palo Alto Networks. You evangelize our industry leadership in on\-prem, cloud, and security operations services that establish PANW as your customer’s cybersecurity partner of choice.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities****
* Curiosity is core to the Solutions Consultant role, and you see complex problems as opportunities to learn and deliver innovative solutions! You define your impact by: Meeting and exceeding sales quotas by building and implementing strategic, technical account plans that target cross\-platform solutions
* Your ability to position, demonstrate and create high level designs across the entire PANW portfolio based on customer business needs
* Conducting discovery to understand and articulate the key technical, operational, and commercial imperatives of your prospects and customers
* Working closely with Professional Services, Customer Success and Specialist teams to ensure overall customer implementation and adoption of solutions
* Demonstrating strong communication skills and the ability to influence through effective presentations and customer\-specific demos, technical engagements, and workshops
* Leading successful technical validation efforts based on best practices to ensure technical win in assigned opportunities
* Orchestrating supporting resources (Specialists, Channel Resources, Customer Support) to ensure a one\-team approach that demonstrates a cohesive strategy Promoting end\-to\-end solutions that include PANW and/or partner professional services to ensure customers realize business value sooner
* Understanding the competitive landscape and effectively differentiating our leadership Continuously investing in yourself to develop technical and professional skills that drive your ever\-increasing contributions to success of our customers while actively participating within the Solutions Consultant community and at industry events
* Identifying technical stakeholders and cultivating relationships with key personas to build and drive a security architecture transformation roadmap
* Understanding of the Service Provider infrastructure is a must for this role


****Required Qualifications****
* Understanding of data networking and/or modern application design and cloud architectures
* Delivering cybersecurity solutions that solve technical challenges and influence new business initiatives
* Influencing and gaining buy\-in from key stakeholders, either in a customer\-facing or internal role; prior experience in a pre\-sales role is ideal
* Creating and delivering technical presentations, workshops, or technical validation engagements
* Experience in selling, designing, implementing, or managing one or more of the following solutions: Network Security, AI Security, SASE, SaaS, CNAPP and/or SOC Transformation Technologies
* Partnering with Customer Support functions to ensure successful implementation and adoption of sold solutions
* Complex sales involving long sales processes with multiple buying centers and multi\-product solutions are preferred
* Proficient in English


****Qualifications****
**Our Commitment**
 We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.
   

  

 We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.
   

  

 Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.
   

  

 Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

6134e8e2.title: Automotive Pre Sales
6134e8e2.description:
**Pre\-Sales – Automotive \& Embedded Systems** 




**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking a dynamic Pre\-Sales Consultant with expertise in automotive and embedded systems. The role bridges technical solutions and customer engagement, ensuring our offerings align with client needs in the automotive domain.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Client Engagement**
* Partner with sales teams to understand customer requirements in automotive and embedded domains.
* Conduct technical presentations, product demos, and proof\-of\-concepts for OEMs, Tier\-1 suppliers, and technology partners.
* **Solution Design**
* Translate customer requirements into tailored solutions using embedded platforms, automotive software stacks, and hardware.
* Collaborate with engineering teams to design proposals, architectures, and integration strategies.
* **Technical Expertise**
* Provide deep knowledge of automotive standards (AUTOSAR, ISO 26262, ASPICE).
* Demonstrate understanding of embedded systems (MCUs, RTOS, CAN, LIN, Ethernet, diagnostics).
* Advise on emerging technologies such as ADAS, EV systems, infotainment, and connected car solutions.
* **Business Development Support**
* Prepare RFP/RFI responses, technical documentation, and solution roadmaps.
* Support bid management and contribute to pricing strategies with technical inputs.
* Identify opportunities for upselling and cross\-selling solutions.
* **Collaboration**
* Work closely with product management and engineering to align offerings with market needs.
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, ensuring long\-term relationships and customer satisfaction.

c5fa8669.title: Pre-Sales Consultant – Strategic Alliances & Bid Management (Microsoft, Anthropic, Databricks & AI Ecosystem)
c5fa8669.description:
About Venus Consultant
 
 Venus Consultant is a fast\-growing technology consulting and talent solutions company focused on AI, Cloud, Data, CRM, ERP, and Digital Transformation. We partner with startups, mid\-market companies, and enterprises to deliver technology consulting, implementation services, and specialized talent solutions.
 



 We are looking for an experienced
 **Pre\-Sales Consultant** 
 who can help build our technology partnership ecosystem, support enterprise RFP pursuits, and establish strategic relationships with leading technology vendors such as
 **Microsoft, Anthropic, Databricks, OpenAI, AWS, Google Cloud, Snowflake, and other enterprise software providers.** 



 Role Overview
 
 The Pre\-Sales Consultant will play a strategic role in expanding Venus Consultant's consulting practice by driving partner enablement, supporting reseller and solution partner applications, leading proposal development, and collaborating with delivery and sales teams to win enterprise opportunities.
 



 This is a client\-facing and partner\-facing role requiring strong technical understanding, excellent proposal writing skills, and experience with enterprise procurement and RFP processes.
 


 Key ResponsibilitiesStrategic Partnerships \& Vendor Alliances
 * Lead initiatives to establish and grow partnerships with Microsoft, Anthropic, Databricks, OpenAI, AWS, Google Cloud, Snowflake, and other strategic technology vendors.
* Support the application process for Microsoft Solutions Partner designation, CSP/Reseller programs, and similar partner programs.
* Coordinate vendor onboarding, certifications, competency requirements, and compliance activities.
* Maintain relationships with partner account managers and alliance teams.
* Identify co\-sell, funding, marketplace, and partner incentive opportunities (e.g., Microsoft ECIF, Azure Innovate, Solution Assessments).


 Pre\-Sales \& Solution Consulting
 * Work closely with sales teams to qualify opportunities and develop winning solution strategies.
* Design high\-level solution architectures for Microsoft Dynamics 365, Power Platform, Azure, AI, Data \& Analytics, and Cloud Transformation engagements.
* Support customer discovery workshops and technical presentations.
* Prepare solution approach documents and implementation strategies.


 RFP / RFQ / RFI Management
 * Lead end\-to\-end preparation of enterprise RFP, RFQ, and RFI responses.
* Analyze procurement documents and identify compliance requirements.
* Coordinate with SMEs, delivery teams, and technology partners to prepare technical responses.
* Develop solution narratives, implementation methodologies, project plans, assumptions, and risk mitigation strategies.
* Ensure proposals are fully compliant with client requirements and submission guidelines.


 Proposal Development
 * Develop:
* Technical proposals
* Statement of Work (SOW)
* Scope documents
* Project implementation plans
* Resource plans
* Delivery methodologies
* Gantt charts
* Executive summaries
* Pricing assumptions
* Solution diagrams
* Create reusable proposal templates, case studies, and capability presentations.


 Technology \& Solution Expertise
 
 Support opportunities involving:
 


* Microsoft Dynamics 365
* Microsoft Power Platform
* Microsoft Azure
* Microsoft Copilot
* Microsoft Fabric
* Databricks
* Anthropic Claude
* OpenAI
* Azure AI
* Snowflake
* Data Engineering \& Analytics
* AI Agents \& Generative AI
* CRM \& ERP implementations
* Cloud Modernization


 Bid Governance
 * Maintain proposal repositories and knowledge libraries.
* Build standard response templates.
* Track proposal deadlines and submission schedules.
* Coordinate internal reviews and approvals.
* Manage bid compliance and documentation.


 Required SkillsTechnical Knowledge
 * Strong understanding of Microsoft ecosystem (Azure, Dynamics 365, Power Platform)
* AI and Generative AI platforms
* Data \& Analytics platforms
* Cloud architecture fundamentals
* Enterprise software implementation lifecycle
* CRM and ERP consulting


 Proposal \& Bid Management
 * Extensive experience writing enterprise RFP responses
* Strong understanding of procurement processes
* Proposal management
* Technical documentation
* Compliance matrix preparation
* Risk assessment
* Commercial proposal coordination


 Partnership Experience
 
 Experience working with one or more of:
 


* Microsoft Partner Network
* Microsoft CSP
* Microsoft Solutions Partner Program
* Anthropic Partner Program
* Databricks Partner Network
* AWS Partner Network
* Google Cloud Partner Advantage
* Snowflake Partner Network


 Qualifications
 * Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, Business, or a related field.
* 7\+ years of experience in pre\-sales, solution consulting, bid management, or technology consulting.
* Experience working with Microsoft partners, system integrators, or consulting organizations.
* Strong understanding of enterprise digital transformation projects.


 Preferred Certifications
 * Microsoft Certified (Azure, Dynamics 365, Power Platform)
* Microsoft Solutions Partner experience
* Azure Solutions Architect
* Databricks Fundamentals
* AWS or Google Cloud certifications
* PMP or PRINCE2 (preferred)


 Success Metrics
 * Successfully establish strategic partnerships and reseller relationships with key technology vendors.
* Secure Microsoft Solutions Partner designation and other partner accreditations.
* Increase enterprise RFP win rates through high\-quality proposal development.
* Build a reusable proposal and knowledge repository.
* Enable Venus Consultant to expand its consulting and implementation capabilities through strategic alliances.


 Why Join Venus Consultant?
 * Opportunity to build strategic technology partnerships from the ground up.
* Work with leading AI, Cloud, and Enterprise Software vendors.
* Influence the company's growth strategy and consulting practice.
* Collaborate on enterprise transformation initiatives across North America and global markets.
* This role is broader than a traditional Pre\-Sales Consultant—it combines
 **Alliance Manager, Bid Manager, Solution Consultant, and Partner Enablement Lead** 
 responsibilities. For attracting stronger candidates, I would title it
 **"Strategic Alliances \& Pre\-Sales Consultant (Microsoft \& AI Ecosystem)"** 
 or
 **"Partner Enablement \& Bid Consultant"** 
 , as these titles better reflect the seniority and scope of the position.

8286c243.title: Data Platform Cloud Presales, Solution Engineer
8286c243.description:
**About the Role** 




 We're looking for a customer\-focused
 **Data Platform Cloud/ multicloud Presales, Solution Engineer** 
 to help enterprise customers design, evaluate, and adopt modern data, analytics, AI, and cloud solutions on
 **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)** 
 .
 



  





 You'll bring strong technical knowledge across data warehousing, databases, data lakes/lakehouse architectures, data integration, analytics, and AI — and be comfortable leading customer\-facing workshops, demos, PoCs, and architecture reviews using Oracle technologies such as
 **Autonomous Database, Exadata, OCI GoldenGate, OCI Data Lakehouse, OCI AI Services, and Oracle Analytics Cloud** 
 . You'll partner closely with customers, sales, product specialists, engineering, and partners to position and design these solutions.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Solution Architecture \& Presales Consulting** 



* Understand customer business goals, data challenges, and modernization priorities, and translate them into scalable, secure, high\-performing OCI architectures
* Lead architecture discussions spanning Autonomous Database, Exadata, warehouse modernization, lakehouse, analytics, AI/ML, and data integration
* Support opportunity qualification, technical discovery, proposals, and RFP responses



**Customer Engagement \& Advisory** 



* Act as a trusted advisor to CIOs, CDOs, data leaders, architects, and business stakeholders
* Lead workshops, whiteboarding sessions, executive briefings, and technical deep dives
* Guide customers on cloud adoption, database modernization, analytics transformation, AI readiness, and data governance



**Demonstrations, PoCs \& Technical Validation** 



* Deliver demos of Oracle data platform capabilities (Autonomous Database, Oracle Analytics, GoldenGate, Data Integration, Data Lakehouse, AI Services)
* Define and lead PoCs — scope, success criteria, workload sizing, evaluation metrics — to validate architecture, performance, and business value
* Present findings and recommendations to technical and business decision\-makers



**Data Platform, AI \& Analytics Expertise** 



* Advise on modern architecture patterns: cloud data warehouses, data lakes/lakehouse, real\-time replication, streaming, and AI\-enabled platforms
* Guide customers on ingestion, migration, replication, transformation, governance, security, performance, and cost optimization
* Stay current on trends in data platforms, AI/generative AI, analytics, and competitive technologies



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, IT, Data Science, or related field
* Experience in presales, solution engineering, solution architecture, or technical consulting for data platforms
* Strong understanding of databases, data warehousing, data lakes, data integration, analytics, AI/ML, and cloud architecture
* Hands\-on or architectural experience with cloud data platforms and enterprise data solutions
* Proven ability to lead technical discussions and translate business needs into solutions
* Experience delivering customer workshops, demos, and PoC engagements
* Strong communication, consultative selling, and stakeholder management skills



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with Oracle technologies: Autonomous Database, Exadata, OCI GoldenGate, Oracle Analytics Cloud, OCI Data Integration/Data Flow/Object Storage, OCI AI Services
* Knowledge of data lakehouse, data mesh, real\-time analytics, and hybrid cloud data platforms
* Understanding of generative AI use cases, vector search, MLOps, and AI\-powered analytics
* Experience with BI tools (Oracle Analytics Cloud, Power BI, Tableau, Looker)
* Familiarity with competitive platforms (Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, Synapse)
* Relevant certifications in cloud, database, data engineering, analytics, or AI/ML

 Why Join Us?
 



 Help enterprise customers modernize their data landscape and adopt AI\-driven innovation using OCI, Autonomous Database, Exadata, GoldenGate, Data Lakehouse, and Oracle Analytics — shaping customer data strategy and driving cloud adoption across strategic accounts.

7035b536.title: Sr Enterprise Technical Architect (TMS) - GPTS Consulting
7035b536.description:
**Scope:**

* Core responsibilities of implementation and possess strong technical knowledge in TMS solution to understand how the Blue Yonder solution can be configured and delivered to better facilitate customer business processes. Ownership of Blue Yonder Platform Integration with ERP System
* Look at various angles of a Problem to identify the root cause to solve a Variety of problems. Promotes the same outlook in the Team.
* Volunteers for new challenges and eager to learn and challenge himself for new tasks as well build a network outside the immediate Team and encourage an atmosphere where team can thrive

**What you’ll do:**

* Serves as a technical owner and attends and contributes to key meetings between Project Manager, Solution Architects, key customer contacts, and customer users, up to and including key executive project sponsors
* Ensure knowledge transfer is conducted with key customer project team
* Communicates business cases to PMG and PD regarding customer specific needs related to product functionality and enhancements
* Interacts with Product Management Group \& Product Development Team regarding new releases and new functionality and act as the liaison to communicate to the rest of the team
* Work with Support Services team to make Customer Stable post go\-live and venture towards value realization.
* Conducts functional analysis sessions with clients and/or the project team to understand the functional needs of the client and develops functional solutions to meet those needs.
* Provide variety of functional support to the project team; including quality assurance/design review, environment setup, software installation, configuration, report and label generation, operation consulting, troubleshooting, system testing \& programming.
* Responsible for services delivery of product implementation and related integration.
* Works as a senior member of a consulting team on product implementation, enhancement, managed services, integration, custom projects either at the customer site or offshore.

**What we are looking for:**

* 15 to 20 Years of corporate experience. Experienced can be lesser if knowledge of Blue Yonder TMS has been acquired in previous Implementation projects.
* Bachelor's degree (or equivalent) in Computer Science or Engineering or other relevant discipline.
* Expertise in Integration of TMS product, Solution Integration, Quality Assurance, System Testing and Optimization Design.
* Strong Supply Chain domain experience
* Data Science, Agile, Azure, AI/ML is a plus
* SQL, PL/SQL, BA Cognos, Power BI, OS, DB Maintenance Jobs, Debugging \& Trouble shooting knowledge
* Hands\-on Experience on Integrating Blue Yonder TMS product (preferably **BY/i2 TMS)** with upstream and downstream systems.
* Knowledge on interfaces between TMS and ERP/Host, WMS.
* Parcel Handling, INTTRA Integration are preferred.
* Knowledge in Tariff Modelling, Optimization Design and Financial Implementation.
* Ability to resolve complex problems with minimal guidance.
* Excellent computer skills with in\-depth knowledge of operating systems, client/server technology, ERP systems, Integration and Middleware technologies and applications
* Ability to develop and maintain strong, productive relationships with customers, partners and consultants
* Strong proactive communicator and presenter, able to influence and collaborate at all levels of an organization to maximize problem resolution while effectively presenting information and responding to highly specialized functional questions
* Highly developed analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Understanding of Database structures. Understanding of various functional platforms and infrastructures.
* Travel readiness based on business needs.

**Our Values**

  

If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success – and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like ours? Find out here: Core Values


All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

ad63323a.title: Senior Administrator: Amazon Connect and Service Cloud Voice
ad63323a.description:
Work Model: You’ll work in a hybrid model, onsite at your designated Regal Rexnord location, with flexibility to work remotely.  

  

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

  

  

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES • Own our Amazon Connect and Salesforce Service Cloud Voice with a focus on reliability, scalability, and security. • Design, build, and maintain IVR/contact flows, routing strategies, queues, call recording/transcription, and analytics (e.g., Contact Lens). • Configure and govern Salesforce Voice: Omni\-Channel routing, agent setup, call controls, dispositions, transcripts, visibility, and supervisor tooling. • Implement real\-time features including call transcription and Einstein Conversation Insights; operationalize insights to improve agent coaching and QA. • Integrate voice data with Salesforce objects (Cases, Contacts, Activities, custom objects) to streamline agent workflows and reporting. • Establish observability, voice quality telemetry, and automate alerts, dashboards, and runbooks. • Deliver self\-service reporting and dashboards (service levels, occupancy, contact outcomes, agent performance, voice/Omni KPIs). • Partner with Network/Security to ensure identity/SSO, encryption, least\-privilege IAM, and compliance across environments. • Provide production support for Amazon Connect and Service Cloud Voice; participate in an on\-call rotation and after\-hours releases. • Lead/assist incident response, root\-cause analysis, and post\-mortems; author standards, documentation, and mentor admins. • Collaborate cross\-functionally (Product Owners, BAs, Developers, Data/Integrations) and operate within Agile/Scrum ceremonies. PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE/QUALIFICATIONS Technical Skills Required: • 6–10\+ years in telephony/contact center engineering; 4\+ years hands\-on with Amazon Connect; 3\+ years with Salesforce Service Cloud Voice. • Expertise in Amazon Connect: contact flows, routing, queues, CTRs, Contact Lens, outbound, call recording. • Expertise in Salesforce Service Cloud/Voice: Omni\-Channel, voice setup, agent configuration, transcripts, analytics, integration patterns. • Proficiency with AWS services: Lambda, CloudWatch, and/or IAM. • Strong understanding of telephony fundamentals: SIP, RTP, PSTN, number management. • Security, compliance, and data governance for contact center platforms. Other Skills Required: • Certified Salesforce Service Cloud Consultant (required). • 3\+ years Salesforce Administrator experience with strong Service Cloud focus; hands\-on with Service Cloud Voice. • Experience integrating/supporting Amazon Connect with Salesforce; familiarity with CTI troubleshooting and voice analytics/transcripts. • Strong grasp of Salesforce data model, object relationships, data dependencies, and the impact of configuration changes on automation, integrations, and reporting. • Proficiency with Salesforce automation tools (Flows, validation rules); experience building Service screen flows and record\-triggered flows. • Excellent communication and stakeholder management; ability to translate business needs into resilient technical solutions. • Agile/Scrum experience; strong attention to detail, data accuracy, and a customer\-first mindset. Preferred but not required: • Agentforce experience. • Salesforce certifications (Admin, Platform App Builder, Service Cloud Consultant); AWS Solutions Architect/Developer/DevOps certifications. • Exposure to other CCaaS/voice platforms (Genesys Cloud, Five9, Twilio) and voice quality monitoring tools. • Real\-time analytics/BI using CTRs/transcripts/contact data. • SSO/identity (Okta/Azure AD) and enterprise change/release management.

  

  

**About Regal Rexnord**
=======================

  

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

  

  

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food \& beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

  

  

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation \& Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

  

  

  

**Notification to Agencies** : Please note that Regal Rexnord Corporation and its affiliates and subsidiaries ("Regal Rexnord") do not accept unsolicited resumes or calls from third\-party recruiters or employment agencies. In the absence of a signed Master Service Agreement or similar contract and approval from HR to submit resumes for a specific requisition, Regal Rexnord will not consider or approve payment to any third\-parties for hires made.

80c394e4.title: Solution Consultant II
80c394e4.description:
**Company Overview**
 With 80,000 customers across 150 countries, UKG is the largest U.S.\-based private software company in the world. And we’re only getting started. Ready to bring your bold ideas and collaborative mindset to an organization that still has so much more to build and achieve? Read on.
   

  

 At UKG, you get more than just a job. You get to work with purpose. Our team of U Krewers are on a mission to inspire every organization to become a great place to work through our award\-winning HR technology built for all.
   

  

 Here, we know that you’re more than your work. That’s why our benefits help you thrive personally and professionally, from wellness programs and tuition reimbursement to U Choose — a customizable expense reimbursement program that can be used for more than 200\+ needs that best suit you and your family, from student loan repayment, to childcare, to pet insurance. Our inclusive culture, active and engaged employee resource groups, and caring leaders value every voice and support you in doing the best work of your career. If you’re passionate about our purpose — people —then we can’t wait to support whatever gives you purpose. We’re united by purpose, inspired by you.
   

  

 As a Solution Consultant II within our UKG Ready implementation team, you will do the following:
   

  

* Engage with our Project Teams in various geographies in order to understand their business needs regarding the various modules of UKG Ready product
* Leverage your training in designing and building a solution that meets their needs
* Work cross\-functionally and amongst a team on New client implementation, upgrade, and change order projects
* Utilize your technical aptitude to configure \& re\-configure our software solution
* Stay up\-to\-date on the latest product features and functionalities
* Act as a knowledgeful consultant in the product implementation area
* Contribute to designing the best practices for product implementation
* Provide significant transfer of UKG product knowledge to UKG customer


 Ability to work in a business required shift (3:00 PM to 12:00 AM/10:30 AM to 7:30 PM)
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Individuals looking to be a part of our talented team should possess the following:
   

  

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science or related field
* 2 to 5 years of industry experience with exposure to Global implementations
* Experience in implementing HCM or WFM software
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced team environment
* Ability to adapt to new technologies and changing environments
* Excellent analytical, communication and consulting skills


 Where we’re going
   

  

 UKG is on the cusp of something truly special. Worldwide, we already hold the \#1 market share position for workforce management and the \#2 position for human capital management. Tens of millions of frontline workers start and end their days with our software, with billions of shifts managed annually through UKG solutions today. Yet it’s our AI\-powered product portfolio designed to support customers of all sizes, industries, and geographies that will propel us into an even brighter tomorrow!
   

  

 UKG is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace, including the recruitment process.
   

  

 Disability Accommodation in the Application and Interview Process
   

  

 For individuals with disabilities that need additional assistance at any point in the application and interview process, please email UKGCareers@ukg.com

 Technum Opus Pvt. Ltd. helps organizations accelerate their digital transformation through Cloud, IT Infrastructure, Managed Services, Software Solutions, and Digital Transformation initiatives. As an AWS Partner, we work closely with customers to design, migrate, modernize, and optimize their cloud environments while delivering business\-driven technology solutions.
